name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Trump’s lawlessness is out of control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Donald Trump is doubling down on his attacks against me. And I’m not backing down.
Peter, Donald Trump is doubling down on his attacks against me. And I’m not backing down.
Over a month ago, several of my colleagues and I released a video restating the law and a simple truth: When you serve our country, your oath to the Constitution comes above all. Above politics. Above power. Above any one man.
That was enough to send Trump into a meltdown. He called for my arrest. He called for my hanging. He called for me to go to jail. **Now he’s sent the DOJ after me.**
This is lawless, unhinged behavior—and it’s exactly what you’d expect from a bully who can’t stand being challenged.
Let me make something clear to the president: I will not be intimidated. I swore an oath to the Constitution, and I will honor it—no matter what threats Trump makes or who he sends after me.
**[I will keep doing my job for the people of Western Pennsylvania, and I will keep standing up for our democracy against any attack or pathetic threats. If you’re with me in this fight to stand up to this bully and defend our Constitution, chip in to Heartland Patriots and me right now and help me keep fighting →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99762?refcode=em20260117-9955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9955%2E614464%2E3DRdc_)**
**[Donate →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99762?refcode=em20260117-9955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9955%2E614464%2E3DRdc_)**
The oath to the Constitution is sacred, and it binds us all to the rule of law.
I first swore that oath in the Naval Academy when I was just a teenager. I swore it again when I was elected to represent Western PA in Congress. It’s not an oath I took lightly, and I intend to keep it—no matter what.
I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump. I won’t back down from doing my job. And I won’t be bullied into silence by the president and his political enforcers.
**[I’m standing up for our democracy, our Constitution, and our country—because America is worth fighting for. clean_body: Donald Trump is doubling down on his attacks against me. And I’m not backing down. Peter, Donald Trump is doubling down on his attacks against me. And I’m not backing down. Over a month ago, several of my colleagues and I released a video restating the law and a simple truth: When you serve our country, your oath to the Constitution comes above all. Above politics. Above power. Above any one man. That was enough to send Trump into a meltdown. He called for my arrest. He called for my hanging. He called for me to go to jail. Now he’s sent the DOJ after me. This is lawless, unhinged behavior—and it’s exactly what you’d expect from a bully who can’t stand being challenged. Let me make something clear to the president: I will not be intimidated. I swore an oath to the Constitution, and I will honor it—no matter what threats Trump makes or who he sends after me. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, and it binds us all to the rule of law. I first swore that oath in the Naval Academy when I was just a teenager. I swore it again when I was elected to represent Western PA in Congress. It’s not an oath I took lightly, and I intend to keep it—no matter what. I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump. I won’t back down from doing my job. And I won’t be bullied into silence by the president and his political enforcers. name: Tobias Read
subject: We just defeated President Trump in court
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260117em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260117em-rs]
I have huge news — and I wanted you to hear it from me directly.
This week, a federal judge told the Trump administration to keep its hands off Oregonians’ most private voter data — no partial Social Security numbers, no driver’s license info, no fishing expedition into your personal life.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260117em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260117em-rs]
That didn’t happen by accident.
It happened because Oregon pushed back and said NO when Washington tried to bully us into breaking the law and betraying the public trust.
This is a big win for Oregonians’ privacy, our right to hold politicians accountable, and the rule of law. And we proved, once again, that when we fight back, we can win.
But the fight isn’t over. Authoritarians and wannabe kings like Donald Trump don’t stop because they lose once. They regroup, try again, and look for weaker targets.
That’s why this moment matters — and why what we do next matters even more.
As Secretary of State, my job is to protect Oregon’s elections, defend the law, and safeguard people’s rights — even when it means standing up to the most powerful forces in the country. I won’t back down, but I can’t do this alone.
If you believe voters’ private information should stay private and that the rule of law still, then I’m asking you to chip in today and help my campaign keep fighting for Oregonians. We’ve shown what’s possible when we stand up together. Now let’s make sure we have the resources to stay in this fight for the long haul. CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260117em-rs]
Thank you,
Tobias Read

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: This is how we win Texas
body:
What we do right now will determine what comes next for Texas.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
**What we do in this moment will determine what comes next for Texas.**
Right now, our government isn’t working for everyday Texans. It’s working for special interests, political insiders, and big money donors who don’t have to live with the consequences of their decisions.
**I’m running to change that. To build a Texas that fights for working families and puts our future in the hands of people who call this state home — not the wealthy few trying to control it.**
That’s _exactly_ why the other side is spending millions to stop us. The momentum we build right now will determine whether we can beat them.
**[Peter, I’m ready to take on Abbott and win. Will you make your first $5 donation to help turn the page on the status quo and fuel this people-powered campaign before our January 22 fundraising deadline?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260117_2_first.c6MVFm&refcode=em20260117-434&amount=5&t=2&akid=434%2E299639%2EWus_q3)**
I know what we’re up against, and I know what Texans are capable of when we refuse to back down. With people like you in this fight, big money doesn’t stand a chance.
I’m grateful to have you standing with me.
[**Pitch in $5 or anything you can to help us win.**](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260117_2_first.c6MVFm&refcode=em20260117-434&amount=5&t=3&akid=434%2E299639%2EWus_q3)
Thank you,
Gina

name: Matt Ortega
subject: The stakes couldn't be higher.
body:
The American people are looking to us. Are we still capable of achieving what is great? I say yes. | | | Friend, this afternoon I spoke at the California Democratic Party's pre-endorsement regional conference to seek their endorsement. I wanted to share with you some of my remarks before the delegates.
> _In a few months, our nation will celebrate 250 years since its founding. The ideals enshrined in those sacred documents still animate peoples in every corner of the globe. Yet once more here at home, we are met with another “long train of abuses and usurpations.”
>
> The stakes couldn’t be higher. This administration is a national security threat to the United States. Its continued existence imperils Americans greater than any danger we’ve faced since the Confederacy.
>
> The American people are looking to us. Will we rise to meet the moment as generations before us have? Our predecessors ended slavery, defeated fascism, and turned the moon from an object to a place. Are we still capable of achieving what is great?
>
> I say yes._
**[The full remarks as prepared are available here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVfEgxENmPXB_5m6MwOaqDcXPLdICpEbXjWmv3lk-BMrntN_wCl4xR5dTRue4pKaByemFrB_bX33-uyjx2gBz_fQVODqzc2MuHEwfs-vGamAeXdroFxrOtbHgarmZ-MPjL0GvsW2wLg8ID-qX2rDa3qTV3dR4ZGXjdngSC9g4WDF1dn_S4pYOEH_N0FQOYPx9YXFgvQSymP97g7E6_YGSYQr8soFHkNRqlGOkVr_NJwXBAjpo7nFAgfGpd4wVeEETPpr9MxzDlPDwGD9PlQ0u_FUaTVTWgOLfX8evhB-tSBfr/4ne/zTZbtFx_RT6c51wiPP8Duw/h0/h001.bf_-guGx4srvoBtKknHVX42MlzLhEv8-RkJDiVlt4po)** Thank you for your support in this campaign. Fighting for your family and mine, Matt

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: This is concerning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
www.politico.com/news/2025/12/07/sort-of-blackmail-billions-in-rural-health-funding-hinge-on-states-passing-trumps-policies-00679082 [www.politico.com/news/2025/12/07/sort-of-blackmail-billions-in-rural-health-funding-hinge-on-states-passing-trumps-policies-00679082]Hi friend,
I want to talk to you about an issue that strikes at the heart of life in Southern and Western Colorado: our rural hospitals, clinics, and healthcare system.
If you’re in a hurry, you can skip the longer read and support my campaign by contributing today » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-ak?]
When a rural hospital closes or a doctor moves out of town, it’s a big deal for our communities because these services provide a lifeline for so many of our neighbors. That’s why the news coming out of Washington is so concerning.
A recent Politico report [https://www.politico.com/news/2025/12/07/sort-of-blackmail-billions-in-rural-health-funding-hinge-on-states-passing-trumps-policies-00679082] laid out how the Trump administration is attaching political strings to billions in rural healthcare funding by giving states two options: change your laws to match my agenda, and maybe you’ll get more money. But if you refuse, you’ll lose out on your funding . It’s outrageous.
Policies that have nothing to do with rural healthcare are being used as bargaining chips. And if states don’t follow through on these demands within the next few years, Trump is threatening to claw back funding.
In Colorado, we have families whose livelihoods depend on the stability of our community health centers and clinics, not ideological experiments crafted in Washington. We have folks who already have to drive hours for basic healthcare services and rural hospitals that operate on thin margins.
Unlike Hurd, I won’t play games with people’s healthcare, and I won’t stay silent while Trump strong-arms our district into implementing policies that hurt our communities.

name: Dan Freeman (via Democrats.org)
subject: Legal update from the Democratic National Committee:
body:
---
Hi Derek, This is Dan Freeman, the DNC’s Litigation Director. I’m reaching out to give you an update on the legal work the DNC has done lately to protect the voting rights of every American. [**This is a long email, but it’s important to me that we keep you in the know. If you’ve already read about the DNC’s legal work and would like to chip in to help us keep going, you can do so here →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260117_5822_fr&refcode2=5822_22930333_KphXld&akid=5822%2E22930333%2EKphXld) **Here’s the bottom line: President Trump continues to weaponize the Department of Justice to attack our fundamental freedoms._We are taking action to stop him._** As President Trump and his allies continue to attack voting by mail, we filed an amicus brief in the Supreme Court that defends the rights of those who rely on mail-in voting to make their voices heard. We also put 10 states on notice who are being pressured to hand over sensitive, unredacted voter files to the DOJ. The Trump administration is demanding every registered voter’s driver’s license number, Social Security number, and party affiliation, and wants to tell states who should be allowed to vote. But states — not the DOJ — are in charge of voter registration lists, and ignoring protections against voter purges is a one-way ticket to a federal court. We are urging these states to reject the DOJ agreement, and we’re prepared to use every tool at our disposal to protect voters in these states and beyond. **Derek, here’s the deal: When President Trump and his administration refuse to defend Americans’ voting rights, or actively attempt to violate them, the Democratic National Committee is ready, willing, and able to stand up and defend the American people.** [**So if fighting the Trump administration is important to you, chip in $7 today. If making sure every vote is counted is important to you, chip in $7 today. If standing up for American democracy is important to you, chip in $7 today. Every bit counts, and we’re strongest when we stand up together.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260117_5822_fr&refcode2=5822_22930333_KphXld&akid=5822%2E22930333%2EKphXld) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260117_5822_fr&refcode2=5822_22930333_KphXld&akid=5822%2E22930333%2EKphXld)**

Dan

subject: Two weeks. One fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christian D
body:

Friend, For nearly a year, the people of TX-18 have been left without a voice in Congress. No vote. No advocate. No fighter at the table. That wasn’t an accident — it was a choice made by people who hoped you’d get tired, frustrated, and give up. But that’s not who we are. Now, with just two weeks left until the special election, this fight comes down to whether we finally finish what we started — or let political games keep our community sidelined any longer. [**If you’re able, will you chip in right now to help us cross the finish line and finally bring representation back to TX-18?**](https://menefee4.us/l/0G5yBBgxiNDS)
---

This campaign hasn’t been easy. It’s been delayed, dragged out, and tested at every turn. But every delay only made one thing clearer to me — **this seat matters, and the people trying to stall it know exactly why.** **I’ve spent my career taking on powerful interests, standing up to polluters, and holding scammers accountable. I am more than ready to take that fight to Washington.**

I’m running for Congress for the same reason: TX-18 deserves representation that doesn’t back down. Thank you,

Christian Menefee

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72615?t=3&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce) Listen, the 16-year anniversary of the disastrous _Citizens United_ ruling is DAYS AWAY...

But before we tell you JUST HOW DIRE things have gotten, we need to be totally blunt: [ **dpwillis67@gmail.com, we need you to step up and chip in $16 for our efforts to OVERTURN _Citizens United_ once and for all. We set a $16,000 fundraising goal for 16 years of _Citizens United,_ and we cannot miss this goal ahead of this HEARTBREAKING anniversary! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72615?t=4&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce) | | [DONATE $16 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72597?amount=16&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=5&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce)

Here’s the current situation:
* 16 years ago, Republican SCOTUS Justices ruled that _corporations are people._ (Yes, you read that right!)

* Their decision then paved the way for BILLIONS in Dark Money to flood our elections... [**_Trump NEVER would have won without Dark Money support!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72615?t=11&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce)

* And now our elections are decided by Billionaire Donors and Corporate Dark Money instead of normal people.

LISTEN, here at Fight for Reform, we’re dedicated to passing the Constitutional Amendment that will overturn _Citizens United._

[But our campaign costs money, and point blank: ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72615?t=12&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce)[**we’re running out.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72615?t=13&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce)

[**We’re relying on our top, most dedicated supporters like you, dpwillis67@gmail.com.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72615?t=14&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce)
[ **So please, help us meet our midnight goal of raising $16,000 ahead of the anniversary of this horrific decision. Chip in $16 right away >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72615?t=15&akid=23835%2E4449941%2EJ8Ibce)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22646%2E878179%2EQV9_Iu). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22646%2E878179%2EQV9_Iu).**

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I tried to mail this to your house:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
clean_body: I tried to mail this to your house, Peter - but I never heard back from you. It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm sending this message directly to your inbox because you are one of our top Patriots in your state. I know this is longer than our usual messages, but please take a moment to read it from start to finish - and please don't forget to Thank you for everything you do. \- Steve Scalise ORIGINAL MESSAGEPATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION SURVEY You have been selected to participate in this important nationwide PATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION survey project. I offered to conduct this project as part of our Republican Party's mission to ensure that every single patriotic American citizen is registered to vote and fully empowered to guide our nation's future. Your record stands out as a proud American, law-abiding taxpayer, and a registered voter living in: your state. Please ensure our records are as accurate as possible by completing the VERIFICATION SURVEY below. You are identified as a loyal patriot, so I am really counting on your prompt response. This project's results will be incomplete if we don't hear from you. And frankly, with everything at stake, your voice is urgently needed in our country's system of self-government. As House Majority Leader, I am proud of everything I am doing to help President Trump enact his America First agenda. And I will not stop. Not ever. But the Democrats are spreading lies about the policies and getting their base of supporters riled up. We've already seen left-wing "resistance" activists in communities across the country (including near your part of your state). And we are seeing Democrat Party committees and liberal PACs smashing fundraising records. All due to anti-Trump hatred. If loyal patriots can't organize and mobilize on our own, the Woke Democrats will take back power and shut down our MAGA agenda. And they will spend President Trump's final two years in office attacking him with more Witch Hunts and impeachment drives. That is why your immediate response is so important, Peter. I was honored to be selected by my colleagues to serve as Majority Leader. But I do not lead "from the top down." I listen to the grassroots . . . to patriotic men and women like you who love our country, share my conservative values, and want the best for our kids and grandkids. And I am confident that the best way to strengthen our movement - and score big victories at the polls in 2026 - is by continuing to work shoulder to shoulder with you and other caring citizens. To defeat the Woke Left and pass the rest of President Trump's MAGA agenda, we'll need REAL Americans to vote in large numbers. And we'll need them to cast informed votes. That means pushing back against left-wing propaganda at every turn through next November. So please complete your VERIFICATION SURVEY and submit it TODAY. And when you respond, I urge you to include one important gift of $250, $100, $50, $35, or any amount you can spare to my campaign. As I push the Trump Agenda through the House, forcing tough, narrow votes and speaking up for facts and the truth, I am coming under relentless attack from the left-wing campaign machine. So please complete our voter verification survey as soon as possible. And don't forget to include your important gift of $250, $100, $50, or $35. Every dollar will fuel my fight to pass more pro-America policies and mobilize a surge of MAGA voters to the polls next year. Thank you and God bless! Steve ScaliseHouse Majority Leader Q1. Are you a registered voter in your state?. Do you intend to vote in the 2026 midterm elections?. Did you vote in person in the 2024 presidential election?. Do you want your state's law enforcement officials to cooperate with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), when it comes to detaining illegal aliens? - HOW IMPORTANT IS IT THAT YOUR PUBLIC OFFICIALS WORK TO: 1\. Secure the border.\. Protect parents' rights.\. Cut the debt.\. Stop socialism. \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:| | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 |

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: She came looking for help You gave her hope
body:
Every day, women across America search online for answers.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv4s3qt4edln0g6471ed85noq68hgbrbcrfdvt48_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj6ao74cdh2bs)
---
Hi Advocate for Life, Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. That’s where **PreBorn!** steps in. Our Network Clinics across the nation provide **free ultrasounds** , **holistic** **compassionate care** , and the **gospel of Jesus Christ** to women in crisis. Because when a mother sees her baby for the first time, when she hears that heartbeat, everything changes. In fact, 81% of women who receive an ultrasound, can see their baby and hear the heartbeat, will choose life for their babies. And your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and gives her the chance to meet her baby and hear of God’s love for her. As our thank-you, we’ll send you PreBorn!’s [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures_ 2026**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziold7j967tti7c2h1rjmikmbrtss30k4grtlg6g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj6ao74cdh2bs) Calendar — a celebration of the lives your gift helps save and the futures your faith helps build. Inside, you’ll also find a **monthly prayer guide** to keep you connected to this mission all year long.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z35bh90qfhoh482vpi7nrphrojnbtk4i1d9tl0h0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj6ao74cdh2bs)
---
Supplies are limited so give today to help reach the next mother before she’s too late to hear her baby’s heartbeat.
---
[**Give $28 to Save 1 Baby + Get Your Calendar** >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv71i8jh84rqm7c3uevh0f4vau1cgfeav5ce1kmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj6ao74cdh2bs)
---
Thank you for giving hope where it’s needed most. Gratefully, The PreBorn! Team

# **[Judges now veto Trump prosecutors after the Senate stalls confirmations](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/ITFq-yWLQSKRwigrTDjh1Q)**
---
One of the core executive powers is the authority to prosecute criminals. Article II of the Constitution assigns “the executive power” — all of it — to the president of the United States. In practice, the power to execute the laws against those who have violated them is delegated by the president to the attorney general, the Department of Justice she heads, and the 93 U.S. attorneys spread across the country.Yet since he took office for the second time last January, President Trump and his attorney general, Pam Bondi, have had a heck of a time getting their people in place. body:
Help us keep the momentum going!

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg0og1b63741o94f0m3t9uqr186evj14bqdkbh3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj69ob4cjh2bs)
Friend,

One year ago, we watched as **President Donald J. Trump** took the oath of office for the second time, reclaiming our country and putting **America First once again.**

Since that historic day, he hasn't wasted a single minute. From securing the border and ending **" catch-and-release"** to passing the **One Big Beautiful Bill** and gutting the bureaucratic **" Deep State,"** the President has fought for us every single day.
[SIGN THE YEAR ONE THANK YOU CARD >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlv3dap3sfpn1vhcbvdmus1a0o24o515ufr8m2u8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj69ob4cjh2bs)
But as he fights for us, the **[Radical Left is fighting him.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl3g20dd2a4nsl8tec0u223h207p92j3ghj4usrg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj69ob4cjh2bs)** They HATE his success, and they HATE the movement we've built together.

We are launching a massive **[Year One Thank You Card](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1vdtrcut1r459c63026cccm3cebitvsj9nei20o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj69ob4cjh2bs)** to show Trump that no matter what the Left says, we stand with him **ALWAYS**.

We want President Trump to see _**thousands of names**_ --the names of the men and women he represents--standing firmly behind him as he enters Year Two. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zati7h7kac244rpmgiuuf4p147f4s8vvtgs88k60_rp22sh2s8i6eor0stj69ob4cjh2bs)

name: Tiny middle finger
subject: Trump and Boebert to workers: F*** you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Trump has built his entire political career off this dog and pony show, promising to champion the causes of working people in front crowds and cameras on the campaign trail, only to give them the midd
| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However [if you'd like to unsubscribe,](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sen_kckKPX2nqEWndNcipenKIJcOmLK18YZaRR_7dCsU-8a3-S-u3Ef9wnoOKuzbJ1FEAMbtlE3fTlDYQ43QfwRa2k7QbsjBd-ev7qzjySKEbiEoqTtAUuk77LBOh7OSnhhlv7df0GmKehhIncj3UAjNegoGTpFyL1fUoBPurvWuz0LRbazqU-JVStSuCxNj7XQ6hqAXCLY=&c=YKwlY0XxasFDAFJP0HSI63gEUWGA5cLeNlIiFs_AHtlsSiBBjD5sww==&ch=nlm2PxFCahlQEuUpc3RCNP8b8PUFAc-vCStUcC2XUEalBc4rXKGueA==) you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sen_kckKPX2nqEWndNcipenKIJcOmLK18YZaRR_7dCsU-8a3-S-u3EoX8sM8BXlqFENBZ25idUU7nBuUJ6s_ynx3xL4Y6cqBIxxgJAIk6mDZMe5lqj9fT5BqDRcO2meukx_ARJM5OUgc1b_WMk1RFcZhDzFhNTNwk7nKG9o2lm2_vkXRA9Lyf3PYTTALxYpSJAeIPuDPaByk9ho_xU7F6y-MFSSJUtPEDsiCaSj55P4=&c=YKwlY0XxasFDAFJP0HSI63gEUWGA5cLeNlIiFs_AHtlsSiBBjD5sww==&ch=nlm2PxFCahlQEuUpc3RCNP8b8PUFAc-vCStUcC2XUEalBc4rXKGueA==)
---
| Peter,
Donald Trump just gave the middle finger to workers... literally.
While touring a Ford plant in Detroit, Michigan yesterday afternoon, Trump was heckled by a worker who shouted "pedophile protector" as he walked by. Trump responded with the perfect epitome of how MAGA really feels about workers:
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sen_kckKPX2nqEWndNcipenKIJcOmLK18YZaRR_7dCsU-8a3-S-u3EoX8sM8BXlqFENBZ25idUU7nBuUJ6s_ynx3xL4Y6cqBIxxgJAIk6mDZMe5lqj9fT5BqDRcO2meukx_ARJM5OUgc1b_WMk1RFcZhDzFhNTNwk7nKG9o2lm2_vkXRA9Lyf3PYTTALxYpSJAeIPuDPaByk9ho_xU7F68JWhbnvcrLOPPTuZrQIgSw=&c=YKwlY0XxasFDAFJP0HSI63gEUWGA5cLeNlIiFs_AHtlsSiBBjD5sww==&ch=nlm2PxFCahlQEuUpc3RCNP8b8PUFAc-vCStUcC2XUEalBc4rXKGueA==)
---
Trump and MAGA have zero respect for working people.
Trump has built his entire political career off this dog and pony show, promising to champion the causes of working people in front crowds and cameras on the campaign trail, only to give them a tiny middle finger once he gets into power.
Cutting healthcare, dismantling the National Labor Relations Board, attacking unions, destroying domestic manufacturing and farmers with his tariff policies, and all while simultaneously lining the pockets of his billionaire buddies.
It's why under Trump, billionaires can get tax write-offs for their private jets but blue collar workers can't for their steel toed boots.
My opponent Lauren Boebert voted for that. She talks a big game about labor too, but shows the same disdain for working people. She's voted time and time again with Trump to screw over the working class and give them the middle finger:
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sen_kckKPX2nqEWndNcipenKIJcOmLK18YZaRR_7dCsU-8a3-S-u3EoX8sM8BXlqFENBZ25idUU7nBuUJ6s_ynx3xL4Y6cqBIxxgJAIk6mDZMe5lqj9fT5BqDRcO2meukx_ARJM5OUgc1b_WMk1RFcZhDzFhNTNwk7nKG9o2lm2_vkXRA9Lyf3PYTTALxYpSJAeIPuDPaByk9ho_xU7F6y2AMAwcFmsYbCRAvwC3aio=&c=YKwlY0XxasFDAFJP0HSI63gEUWGA5cLeNlIiFs_AHtlsSiBBjD5sww==&ch=nlm2PxFCahlQEuUpc3RCNP8b8PUFAc-vCStUcC2XUEalBc4rXKGueA==)
---
Boebert giving the middle finger to workers at Buell Theater back in 2023 when she was removed from a performance of "Beetlejuice" for vaping and groping her boyfriend in front of families and children in a packed theater.
---
That's why she's more vulnerable than she has ever been. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when I faced Boebert, our campaign overperformed VP Kamala Harris by nearly seven points. Now our campaign just outraised her by over a million dollars.
Working with America's unions at the national AFL-CIO, I was in the trenches fighting for working families every single day. That fight did not end when I launched this campaign. It is why I am running on a bold, unapologetic economic populist platform that puts working people first with real solutions, not empty promises.
[I am running to bring working people back to the center of power in Washington. But Boebert is being propped up by billionaires and corporate money that want to keep things rigged. We can beat them, but only if we stand together. Will you chip in $25, $15, or whatever you can right now to help us defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sen_kckKPX2nqEWndNcipenKIJcOmLK18YZaRR_7dCsU-8a3-S-u3EoX8sM8BXlqxNdGZoc1Ccwid3aoIYgUNA5T7Jme2II1Un7hik7Y6VBql1NUYqA4BYMThiN_g0cqWndSZlbRwqByUXmdljd10nf6zREL2NgRV9Sng-O9rDhQveX8KFVTw1rLTKhZWDn-RHbV9BSbFKe7OAkZ3b94P8OOCTsMlYhQBAxKaEKehCrKJT1vTK0p2A==&c=YKwlY0XxasFDAFJP0HSI63gEUWGA5cLeNlIiFs_AHtlsSiBBjD5sww==&ch=nlm2PxFCahlQEuUpc3RCNP8b8PUFAc-vCStUcC2XUEalBc4rXKGueA==)
---

Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However == you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | | == | Peter, Donald Trump just gave the middle finger to workers... literally. While touring a Ford plant in Detroit, Michigan yesterday afternoon, Trump was heckled by a worker who shouted "pedophile protector" as he walked by. Trump responded with the perfect epitome of how MAGA really feels about workers: | == Trump and MAGA have zero respect for working people. Trump has built his entire political career off this dog and pony show, promising to champion the causes of working people in front crowds and cameras on the campaign trail, only to give them a tiny middle finger once he gets into power. Cutting healthcare, dismantling the National Labor Relations Board, attacking unions, destroying domestic manufacturing and farmers with his tariff policies, and all while simultaneously lining the pockets of his billionaire buddies. It's why under Trump, billionaires can get tax write-offs for their private jets but blue collar workers can't for their steel toed boots. My opponent Lauren Boebert voted for that. She talks a big game about labor too, but shows the same disdain for working people. She's voted time and time again with Trump to screw over the working class and give them the middle finger: | == Boebert giving the middle finger to workers at Buell Theater back in 2023 when she was removed from a performance of "Beetlejuice" for vaping and groping her boyfriend in front of families and children in a packed theater. That's why she's more vulnerable than she has ever been. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when I faced Boebert, our campaign overperformed VP Kamala Harris by nearly seven points. Now our campaign just outraised her by over a million dollars. Working with America's unions at the national AFL-CIO, I was in the trenches fighting for working families every single day. That fight did not end when I launched this campaign. It is why I am running on a bold, unapologetic economic populist platform that puts working people first with real solutions, not empty promises. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | In solidarity, Trisha Calvarese | == Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th Congressional District. Trisha is a labor leader, federal public servant, and native daughter of the district. body:

| Peter,
The first major election of the year isn't getting enough attention from the media or Democrats.
On April 7th of this year, MAGA is desperately hoping to win a rubber match in the upcoming Wisconsin state Supreme Court race.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s8xSYGX1oa87PgmKjRveWtD5fI7uzZSxIlSBn91tx8EC3TgYmUEEVgcH_dsji9jkdDHk_Oo0SrbJKCXY0twQJUjuZKng5W723HWp43DQgJOuPR4zQpRAayXnTAHnmXFT_cmtrqXoXLpKtFGiJS9rWyz2lTqsX0Scex5ea0jRmGus7KoJlk1D1TjMqOgPQ1HlbXUjE2sgVsrGIyGjLN94KiFmnFFHEpkJMZPq1JtPTme648RIF-KbJQ==&c=wm8r5G00_eQDxWZCVH2ymwpNW6vV-9ZCRq-3sK47Ou0HSuICw4xrOQ==&ch=ZwizfPup5PA1hpzt0Hp8ubweVv8NYPxyV9hj75SasCQ8kkYCi1YsdQ==)
---
This is a must-win for MAGA. After last year's massive win for Democrats, they now hold a 4-3 majority on the WI court. With a seat up for grabs this year, Democrats now have a chance to expand their majority to 5-2.
And more importantly, a win this April would lock down the court for Democrats until at least 2030, securing a key swing state court for the rest of Trump's presidency.
In 2025, Trump and MAGA attempted coups at the state level in Wisconsin and Pennsylvania. If they had seized control of those state Supreme Courts, they would have gained control over the body that has final say on election laws/results, allowing them to rig elections in these crucial states in their favor in 2026 and 2028.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s8xSYGX1oa87PgmKjRveWtD5fI7uzZSxIlSBn91tx8EC3TgYmUEEVgcH_dsji9jkdDHk_Oo0SrbJKCXY0twQJUjuZKng5W723HWp43DQgJOuPR4zQpRAayXnTAHnmXFT_cmtrqXoXLpKtFGiJS9rWyz2lTqsX0Scex5ea0jRmGus7KoJlk1D1TjMqOgPQ1HlbXUjE2sgVsrGIyGjLN94KiFmnFFHEpkJlXNAvyGGNPk3gWPs9lMoDA==&c=wm8r5G00_eQDxWZCVH2ymwpNW6vV-9ZCRq-3sK47Ou0HSuICw4xrOQ==&ch=ZwizfPup5PA1hpzt0Hp8ubweVv8NYPxyV9hj75SasCQ8kkYCi1YsdQ==)
---
The stakes in the PA Supreme Court race were existential for Democrats' 2028 hopes. But we rallied and won a decisive victory. We need the same energy in the upcoming WI race.
---

In PA, Defend Our Courts helped lead the defense of the liberal majority on the court. Despite millions of dollars spent by MAGA to try and take the court, Pennsylvanians turned out in record numbers and handed Democrats a 30+ point blowout victory.
In Philadelphia, where we concentrated much of our voter outreach along with digital and TV ads, turnout surged by 34%. That was the largest increase in the state.
We defended the PA court and kept the Democrats' 2028 chances alive. Now we're going on the offensive in Wisconsin to secure Dems' path back to the White House.
But we're seriously concerned this race could fly under the radar and MAGA could catch Dems completely off guard. We have to get started now. We emptied our warchest in PA and now we only have 4 months to prepare for WI. We must win this race to secure Dems' path back to the White House. So we're rallying Democrats again:

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | NASA deployed | Powered by AI chips from a company you’ve probably never heard of. # IN YOUR WEEKLY BULLETIN:
---
|
---
| |
When public officials evade scrutiny, the consequences don’t stay confined to council chambers or press statements. This week’s _Sunday Bulletin_ examines what happens when accountability is deflected, transparency is denied, and taxpayers are left asking whether the rules apply equally to everyone. From unanswered questions in Delaware County to the accelerating cost of living across Pennsylvania, these stories trace the widening gap between those in power and the public they serve.
**INVESTIGATIVE:** Delaware County officials — including council president Richard Womack — are declining to answer basic questions about significant property tax delinquencies, even as county taxes have surged more than 50 percent in just three years. The reporting raises urgent concerns about fairness, enforcement, and whether elected leaders are being held to the same standards as ordinary homeowners.
**POLITICS:** Pennsylvania Treasurer Stacy Garrity has formally entered the 2026 governor’s race with a sharp critique of Governor Josh Shapiro, accusing him of settling for mediocrity and putting national attention ahead of the Commonwealth. Her remarks signal the opening salvo of a high-stakes political fight over Pennsylvania’s future.
**REGIONAL NEWS:** From a fatal shooting in Lansdale and a stabbing aboard a SEPTA bus to questions of leadership and responsibility at the local level, this week’s regional coverage underscores how public safety, governance, and accountability intersect in communities across southeastern Pennsylvania.
**FROM THE EDITORS:** The collapse of the _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ marks more than the end of a historic newspaper. It represents a warning sign for civic life itself — and a reminder that a healthy democracy depends on robust, independent journalism willing to ask uncomfortable questions.
**OPINION & ANALYSIS:** Our columnists examine why Pennsylvanians are paying the highest school taxes in the state, challenge Washington’s push to expand Obamacare subsidies amid rising costs, and explore what voters actually want from leaders as economic pressure continues to mount.

---

### Set one alarm. Place one order. Share one message. Let's make "Service & Sacrifice" impossible to ignore.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Jan 18

Let me start with a controversial statement: **" Liberty and Justice for All" should be real.**
Still with me? Good. You're in the right place.
Last Wednesday, January 14th, was my 34th birthday. My friend laughed at me when I told her about my "birthday accomplishment": submitting the manuscript for the book of my husband's life story.
From you, there's only one thing I'm asking for--something that protects families, honors the Constitution, and helps keep America from forgetting who it is.
### Bottom line up front: here's the birthday ask
1. **Order the book** ([Amazon](https://substack.com/redirect/8587120f-3ed3-4528-b080-036925f6f624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [Metalabel](https://substack.com/redirect/07c36b95-51fd-450e-9a93-36d93603de6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--both appreciated).
2. **Share the prewritten text below** with a few friends or group chats.

This matters because on Amazon's platform _**early orders drive discoverability**_**.**
And discoverability is how truth survives.
* * *
## Why I'm doing this
My husband, Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, is a disabled American soldier. He served honorably. He swore the Soldier's Oath--support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic--and he treated that oath as binding.
For twenty-five years, he lived in Washington State building a life of service: helping neighbors, mentoring youth, counseling people in crisis, standing for peace, quietly making the world more decent. He did not come to this country to take. He came to contribute--to belong--believing, with a kind of luminous sincerity, in the best of America.
And then, in the moment he appeared for a citizenship appointment--paperwork that should have simply matched reality--**the state used the appointment as a noose.** He was abducted by ICE. Disappeared into detention. Held in conditions that should shame a republic.
Our children are toddlers. They learned what it means to talk to their father through glass.
If you've ever wondered how a nation slides--how "procedure" becomes cruelty, how bureaucratic language becomes a weapon, how a family can be shattered by administrative decisions made in secret--this is that story.
But it's not only a story of harm.
It's a story of what holds.
Of a man who refused to be recruited into wrongdoing even when it would have benefited him. Of a family and a community that refused to surrender to intimidation. Of the Constitution--tested, strained, and still, when forced into daylight, capable of sustaining justice.
This book is a love story. A civic reckoning. And a public record that cannot be erased.
* * *
## Amazon vs. Metalabel
I'm offering two ways to order; please choose what you prefer:
* **[Metalabel](https://substack.com/redirect/07c36b95-51fd-450e-9a93-36d93603de6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) supports our family more directly** (financially).
* **[Amazon](https://substack.com/redirect/8587120f-3ed3-4528-b080-036925f6f624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) orders help rankings and spread the word faster**, which is how this story reaches the world.

If you're choosing based on impact: **we have about a 65% preference for Amazon** (for reach), and a **35% preference for Metalabel** (for direct support). Either way: _**thank you.**_
* * *
## Copy-paste text to share (send to friends + group chats)
Here's a message you can drop into Signal/WhatsApp/Telegram/text/email:
> **Activist ask (easy + meaningful):**
> Please order **Service and Sacrifice: The Untold Story of Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry** -- _One American Soldier 's Fight to Defend the Constitution._
> It's the true story of a disabled U.S. Army veteran taken by ICE at a citizenship appointment, a family forced to fight US Attorney General Pam Bondi pro se, and a community refusing to let the Republic forget its own ideals.
> **Amazon (best for reach/rankings):** [https://a.co/d/5NN3vcA](https://substack.com/redirect/8587120f-3ed3-4528-b080-036925f6f624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
> **Metalabel (supports the family directly):** [https://melissachaudhry.metalabel.com/serviceandsacrifice-zahidchaudhry](https://substack.com/redirect/07c36b95-51fd-450e-9a93-36d93603de6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
> If you can: order + share this with one more person (or many!). Thank you. 🇺🇸
* * *
## One more thing
If you've followed our family's story, you already know this isn't abstract.
This is about whether the Constitution is real in the lives of ordinary people.
It's about whether "liberty and justice for all" is a promise, or a slogan we recite while our neighbors disappear.
So for my birthday: help us launch this book like a flare in the dark.
**Place the order. Share the text.**
And let's make sure this record lives.
With love and fire,
--Melissa

clean_body: Set one alarm. Place one order. Share one message. Let's make "Service & Sacrifice" impossible to ignore. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Set one alarm. Place one order. Share one message. Let's make "Service & Sacrifice" impossible to ignore. | | | Jan 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | Let me start with a controversial statement: " Liberty and Justice for All" should be real. Still with me? Good. You're in the right place. Last Wednesday, January 14th, was my 34th birthday. My friend laughed at me when I told her about my "birthday accomplishment": submitting the manuscript for the book of my husband's life story. From you, there's only one thing I'm asking for--something that protects families, honors the Constitution, and helps keep America from forgetting who it is. Bottom line up front: here's the birthday ask 1. Order the book ( or appreciated). 2. Share the prewritten text below with a few friends or group chats. This matters because on Amazon's platform early orders drive discoverability. And discoverability is how truth survives. Why I'm doing this My husband, Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, is a disabled American soldier. He served honorably. He swore the Soldier's Oath--support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic--and he treated that oath as binding. For twenty-five years, he lived in Washington State building a life of service: helping neighbors, mentoring youth, counseling people in crisis, standing for peace, quietly making the world more decent. He did not come to this country to take. He came to contribute--to belong--believing, with a kind of luminous sincerity, in the best of America. And then, in the moment he appeared for a citizenship appointment--paperwork that should have simply matched reality--the state used the appointment as a noose. He was abducted by ICE. Disappeared into detention. Held in conditions that should shame a republic. Our children are toddlers. They learned what it means to talk to their father through glass. If you've ever wondered how a nation slides--how "procedure" becomes cruelty, how bureaucratic language becomes a weapon, how a family can be shattered by administrative decisions made in secret--this is that story. But it's not only a story of harm. It's a story of what holds. Of a man who refused to be recruited into wrongdoing even when it would have benefited him. Of a family and a community that refused to surrender to intimidation. Of the Constitution--tested, strained, and still, when forced into daylight, capable of sustaining justice. This book is a love story. A civic reckoning. And a public record that cannot be erased. Amazon vs. Metalabel I'm offering two ways to order; please choose what you prefer: supports our family more directly (financially). orders help rankings and spread the word faster, which is how this story reaches the world. If you're choosing based on impact: we have about a 65% preference for Amazon (for reach), and a 35% preference for Metalabel (for direct support). Either way: thank you. Copy-paste text to share (send to friends + group chats) Here's a message you can drop into Signal/WhatsApp/Telegram/text/email: Activist ask (easy + meaningful): Please order Service and Sacrifice: The Untold Story of Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry -- One American Soldier 's Fight to Defend the Constitution. It's the true story of a disabled U.S. Army veteran taken by ICE at a citizenship appointment, a family forced to fight US Attorney General Pam Bondi pro se, and a community refusing to let the Republic forget its own ideals. Amazon (best for reach/rankings): Metalabel (supports the family directly): If you can: order + share this with one more person (or many!). Thank you. 🇺🇸 One more thing If you've followed our family's story, you already know this isn't abstract. This is about whether the Constitution is real in the lives of ordinary people. It's about whether "liberty and justice for all" is a promise, or a slogan we recite while our neighbors disappear. So for my birthday: help us launch this book like a flare in the dark. Place the order. Share the text. And let's make sure this record lives. With love and fire, --Melissa | | ---|---|--- You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. Tim Walz (D) and Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey (D), accusing them of impeding federal immigration enforcement through public statements they have made.

# Sunday, January 18, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1803, President Thomas Jefferson requested $2,500 from Congress to fund the [Lewis and Clark](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAUheGnsTsswNgmBcU27rLtlhaBS3yzmOsBEo_ffpTRvMHUv3T06fy7LleLEdP9r93A1EBLgqNEqBXy4umxZ7pB2TAlKFRtoheVSovkcmRcMKEXbzGei2q9CQAS-haMmEY99UrpS7uaoK3q--DGYRiD0zc1qov1QfbKO-05tGjea1wILQTXfOr80Dsr3KgufrDAZaM4eKyUuwdhqiuEeNILcudoa6NZa91L0_9p5NzI-TiObsVSKZ_v3si5rliYtyfDxH5KI-cHhAC5UGIZPp5QamHhmTymOwuUWYQDC7PJMxdt_s_gc38bkFKbjd8PjBHLODWK3zeL8ZtSf_Xfy8ivAAAA__-bVYkL) expedition. A vast area of the land the expedition surveyed and explored eventually became part of the Louisiana Purchase. Few TV characters endured the career arc of Arthur "Fonzie" Fonzarelli, who began as a supporting cast member on the 1970s sitcom _Happy Days._ "The Fonz" became the show's unquestioned centerpiece before eventually "jumping the shark" both literally and figuratively. Learn more about the career of actor Henry Winkler in today's [_Whatever Happened To..._](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1q8zAUxvGrkbcYfVmSBw0vvARKSSl06Ghk6ThWkH2CdWKTuy_pLXR9HvgN_-_LcAm55PX6ERbwNOGwwlELEME2JLzdNxyhLnldoSKFFXeshIPk0py4OAk3pJDLc9BN8hOABNWAF9Y4q7R2fTN7x7Uz0lmhwXRTjJarycbJ6D6MsuvHJvuXxoVwQnDHbZs6FYOIRvepC8Al0xxSJtzaG-aVZpjKE3fY2ohLU_xMdK9M_WPyzOT5OI72iQ96jPD6X0ugODN13pn6_57knD6_al_fms2n-5FLydVYpvl1Cbn8kvSnDruXPwEAAP__UwFxgA) segment. Today's sponsor, [FinanceBuzz](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwVss_h8M9sBQqfKWrh0RMT8JKTYRoLh5-8rtI3S9T7qT7vNszy6muF0_3EqmhWw32mui1qhYn--Pki9U17htVHNzW37m2rJFjurE4QSj9S6ml5WdN4EISXRkQKtRCynHqbsZp0ficlADXJRfwPMJEbiYJC2T9hq6aI42DjAC8JHr3g9icbAoOfnBEUcmOfnYcunvOW7tRiG98pNKv-S1S-bW2qMy8cZwZjjv-96_yncrXwcznF0IdmFiziFQsdEz8Y4SFDJUB_0FHLArxj_2mFKsSjPJr6uL6Xei_euXp8GfAAAA__-i-XUR), is highlighting a simple way Amazon Prime shoppers can earn serious cash back and score a valuable Amazon bonus--just for getting approved, with no extra spending required.

## DOJ Issues Subpoenas for Minnesota Officials
The Department of Justice on Friday [issued subpoenas](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdET-w0Dh4jZ0ue2WyOAhTGQ8yJ4kytuvssW-wNbn6Bx939d1vgZMmG__wwGeN5ozvGoCZihzpPtZaIF6YM5QiUOmJ1WmWUvtWqlaNcwxYHrPtol-A9BgGvCqd0NvrB3GZvebMtJoZdyi3bI46DcDI3RrXDtpR6cb9J81qdSglBxkf4mdWYNanR1jF0BqYSVEZCqXO2HmHbb0pieUy0pHk_zOfFZh_gk9CT3xDjum9MmEngrcHikwUhZ6WulRuF0Cc4Iq9NS50Tg7tL90LW0brhhSbSPd2_pYToIcPt2m-Hi-MCWsrhdW3o6APycN_8na0-vvAAAA__-JQoJ3) for Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D) and Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey (D), accusing them of impeding federal immigration enforcement through public statements they have made. The investigation comes during a weekslong immigration crackdown in Minneapolis and St. Paul in which the Department of Homeland Security has made [more than 2,500 arrests](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOiKPMcYULrZJl223RMN4SCZrbGSsRPn7J17xfuCVV1e6uuf8u803lCjp_hc39nXNc-L3EblWLnPIz73khY9NUuIjV0z5lY-aZ6207RR04OaAEj-zaYNfmTX3LXsYrRt7Y9zUPjxNBDAOZI0dDDKSxmWkHpzD3toRWvHnmgJwAMqp8RKGnhDImikMyEo3RnGQmsvlmSXVB6_xk19cLpS3NvpHrfvR9H8afW30FfcT4KzOUKpQ5EZffwg62Ta5F6ySU0cF6X_I79TpgY2dQK1EVq_LOuDSG5jUgOvkJqC2-LC_JUY57NgYdd9Q4veB-itrL6-_AgAA__8VIIEA). Part of the focus has been on a growing welfare fraud scandal involving some members of the state's Somali community. [Frey described the report](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupDAMgOHThM6jJDAMFBTb0L1tt0QhMYxHSYwS74zY0694V3idJUu_9fnP1_LlKFLef7uEk2y8ZPzUiCJYlsCvo_CKNVHOWFlc5jdX4cVq24M2YIYlOIrn0jVh2hAttg1O5tEPj7brhrF5Tt0wjsZtYxhWu95x1WHtjW37bmu933rf0HTVtDGDMXrQj1u4t94Z33djuDvUVnUaAwmX24spyxO3ePIby81zauL0FDmqan8pOys75_PgKtdK2fkKKztro-xsrulvhcun7Bz4BReO8g5CCT4u_oNvpzs4UoXkTi7wcp5X2AqecJ0EFyPuGMBzrgcV508QBkoHBgRKifbihDiD2zFLhYIHF1F2bsoUjg_FSLV_qE7vyVH8FsiP3v6e7P8AAAD__7EommU) of an investigation as "an obvious attempt to intimidate." As of Thursday, [ICE held about 73,000 individuals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OnDAURJ_GdEb-A3sLF2noNm1KZOzLclfGF2Fn0b59RF7h60YaaUbn_HnOz4AZy-t32MG3leYCV83QGpxzovdx0gJ1x1KgUguFPlQbzUqokQvJpZtTwPydTZf8CqBAd-ClHZ3VxrhHt3mtnY2j09HpZdH6MUYxiiGAXYx1qxk69PeakNJJKZywfRp0DDKO5pGGAEIxIyBho7N_E5a2wZq_9IGzj7R32W-tHZXpX0xNTE3XdfVxqTfF3TM13ZGpCSNUnqAFLAD8oONvDg2p8BMinYlv-No4rdxqIQRTU3f6dFyYM9bRMiNee8D8_7L9yNPHq38BAAD__zoZfNU) facing deportation in its custody across the country, the highest level recorded by the agency in its 23-year history.
## House Probing Omar's $30 Million Net Worth
The House Oversight Committee is probing Minnesota Rep. Ilhan Omar (D), who [reported a net worth of close to $30 million](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGypCAURVeDGV2AqPyAYBKyP-mEFsqz5TfyHHja5e6n7C1MfKtO3XP-fI_fPqaYn7_9BpYWHDO8awIiKGPAn73gBHWLOUNF8hlPrISjEqrnQnJpxuBjukbdBLsAKGgbsHLozdBqbb6a1c4SFtGKzocgJtW13kwG2m6e-n7SRs9NtDdNSGmkFEYMj9C1s5dzr79C50EopgWESFgePxgzrbCkC08ojxm3JtmVaK-s_cWUY8rla8dK98SUu8FMOSGZcnJgyh2V335MuRWPCvyjxwn5kYs_IfHtqgTl4rjw-vfwgRfYeUyrzxw3Xyqvr6vg_AKK-cnf4BOtTLmm2LC_Y0qx9gPT4rn5mD7_6L-inlb9CwAA__-zVY1U) in her latest financial disclosure. The Minnesota lawmaker and her husband, Tim Mynett, experienced a roughly 3,500% increase in net worth last year, compared to 2023, according to [the disclosure.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OszAQAJ_GdCB7MX-Fi6-hy9deiYy9hM0ZL7Idorz9KfcK149mpPm6LTdLgeL9vz3QlI2XiK8csBRMi-fHmXjFfFCMmLnYyBfnwgtI6GupajUu3lJ4L7ryZkMEbCs0aujHodV6nKrduMHDplc3jd6vvWyVlmpSutMtut5qrMh8bFKpUSk5yqHxXeuscr2efGdRgtASPRVOzYMplh238OYLU-P4qILZSzmzaP8JmAXMnrILnJ8Jc-0Cpu9m52fG5s6XgPl8roHc8oEEzBtFGx3ZUJ9-ywJmkKAFzErKftSqa06_Vcn480UhUO4HoeX9sBR-y-VPuy4DPwEAAP__xvh-lQ) Investment firm Rose Lake Capital, formed by Mynett and partner Will Hailer in 2022, had $42.44 in its bank account in late 2022, but the firm's value grew to $25 million in one year, according to Omar's 2024 filing. Rose Lake [boasts on its website](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj7GO6yAQAL_G7mKxGAMpKF6TLq-9Em1gnZDDrAUoVv7-lPuF62dGmq-rv2LKqdz_40aur-wLHS1T71R95Ode-UZtS6VQ446FX9w6eymkPgk4gfURU357NUa3EkmaR3JgtDWzUvY8PpzC2RiIAU1YAoVVRICbWLRFmldAPSb3qQkACyCsMFNc5oAQtDrHBUnIQQmKqXOdnpxKf9Ca3_yiOgXexuweve9tmP8N8jLIy3EcU-VGGb8p4P5hBnkZq4v7kXJOTZtBifuGKf_6_U_TLyd_AgAA__8bhmxL) that it does private equity work and that its officers had billions in "previous" assets under management. House Oversight panel Chairman Rep. James Comer (R-Ky.) said, _" There are a lot of questions as to how her husband accumulated so much wealth over the past two years. It's not possible. It's not. I'm a money guy. It's not possible."_
## List: Best Weekend Getaways in Each State
A list of the [best weekend getaways in every state](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO6yAUAE-DOyx4JtgpKH7jLr_dEmHznJDFYMGTkW-_yl5h65FmpPl62IcLMaTnf7ejoS3bhK1GJMJifX4fJS9Y95AS1kwu5TNXyhYEaC4kl5P1LsTLqs6bDRFw6NDIUU_joNR0715mEVpqgTeJi9KrBoBVewTlN6WFd64L5mMTUk5SikmMvb8Nq5OrVnd_cyiAKYE-UC79O4dEL9zilU8s_Zr3LpoX0VHZ8I_BzGBurfXFfxCDOYZKDOYFK_GG-I3J8yeSa-6qPCSOJ5aLV3KEDOauGH-0EGOoemRKPHcX4m-E_nTmNPATAAD__z7qeSI) offers options for an ideal 48-hour escape, from quiet shorelines and walkable towns to mountain trails and resorts with beach or pool choices. Destinations for the best weekend getaways were chosen using traveler reviews, expert recommendations, and accessibility, highlighting places that are easy to reach and worth a short trip. Outdoor lovers can head to [Bozeman](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAURp_GbET-AWwGD13Y0rUjcvAFbmR8I_uWKH36Kn2FDt_26RzpfF3na8CEefsMB3heac7wrAmYocyR7o9CN6gH5gyVOGQ6qTLNWuqhlapVbo4B02vumuhXAA2mAa_s4KzpOjc2u49yHKwJBtz6XhytU2BH41Tvbm7sG_RvmlTKKSWdtJfYmyWoZejG2AeQWnQSIjKVy50w8w5retEJ5bLQ0SS_Mz-qMB9CT0JP9M0VI9zoB46Q3xehp7AwnsgIVehpxbpj3oSeeId2CykFxtwWPKE0xcfHE1PCOljRye0ImP48_K84p9e_AQAA__-vF3qZ) for mountain trails, hot springs, and Gallatin River fishing, while farm enthusiasts can visit Lexington, [home to rolling horse farms](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ8GOpBtDIbCxd_Q3d-mRAavjz0Z78neQO7to4uUJ0g3Go3mk76P23JzGDHd_7sDLAdaElwlAjPkxdPjmWmFcmBKUIhdopMK06KEGhohGzku3mF8Lbr2NgAo6Gqw0gyj6bQep3q32gQ3hTAoPcmpHyZhwOlOuRW2tR9XU6N9vwkpRynFKEzr-25zchv05HsHQlVagEem3D4IE-8Q4otOyO1GRx3tzvwsVfevUnOl5uu62hMLcoSv96BSM--Y7qVhajxVat4pFyi_oQkuHw3TZ35Xdbb-eWGMWAZTaXE_HMYfDv9JzmnVdwAAAP__uUh6MQ) and thoroughbred culture. For [sun and sand lovers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OszAQAJ_GdCDbEH4KF19Dl6-9Em3sddjIsMjeA-XtT7lXuH40I83XfbkDJdqf_2FDJ5GXHa-SUATzEvh1ZH5g2WjfsbDAzicX4cVq29fa1GZcAlB6L10VXES02FbozNCPQ9t141StbvQT2sE8IrR2CsM0xdujhwl0H6P3YajIfWzamNEYPeqhCbfWg_F9N4UboLaq0xhIODcvpl1WjOnNJ-bG81Ylt4ocRbX_lJ2Vna_rak4qJDFxpgAfSNn5SOCx1ML1k5WdC3_LemERZecNsueaSoI9KDtX2YXjopSo9IPq9HMDSr8p-dOf09mfAAAA___YJHwK), Marco Island sits just above the Everglades along Florida's Gulf Coast. The tiny upscale island is ideal for boaters, fishermen, and dolphin lovers.

**Whatever happened to The Fonz?** In the early seasons of ABC-TV's _Happy Days_ , Arthur "Fonzie" Fonzarelli isn't supposed to be the point. He's a side character: a leather-jacketed, soft-spoken greaser who drifts through Arnold's Drive-In like a local weather system--cool, unpredictable, and, at first, slightly dangerous. But audiences didn't treat him like seasoning. They treated him like the meal. The show, built to spotlight Richie Cunningham's clean-cut coming-of-age, slowly rotated on its axis until it orbited the Fonz. That was actor Henry Winkler's first big step to fame: a supporting player who became pop culture's shorthand for confidence, charisma, and a kind of American myth of cool. [Here's his appearance in the first episode.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1q8zAUxvGrkbcYfVmSBw0vvARKSSl06Ghk6ThWkH2CdWKTuy_pLXR9HvgN_-_LcAm55PX6ERbwNOGwwlELEME2JLzdNxyhLnldoSKFFXeshIPk0py4OAk3pJDLc9BN8hOABNWAF9Y4q7R2fTN7x7Uz0lmhwXRTjJarycbJ6D6MsuvHJvuXxoVwQnDHbZs6FYOIRvepC8Al0xxSJtzaG-aVZpjKE3fY2ohLU_xMdK9M_WPyzOT5OI72iQ96jPD6X0ugODN13pn6_57knD6_al_fms2n-5FLydVYpvl1Cbn8kvSnDruXPwEAAP__UwFxgA) By the mid-to-late 1970s, the transformation was complete: _Happy Days_ was a hit, Fonzie was its rocket fuel, and the ratings peaked accordingly. Then came the moment that would outlive the series itself: Sept. 20, 1977, when Fonzie--wearing swim trunks and, yes, his leather jacket--[waterskied and jumped over a shark.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1ugzAUxfGnMVuQv2LM4KFSxJZWnTqii30Jjgw3ghtQ3r5KX6HrOdJv-P9c-yvkkpfbJ8wYeKR-wWMryIxrn-j-WGnAbc7LghsxLLTTxtRrqd1JqpPyfYJcXr2tUhgRNZoKg2qcb4y1vq2m4JQ1Z4AxejBOOmyHOIzgWjVqlVxqqxzemlTKKyW9bOp0NhFUdLZNZ0CphZWYMtNa3ykvPOFYXrTjWkeaqxIm5scmzIfQndDdcRz1i578HPD9vxfgOAnT7cJcvr_kRd47b0qs1pAeRy4lb64RVt5myOWP5H912IP-DQAA__-93nGk) The scene didn't instantly sink the show, but it crystallized a feeling: the sense that a once-effortless phenomenon was now reaching for spectacle. Years later, fans would coin a phrase from it--"jump the shark"--to describe any story that's run past its best. For Winkler, escaping Fonzie's shadow took longer than the ride to Hollywood. He didn't disappear; he diversified--producing, directing, popping up in comedies, and eventually landing a career-defining late peak as Gene Cousineau on HBO's _Barry_ , which won him an Emmy in 2018. Today, he's still working--[hosting _Hazardous History_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAYBeCnwZstwNiQgeEu3nLXjgib34EU80dAg9ynrxL1Dbod6ZPOkc7H1VxtiCHd_tsDdN3RJGglQq2QjcP7I-MK5QgpQcFqEz6xVDSc8rmnrGfKOBviaUTn9A7AYexAMzkrOQqhLp3XUq18n0bFR2slSLHZeZWTpPQys3VlvAv61UYZU4xRReXgpnGzbJvFxU0WKCeCggsV83DHkKqHPZ74hDxseHRR-1ofhYz_CF8IX1prgw-lYj5fTvhSPLZC-OLtt80Ov0r_630L1fce0jumzwi5y9o9WogxlFkSQW-HDfG9U_90zlPznwAAAP__5417NQ) and lining up new film roles--proof that one iconic character can be a trap... or a launchpad, if you keep moving. _Were you a Fonzie fan? Or a Henry Winkler fan? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

() | Whatever happened to The Fonz? In the early seasons of ABC-TV's Happy Days , Arthur "Fonzie" Fonzarelli isn't supposed to be the point. He's a side character: a leather-jacketed, soft-spoken greaser who drifts through Arnold's Drive-In like a local weather system--cool, unpredictable, and, at first, slightly dangerous. But audiences didn't treat him like seasoning. They treated him like the meal. The show, built to spotlight Richie Cunningham's clean-cut coming-of-age, slowly rotated on its axis until it orbited the Fonz. That was actor Henry Winkler's first big step to fame: a supporting player who became pop culture's shorthand for confidence, charisma, and a kind of American myth of cool. By the mid-to-late 1970s, the transformation was complete: Happy Days was a hit, Fonzie was its rocket fuel, and the ratings peaked accordingly. Then came the moment that would outlive the series itself: Sept. 20, 1977, when Fonzie--wearing swim trunks and, yes, his leather jacket-- The scene didn't instantly sink the show, but it crystallized a feeling: the sense that a once-effortless phenomenon was now reaching for spectacle. Years later, fans would coin a phrase from it--"jump the shark"--to describe any story that's run past its best. For Winkler, escaping Fonzie's shadow took longer than the ride to Hollywood. He didn't disappear; he diversified--producing, directing, popping up in comedies, and eventually landing a career-defining late peak as Gene Cousineau on HBO's Barry , which won him an Emmy in 2018. Today, he's still working-- and lining up new film roles--proof that one iconic character can be a trap... or a launchpad, if you keep moving. Were you a Fonzie fan? Or a Henry Winkler fan? body:
A polar air mass moving through large swaths of the country [has reached the state](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGypCAYhE-jGVOAKBgYbGL2Nt3QQmkG6jFiwT_PmT39lnOFjb-u7q_6z9fyZWOK-_23fWCil8_LjrMmEKEsR0622FhCpEp42Xoku-dKz0VyOTAumDCLszG9F9W6aeVuFC0moQejO62NaMNkRq5Xx42yyutOQsA4ZbZRQwy911sbp6uMC2GE5LIfb13vvLIezmjtuVobxeEi5XKjgI-GT-_8g3Lb8qNNUyA6atP9auTcyPk8z9t3yM8LNnK2heKWcAFYCiiNnH0B_sb9zgiPA8XSs6AyvA5sBMd8LuwzwyjEyk7gG7tjAVeKAliyhEqNnHuuWd8b4Tsn2CgxMLVCs1Fpz5TouO-31a16aMvkjjOmFOugG8XvDxvTx57-7_OfSf4LAAD__yPdlvw) and brought temperatures well below freezing to many areas. The Panhandle, North, and Central Texas are expected to see the lowest temperatures.

# Sunday, January 18, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1938, Major League Baseball center fielder [Curt Flood](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO6jAQheGncToiexJiU7i4ulI6tt3SmuAJGa2JI3sg8PYreIUtT_Pp6P8-hzNy4vX6hTfy8pxzWGmviUSohC0nLMhlYalCT6xbwjVXuQfQMBy0ORgXInJ6hb6JftLxZBryxg7OdtY60yzeDOQizoR6IDAXcNPUmR7NCQZHlwka9m9MG-MMaDie2u4Y5x5nis7aWfeT6jVFllxaWehzY06v_KDSXvKtSX4R2arq_ikYFYy0tjv_8EaRsc3lqmB8bwXj_3uRMKacY1N83HZOietgVa-vN-T00eRvDR4efgMAAP__-SNyDA) was born in Houston. After winning two World Series titles with the St. Louis Cardinals, Flood challenged the reserve clause in his contract after being traded to the Philadelphia Phillies. Although the Supreme Court ruled in favor of MLB, the players' union later succeeded in negotiating contracts that included free agency. Waco's [Dr Pepper Museum just hit a major milestone](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpiAUBeCnwQ4DVxQsKLaxm223NFe4jCQoBvjHmbff-L_C1Cc5-c7597F-YEzx_PyLB9n2HfJ60l0TtUZlvXLCgrHssdVG31ivhGeu7bWCgIkLyaVZPcb0s6rO2034WXZkpZ6MHrQ2stvtNoJUwzgPFGY54QADSO_Iu01OmwpjF-1TJqQ0EgSMcz-MPigM5I3WQaiNKUE-tlz6ttObEdJP_qLSu3x0ye6tXZUNfxgsDJb7vvs7ID4hgwVLiy4Rg-XZxWBJ2WFisPjCL7ouKvx4VXodvFKrHFuj0-PpiBdyuXj-mBgsoxBceQ1GT56jmQVXGma-OWU40USbQeG1oK5Yf90xpVgnzZT4PDCmN7T97t4vC_8DAAD__3ckjXE), drawing record crowds as new exhibits and a towering soda surprise keep visitors lining up. See today's _Roundup_ for all the details. Today's sponsor, [Oricle Hearing Aids](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuK4zAUhp9G7mJ0sWWlUBEIhi2y2yzMdEKWjmKBYhnpJE7efoinm3a671z4-fg_LuZiY4rL9a-9gcZnyGaBrSZAhGLWnGyxscwRK8LT1jXZJVe8G065PFB2YMp4G9PLdI3XE_VH1oBmg1SDGAbFmlkr2020dzSIyUnRuUCBseBEL0XvmFJN1O8wyphinPL-2Ireh84G8GoYAu0m0lHwEXNpcYZdI6RXfkBpXb41Sc-IayXiRPhI-LhtW3sFzCW6BO-P91qMBoLBYpdqHca8mOiJOBMu8w6MHX-wDWGfuBCEy3qfGBHn_5_jP8Llafxz_j41Rft1iynFKgfS0evNxrRr4e_KfGj-FQAA__97_IUG), is helping readers hear more clearly without the sky-high prices--offering a tiny, easy-to-use hearing aid with clear sound and all-day power for under $100.
