## Freezing Temps Move through the State
A polar air mass moving through large swaths of the country [has reached the state](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGypCAYhE-jGVOAKBgYbGL2Nt3QQmkG6jFiwT_PmT39lnOFjb-u7q_6z9fyZWOK-_23fWCil8_LjrMmEKEsR0622FhCpEp42Xoku-dKz0VyOTAumDCLszG9F9W6aeVuFC0moQejO62NaMNkRq5Xx42yyutOQsA4ZbZRQwy911sbp6uMC2GE5LIfb13vvLIezmjtuVobxeEi5XKjgI-GT-_8g3Lb8qNNUyA6atP9auTcyPk8z9t3yM8LNnK2heKWcAFYCiiNnH0B_sb9zgiPA8XSs6AyvA5sBMd8LuwzwyjEyk7gG7tjAVeKAliyhEqNnHuuWd8b4Tsn2CgxMLVCs1Fpz5TouO-31a16aMvkjjOmFOugG8XvDxvTx57-7_OfSf4LAAD__yPdlvw) and brought temperatures well below freezing to many areas. The Panhandle, North, and Central Texas are expected to see the lowest temperatures. Overnight temperatures were expected to fall below 20 degrees, with some areas, including the Red River Valley, [possibly seeing snow that was unlikely](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdEa2IWAKF9fQ5dor0YKXYN2Ckb2Jk7f_RV7hb2c0o2_m3326Q6BwPP7Cjo7fa5wOLJmQGdN0RoIEIW2BM-Mb8klwxMzPySjTSaWltpOHQJ-prbyblR90hU73ne2bvre62pyxTeN90928nT1A12iwHQ6Dws4sel6q4K4ypbXVRpnbUDc3v7aword9v6p2Fq1CHzimmjf8Yqz0iS9M9RL3itzGfGbR_BFmFGYspdTLnK8Vly_M-I0IM16SMKMHIshyjYlliYk3WRB4wyQXCjtIxv3EBPxMmGXmuPyXeYtFApEsmBnTIU9I4FGYsUrOnyUQhdz1olWPHQJ9ufh3b76c-QkAAP__YCSN8w) to accumulate. Prolonged freezing temperatures overnight can kill sensitive plants and crops and can put stress on other vegetation. Other risks of freezing include frozen and burst water pipes. Temperatures are expected to stay frigid into next week.
## Ten Commandments Monument Unveiled
A Ten Commandments monument [was unveiled](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGP5CAMhX8N6RiBYUJSpLgm3V57ZeTBsINEYATOZuffn7Ld1VfZsmW_9-n9-dg-MOVUPn_jHhb-jnUr4ew5MIe2vWrGhqk9E3cO39hfGUvtfGygYJRKSz1thCm_NzvQ8lA06yEs2o2TM85Nengu5KyPURsgetyNnW3QinScwXrQM6ghLdczpfWkQcF9vpk7RYsx0ORcVPYhrAqUuLYbP8OPjZjf9Su0m6_7kJcn86sL80vAKmA9z_N2RsRrKWDFxsnnIGC9uASsuXrMAlbG1rCw9PUo_L4GoUhf9x0L7aFwl3stx9XJVDpjzoFkPbgnCvLf46s0ftajXzowOenIjHEyVo6zidLS5CVGqySZcfTxbpVCGNpCrzPlnProhFWfO6b8g8T_F8TXAn8DAAD__zJKnvg) at the Tarrant County Courthouse in downtown Fort Worth this week. County leaders initiated the idea last year, and it was [formally accepted](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDnOpDAQhU8DGcgL2BA4mISsJ50QFbgAS2WM7Jpebv-LvsKfv_e95d9jfkCgcO5_IaLj95bmE1-FkBnzfCWCDCEfgQvjG8pFcKbC_2cllGmEbOQwewj0mbvau0X4UdbopDWD1dYOsj7csK4GzdqhgN5rASNa4xdrYNxWs-mlDu6GCSkHqYTqx1b3futgQz9Yu4luqTqBPnDKLR_4rbHRJz0xt2uKNbmD-SqV_lOpqVITxKstDLlhJNwzxFtVqemeVanpShQ4rKXZb8IZ8eTblDmshFp2utdKi_bgSHV2_noFolCMrTqxRwj0zeTfPfV06icAAP__LJl_hA) in a 3-1 vote by county commissioners in April 2025. The monument is nearly identical to the one located at the Texas State Capitol. Supporters say the monument [reflects the nation's moral and legal foundations](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u6yAQRleDOyz-EkhB8Rp3ee0tLWLGMRIGaxjHye6vnC3cak4139H5uY_3kHIqz_9hBU_vuY4FjpaBCHDcag4YEi6JGsE7tC2HUhvtoxLqyoXk0o0xpPwZTRf9Q8Sb7MBLe3VWW-tkt_hJG62lE86ZyYLUctIXo6KKYJ2aReySP58JKZ1UQl1uvb7E2YQZorN2FubBjICYqGJPC3w15vypL8B-qmuX_UK0Nab_MTUwNcwV6ahIC8JWkfqKT6aGc4KpQUimBnkSQeFTXddQ4gqFGl9r2U_ie3nBNwmPGI7Gl71EhNg4VU4BMRTiU90Lfc6DtNS9AVNDhz5uR8o5tatlRjzXkPJXkf4W9uXVbwAAAP__wRmQMg), while opponents argue it violates the constitutional principle of separation of church and state and elevates Christianity above other religions. Similar monuments have been put up in Austin and Amarillo, and in states like Kentucky and Oklahoma.
## Dr Pepper Museum Has Record Year
The Dr Pepper Museum in Waco [set an attendance record in 2025](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpiAUBeCnwQ4DVxQsKLaxm223NFe4jCQoBvjHmbff-L_C1Cc5-c7597F-YEzx_PyLB9n2HfJ60l0TtUZlvXLCgrHssdVG31ivhGeu7bWCgIkLyaVZPcb0s6rO2034WXZkpZ6MHrQ2stvtNoJUwzgPFGY54QADSO_Iu01OmwpjF-1TJqQ0EgSMcz-MPigM5I3WQaiNKUE-tlz6ttObEdJP_qLSu3x0ye6tXZUNfxgsDJb7vvs7ID4hgwVLiy4Rg-XZxWBJ2WFisPjCL7ouKvx4VXodvFKrHFuj0-PpiBdyuXj-mBgsoxBceQ1GT56jmQVXGma-OWU40USbQeG1oK5Yf90xpVgnzZT4PDCmN7T97t4vC_8DAAD__3ckjXE), welcoming 270,000 visitors--the highest total in its nearly 35-year history. The museum, which offers hands-on experiences such as creating custom soft drinks and visiting a handcrafted soda fountain, remains a major draw. Eighty-five percent of visitors surveyed said the primary reason for visiting Waco was the Dr Pepper Museum. The museum opened two new exhibits last year. The museum also launched the Mary Avenue Façade Project, a restoration project of its 1906-built Artesian Manufacturing and Bottling Company Building. The museum also plans to [unveil](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u3CAURleDO0Zw_YMpXKRx99KmtC5wMSh4sIAZv9l95LeF1J_06Zzz52v7wpjic_-NBy3t2-ftSVdN1BqV7cwJC8YSYquNvrGeCZ-5ttcGAiYuJJfz5jCmzzZ0bjHCadnRItU0q16pWXZhATtLgX7UoCczGu21Vz1oSWjH2UrZxeU-E1LOEgSM-tGPzg_oyc1KeTEYNghyseXyaIF-MHz65DeVh81Hl5bQ2llZ_4vBymC9ruvx19Kzve-ZwYqlRZuIwXqbMVhTtpgYrIVsLo5_CAt3hZ90nlT48ar0OniIe0hxD63yveSrBX67V46B0DFYRyG4Vt7owWtujbF8UBNwFL3lRk66l6jAC9GVxZ1XTCnWSbFB7AfG9APe_i_3e4F_AQAA__-T_pRx) a 23-foot-tall World's Largest Dr Pepper Bottle this May.

Although the Supreme Court ruled in favor of MLB, the players' union later succeeded in negotiating contracts that included free agency. Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Freezing Temps Move through the State A polar air mass moving through large swaths of the country and brought temperatures well below freezing to many areas. The Panhandle, North, and Central Texas are expected to see the lowest temperatures. Overnight temperatures were expected to fall below 20 degrees, with some areas, including the Red River Valley, to accumulate. Prolonged freezing temperatures overnight can kill sensitive plants and crops and can put stress on other vegetation. Other risks of freezing include frozen and burst water pipes. Temperatures are expected to stay frigid into next week. Ten Commandments Monument Unveiled A Ten Commandments monument at the Tarrant County Courthouse in downtown Fort Worth this week. County leaders initiated the idea last year, and it was in a 3-1 vote by county commissioners in April 2025. The monument is nearly identical to the one located at the Texas State Capitol. Supporters say the monument , while opponents argue it violates the constitutional principle of separation of church and state and elevates Christianity above other religions. Similar monuments have been put up in Austin and Amarillo, and in states like Kentucky and Oklahoma. Dr Pepper Museum Has Record Year The Dr Pepper Museum in Waco , welcoming 270,000 visitors--the highest total in its nearly 35-year history. The museum, which offers hands-on experiences such as creating custom soft drinks and visiting a handcrafted soda fountain, remains a major draw. Eighty-five percent of visitors surveyed said the primary reason for visiting Waco was the Dr Pepper Museum. The museum opened two new exhibits last year. The museum also launched the Mary Avenue Façade Project, a restoration project of its 1906-built Artesian Manufacturing and Bottling Company Building. You believe in this movement. And you're ready to fight. me build the kind of grassroots army it will take to win the most important race in America this November. His target? The **“cashless” agenda** being quietly pushed by global bankers and central planners.

While Washington elites talk about “efficiency,” the truth is simple:
A **Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC)** would give them _total control_ — over what you buy, how much you spend, and when you’re allowed to access your own funds.

Trump’s orders are a warning shot: _“We’re ending it.”_

He’s taking aim at cashless policies across the country — starting in D.C. — but the battle is just beginning. Because while he’s fighting on one front, the Fed and Treasury are already building the **digital dollar infrastructure** behind closed doors.

If they win this fight, physical cash could vanish — and your savings could be digitized, tracked, and frozen at will.

Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Personal note from Marsha Blackburn
body:
I don’t know what I would do without you!

| | | | Exclusive message from Marsha Blackburn for TOP supporters ONLY:Hi, Peter,
It’s Marsha Blackburn, and I personally wanted to reach out to you today to say THANK YOU. As I sit down to write this email, I'm filled with gratitude. I am thinking about all the fantastic supporters like you who've stood by me every step of the way.
You have always been such an incredible supporter of me and my cause, and you deserve recognition. From the bottom of my heart, I am truly grateful for you and wanted to make sure you knew.
Your unwavering commitment to our shared values and your trust in me to fight for them in Washington are what fuel my passion and drive me to keep pushing forward.
I think back on all the battles we've fought together - from taking on the liberal elites who want to erode our Constitutional rights, to standing strong against the radical Left's attempts to undermine our values and our way of life. Through it all, you've been a rock, a true champion of our cause, and I'm honored to have you by my side.
As we look to the future, I know that the road ahead won't be easy. The forces of liberalism and socialism will stop at nothing to undermine our progress and push their radical agenda. [But I know that with supporters like you, we can overcome any obstacle and achieve great things.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
That's why I'm counting on you to continue standing with me in this fight. Your support is crucial to our success, and I'm asking you to pitch in today to help us keep pushing forward.
Every dollar counts! Your support will help us take on the tough battles ahead and emerge victorious.
\- Marsha Blackburn | [ Chip in NOW >>> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

body:
For speaking the truth and supporting the Constitution, the President of the United States said Mark should be hanged. The Secretary of Defense threatened him with court-martial.
#

Team, we’ll get right to the point.
We’re asking you to make a donation to Mark Kelly.
If that’s all you need to hear, use this link and chip in.
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/1-18-26**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod.oeiXQe&refcode=em260118-1-60&t=1&akid=6336%2E6688874%2ErdDNRj)
If you’d like a little more, would you let us explain? This won’t take long.
Mark retired from the Navy 15 years ago, after Gabby was shot.
He thought his time in public service was over until Donald Trump became president. By 2019, Mark knew he couldn’t sit on the sidelines anymore. He ran for Senate and won his first campaign in 2020. Then he had to turn around and run again for a full term in 2022, and he won that race, too.
And late last year, after a lifetime of service, the Trump Administration came after him.
For speaking the truth and supporting the Constitution, the President of the United States said Mark should be hanged. The Secretary of Defense threatened him with court-martial, censured him, and is trying to reduce his retirement rank and pay.
Mark is under attack right now, but make no mistake: These attacks don’t stop with him.
That’s why it is absolutely critical that patriotic, liberty-loving Americans make a stand now to support Mark. So, if you’re ready, please:

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Where is Republicans’ humanity?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JASMINE FOR TEXAS Jasmine for Texas
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123555660/595833167/-1529437191?refcode=260118_E1A4_JC_DemandAnswersRS&refcode2=65030b16-78f4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&contactdata=DW3xuOmZTm85T+IxiR3j3SYUfHUg7hBzKD5d7Ei5all1wl0qNtoh6EcfJOuKC5IC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTAzMGIxNi03OGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5_PNoWl4Tz7Ul658LNi0SJ3h1Fa7fXoV6LZpj2ZNi0=) | | How many of these headlines before people finally demand answers? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123555661/595833169/-1529437191?amount=10&refcode=260118_E1A4_JC_DemandAnswersRS&refcode2=65030b16-78f4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&contactdata=DW3xuOmZTm85T+IxiR3j3SYUfHUg7hBzKD5d7Ei5all1wl0qNtoh6EcfJOuKC5IC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTAzMGIxNi03OGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5_PNoWl4Tz7Ul658LNi0SJ3h1Fa7fXoV6LZpj2ZNi0=)
---
Every time something horrific happens, Republicans reach for the same tired playbook: deflect, distort, and blame someone else. _One of my colleagues had the audacity to say, “this is Joe Biden’s fault.”_
Let’s pause right there.
For years, they’ve told us Joe Biden didn’t know if he was coming or going. And now — suddenly — he’s some kind of telepathic mastermind responsible for every action taken by federal agents across the country?!
**That’s not accountability. That’s cowardice.**
What’s happening right now isn’t about party talking points. It’s about a refusal to take responsibility. It’s about elected officials who would rather protect their own political comfort than stand up for the people they represent.
**And I’m done pretending that’s acceptable.**
**We must come together. Not later. Not when it’s convenient. Now. We have to demand answers, oversight, and leaders with the courage to actually do their jobs.**
But let me be real with you: fighting back takes resources.

clean_body: = | | How many of these headlines before people finally demand answers? | = Every time something horrific happens, Republicans reach for the same tired playbook: deflect, distort, and blame someone else. One of my colleagues had the audacity to say, “this is Joe Biden’s fault.” Let’s pause right there. For years, they’ve told us Joe Biden didn’t know if he was coming or going. And now — suddenly — he’s some kind of telepathic mastermind responsible for every action taken by federal agents across the country?! That’s not accountability. That’s cowardice. What’s happening right now isn’t about party talking points. It’s about a refusal to take responsibility. It’s about elected officials who would rather protect their own political comfort than stand up for the people they represent. And I’m done pretending that’s acceptable. We must come together. Not later. Not when it’s convenient. Now. We have to demand answers, oversight, and leaders with the courage to actually do their jobs. As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Null: **We’re in the middle of one of the worst flu seasons in decades.
**
RSV and COVID cases are climbing. Hospitals are feeling the strain. Doctors are sounding the alarm.

But the response from the Secretary of Health and Human Services, RFK Jr.? Chaos.
🧬 RFK Jr.’s HHS quietly changed longstanding childhood vaccine recommendations, even as pediatric hospitalizations rise.

🚫 He slashed funding for cancer and HIV research.

💉 He is undermining vaccine science, even saying it would be “better” if fewer children got the flu vaccine.

📉 And he laid off hundreds of CDC staff, crippling our ability to respond to outbreaks in real time.
**RFK Jr. is dismantling our public health system.** And that’s why Haley introduced articles of impeachment – to fight back against this assault on science.

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12322?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1925%2E49239%2Enh_NHN) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11806?t=11&akid=1925%2E49239%2Enh_NHN)

Thank you,
Haley

clean_body: It’s been a while since I heard from you. | | | | From Trump: You’ve got me worried I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me. I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’t abandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. | | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However [if you'd like to unsubscribe,](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001drlkUSoYRXyg_DBaXXgw5ss_MGCzftQQatMfgM08yJ-d8el75kPZMmicqP82-OJYOUMQkwqe9oa8GjUF0f9owfCiMsZiLfiBDmXs-5PHHWAkXrUzONAxo-5dqMjCCYE_PJTek9kylChajFqtxS8aJVmxVRpn3q3E9qqvurR0CNy1ng4SdoVY0rQN1uvHgLdS9FKaIyMVyks=&c=GZmkXh1XxMnYUKuLmgF7TyQEwFvMtiTEAjGnQZj3zLLGxopo2UgqzQ==&ch=rvTjngvqgAocmtTP4McHRN-2nEZR--MPSNyRxVg7ROB1sYkdDR__Xw==) you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.

| Peter, it's Trisha Calvarese (D). I'm writing this just before I hit the road again for another stop on our grassroots campaign to flip CO-04, retire Lauren Boebert, and bring strong leadership to this district. Because here's the truth: Boebert helped pass the so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill" into law -- the biggest wealth transfer from the working class to billionaires in U.S. history. It guts healthcare access, slashes food assistance, defunds education, and threatens to close rural hospitals across Colorado.
And then? She walked away from the communities that will feel the pain the most. She skips town halls. She bails on key votes. She won't meet with the people who she was elected to serve.
That's not leadership. That's cowardice. It's not how I was raised. And it's not how I intend to lead. I'm running for Congress because I believe leadership means showing up, listening and standing up for the people you serve. That's why I've been on the road nonstop, meeting people where they are in every corner of this district - from Sterling to Highlands Ranch, from Fort Morgan to Prowers. But here's the truth: Every conversation I have, trip, and event takes resources. Especially early on. These early investments are what let us build momentum, expand our reach and prove that our grassroots campaign can take on Boebert's billionaire-funded machine. [That's why I'm asking: Will you pitch in $25, $15 or whatever you can today to help me win this seat and flip the House for Democrats?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001drlkUSoYRXyg_DBaXXgw5ss_MGCzftQQatMfgM08yJ-d8el75kPZMmicqP82-OJYBGAxgXcgjJHykFVDf-RI2L1yf5Eurv7HIAL7yRba4fSq1CHdB-peN3-b5Gks1DelGsAPKXU_f4WvUUZx0zT-9uuQGA7NVjic1fNpheRDmbpnBrUfEwIxWYiRULUNjJjE9q6aiJ6_9Zax74OflXhwdr-38tuZbu9AMeJhg4p7VNs=&c=GZmkXh1XxMnYUKuLmgF7TyQEwFvMtiTEAjGnQZj3zLLGxopo2UgqzQ==&ch=rvTjngvqgAocmtTP4McHRN-2nEZR--MPSNyRxVg7ROB1sYkdDR__Xw==)

| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. | Peter, it's Trisha Calvarese (D). I'm writing this just before I hit the road again for another stop on our grassroots campaign to flip CO-04, retire Lauren Boebert, and bring strong leadership to this district. Because here's the truth: Boebert helped pass the so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill" into law -- the biggest wealth transfer from the working class to billionaires in U.S. history. It guts healthcare access, slashes food assistance, defunds education, and threatens to close rural hospitals across Colorado.
And then? She walked away from the communities that will feel the pain the most. She skips town halls. She bails on key votes. She won't meet with the people who she was elected to serve.
That's not leadership. That's cowardice. It's not how I was raised. And it's not how I intend to lead. I'm running for Congress because I believe leadership means showing up, listening and standing up for the people you serve. That's why I've been on the road nonstop, meeting people where they are in every corner of this district - from Sterling to Highlands Ranch, from Fort Morgan to Prowers. But here's the truth: Every conversation I have, trip, and event takes resources. Especially early on. These early investments are what let us build momentum, expand our reach and prove that our grassroots campaign can take on Boebert's billionaire-funded machine. [That's why I'm asking: Will you pitch in $25 $15 or whatever you can today to help me win this seat and flip the House for Democrats?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CA9Z_WG4OKqF-N5tTdtd2kcTwQwkeuLT9Qf8KaPl1rD64dKc8lWK4T9QSZiz1Bv74izS_v6Q-lZZbyFwGo4tfKTCXGd1jUiW6jH3TIvMZPNL-lKxUxU5FQ5V9cd5qACjxdNMWx642EwdCBhHRkd0aX56UMOcI3elyaiUhQwJnNXCkD8iVWi4x1PU1-7cXO4ZKzSEbS9ONF3GJ5milxoq140S8lw4u3zHXH1j4ablfhsskqkBA9KmTQ==&c=atHpjG3-lOrymnwBiDeh_q-eYgnzkotUcYqWbsj47ALfL8kDHga-qg==&ch=ag12l9q9TWdD0VgLKE0c5M6vr1i5DNQu1USYeT_GKONszYB3y22nkw==)

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...
body:
How Sabbath rest anchored Charlie’s life
Charlie’s final book on honoring the Sabbath—claim your copy with a gift to TPUSA.
| | [ ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=46c4c285612d4eafa4817c7d0e30a017&_e=C8hOum3DkAGWG9vlcWaPa0Mcs869QkUrqP-7yMuBFctCcWx74h7aSOsqI6GV8f1Ubt0u4tHkQoWzdAfXsp7wRyNZtfgatC2cN3Ol1qsOeHRYKHPt5FM-OqEUY_H61kVX4W_HlzoHNcTY4k1JH4oiuwEsXbrpStQRUeF9K48qOE1KSKFLGixwWKWBJpbczAGI8xy9k-l7dEQqzgV0QhTnlIg-CmbezT2IaIdJcUFcjhNrUqVih1xkttOID9kWsuGfejli9nUM1Qc-SzkUnMBj3PBaUCTy2BSVnN6dxwzHj2PYUL8PIqkGUnHZdBNn42HSF_1P_Y4SrSK0XXz_S4s3QEpphI2Kh8UrIT14VIqNxv8FiYqyq9I3uLbSE34HzorfOXgZumZ4uQDuNHq4mj76XXXXfQR5g1VR_-WejmzNr9z7qM6yZXFgAy7NeawK20dtPfTa13FCHsScsemHR4IIV9_uXbiCUkhGXE_ojV1Mws9IcZdWKeKaspGQB_B0iJhNWQ_pM3iTVqSGBiMRKie4fhg0GheeFNDuEzTk3nMbE_YsYWpNh7hHlLkFjoY8-3YR1XN79dx9cWK1GC6q83z_zBBO9GQWDy9UNC6Rt0YxwPpactN3BpZwXUuwfUQ7Ec3wRHrZoEdN416e32feXleFe1lratQV09rxUgxRRUOkQVFWx4gWcnZzrNQUGIMnOJcL)
---
Patriot,
---
Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[ ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=46c4c285612d4eafa4817c7d0e30a017&_e=C8hOum3DkAGWG9vlcWaPa0Mcs869QkUrqP-7yMuBFctCcWx74h7aSOsqI6GV8f1Ubt0u4tHkQoWzdAfXsp7wRyNZtfgatC2cN3Ol1qsOeHRYKHPt5FM-OqEUY_H61kVX4W_HlzoHNcTY4k1JH4oiuwEsXbrpStQRUeF9K48qOE1KSKFLGixwWKWBJpbczAGI8xy9k-l7dEQqzgV0QhTnlIg-CmbezT2IaIdJcUFcjhNwkhSvLhYUgnFEdffCoqRetr457M4BxQf7eV7UYF3C_tUqacZObzDIZFp2xsBENdS0yIolHNVYnyexly415ekeqyJGGxrESHNWgTmBuMNRydcwmvla7gS_7GWYh9IpwBIhGSW-lCETF60e5KIJnLh6RYynnKGWQb72Ey6Ec-Q9ORrYgazoHR225xLU-E_2EbdfyqqbpfNzQIDxoWsL82TqU9EFBBjq3mV23kpw1Qi4gaUo_zUXS6iZq7E84ES214x-sdhLaR-8nXhzoukzArOy0-u8u_uJ3zFSHDjLtOGYUqTyBAci7gSl5LyIq9LiEzYzh9HIYArqYoZEzxuZa7Dbd-MWbsbco5HvTCRIglUHF3dZ_n8HsdOk4EXhj1wBHERSg0vrqK1P7bdh0ZIbAiLhIayb4nb5q5orTTHijVfZ9nNGbEBx-qpqHouSxnU94n43lCeaxkOGAn1uv2CCvCup)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

clean_body: How Sabbath rest anchored Charlie’s life Charlie’s final book on honoring the Sabbath—claim your copy with a gift to TPUSA. | | Patriot, Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. I promised fellow Republican leaders a response from Patriot.

_And I would NEVER not follow through on a promise. _

From when I took an oath to our country as a Marine to my swearing in as Vice President, I take my word seriously.

**[I don’t want to have to show up to my meeting empty-handed. $3 might seem like an inconsequential donation to some, but for a ground-up operation like ours it makes a _huge_ difference.

**$3 helps us defend frontline Democrats in Congress** – New Dems currently hold 20 of the 24 most competitive ones.

**$3 would help us break the Republican trifecta,** turning Trump into a lame-duck president.

**$3 helps us fight against the MAGA agenda** to end Social Security, ban mail-in voting, and give more in tax breaks to billionaires while hardworking Americans are left to foot the bill.

Can we count you in? >>
| A HUGE walk-out is planned for January 20th to protest Donald Trump — **_but we don’t have a confirmation of your participation._**

If we don’t get the last 20 responses we need, we’ll have NO IDEA how many Americans care about fighting back. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Fellow Conservative,

Over the weekend, photographs started flooding in from Iran—young women boldly lighting cigarettes from the flames of burning photos of the Iranian Ayatollah. What a raw, unyielding act of defiance against a tyrannical regime that murders its own people, sponsors terror worldwide, and chants “Death to America” like it's their national anthem.

I've seen my share of warzones. As a Navy SEAL, I put on the uniform and battled in the most dangerous corners of the globe during the war on terror. Those days shaped me—taught me to confront threats head-on, no matter how ruthless the enemy. Now, in the U.S. Senate, I'm applying those same lessons to dismantle the status quo that's rotting our nation from within. But let's be clear: the fire of freedom burning in Iran right now? That's no accident. _**It's a direct result of President Trump's America First agenda, which has strategically weakened and destabilized this terrorist state, backed by a strong Republican majority in Congress.**_

[**help us hold our majority**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=65a90e0e2cc6456ba8d822d908f11d78&_e=JLs72m-W7QNWR-D2M-kbzhh4wRYjdLheS7DKwy7tbUsshPAr2S0ElprUe5POWlZuKq9Cco1UVowuHn2gd7VwpDFdocrlVyBxLZuVR1SUN7-NGp9SuXpgVCsaOtMk4UYOfwub7YlEVlDYwi0j9moEoSgUSSW2WB60Jsw4Yuut_90sphlCT5WvXjspL-v6JrAjaiEwuFepqzVVE8JHIO0sPuvQQ9FdZQC-BnoTmgTwj1KR46w011rMjKqBwBgLbYXYjEXvh7FQ9fgOp9ObRvhwcjB_2mLT6uCve64fhl6T_4afAqRjLWbg1qN4D113B4tnuQggCwtOktMbAeQxT8cEgx5yGeJsJVJE2NibmjEMTcx-IMjvk1XutVYlWlHw_ZoAa_qIScRMzEDo87ZQttKsuySgvvpZ6b8dAA_EF2YwH3O7_86LgHooKHJhPxRX7p1Zb_-1zZgZDSxoaRQLp58mndiogiMZpioSbhk53CGwzowj6l-OxDGNtU_sJm9jjB3rCnxpuiWOq1vP_-eTpL5-enURFDek1ZXZvM6dezSenQSSWk0VOqPQuSsuXVS3zx8wzwJDKQr0OhVXeuVcdMVToaBnr-jPBKtcOhR_sOFhn4lAP_CLo6qFITrR6nvQzcA0CEb-hRxcqn9DJOtH_w9cflhglf76pELabWWAxhsz0BoAuzvO9qr3wRoR78r9K3u0kJxdyZUKWDnbgdbfCUq2uzy46lihM09JAB7QxNH4IzE%3D)

Iranians crave freedom. They demand fundamental human rights, and they're risking everything—protesting by the thousands, and being viciously murdered by the thousands – to topple a regime that's spent decades slaughtering its citizens and Americans alike as the world's largest state sponsor of terror.

The biased hacks in the liberal media and their Democrat allies would love to spin this differently. However, the truth is undeniable: _**This wouldn't be happening if Joe Biden or Kamala Harris were still calling the shots from the White House.**_ They'd be propping up these murderers with pallets of cash, just like before. Instead, we're witnessing President Trump Make America Great Again in real time—crushing our enemies abroad while we drain the Swamp at home.

clean_body: —----------------------------------------------- | Fellow Conservative, Over the weekend, photographs started flooding in from Iran—young women boldly lighting cigarettes from the flames of burning photos of the Iranian Ayatollah. What a raw, unyielding act of defiance against a tyrannical regime that murders its own people, sponsors terror worldwide, and chants “Death to America” like it's their national anthem. I've seen my share of warzones. As a Navy SEAL, I put on the uniform and battled in the most dangerous corners of the globe during the war on terror. Those days shaped me—taught me to confront threats head-on, no matter how ruthless the enemy. Now, in the U.S. Senate, I'm applying those same lessons to dismantle the status quo that's rotting our nation from within. But let's be clear: the fire of freedom burning in Iran right now? That's no accident. It's a direct result of President Trump's America First agenda, which has strategically weakened and destabilized this terrorist state, backed by a strong Republican majority in Congress. Iranians crave freedom. They demand fundamental human rights, and they're risking everything—protesting by the thousands, and being viciously murdered by the thousands – to topple a regime that's spent decades slaughtering its citizens and Americans alike as the world's largest state sponsor of terror. The biased hacks in the liberal media and their Democrat allies would love to spin this differently. However, the truth is undeniable: This wouldn't be happening if Joe Biden or Kamala Harris were still calling the shots from the White House. They'd be propping up these murderers with pallets of cash, just like before. Instead, we're witnessing President Trump Make America Great Again in real time—crushing our enemies abroad while we drain the Swamp at home. But the fight's far from over. The vengeful Democrats and mainstream news outlets are desperate to protect their cozy globalist bubble. They hate what I'm doing in the Senate—exposing waste, fraud, and the corrupt insiders who've sold out our country. They attack my SEAL mindset and my support for President Trump's agenda that puts America back on top. And they're terrified because YOU elected us to upend their dystopian vision and restore the free, great nation our forefathers built over centuries. If they can muzzle voices like mine, they'll come for you next. That's why I'm holding the line, but I need your support to fuel this battle for America's future. There are less than 300 days until the November midterms, and if we lose our majority in the House or Senate, kiss goodbye to this transformational change unfolding before our eyes. Don't let this moment pass us by. name: Billionaire Tax via Our Revolution
subject: Silicon Valley billionaires are plotting against our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

A group of Silicon Valley billionaires is scheming to take out Congressman
Ro Khanna, close ally of Our Revolution, as he stands with our movement in
the push for a wealth tax in California.

Of course, the tech billionaires are out for revenge.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34939?source=email-20260118&t=1011&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Headline: Silicon Valley Plots Against Ro Khanna after his support for
a wealth tax

They've fired up Signal chats, held hush-hush conference calls, and are
plotting a well-funded assault to primary Ro and try to get him out of
Congress.

But here's the thing: Billionaires shouldn't pick our leaders – the people
should. When our allies in Congress take a fierce stand on our top issues,
they get a target on them — and we need to have their back. Let's show
Silicon Valley the size and strength of our movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34939?source=email-20260118&t=1012&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Add your name: Stand with Ro Khanna and show big money that people
power is unstoppable.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34939?source=email-20260118&t=1013&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]ADD YOUR NAME

Ro Khanna has led the way in the fight against Trump's authoritarianism –
demanding Congress act to stop the march towards war in Venezuela and
speaking out about ICE after a visit to a detention center, saying "We're
treating these people like animals, not like human beings ... It's an
embarrassment for the country,"

Then Ro really caught the ire of Silicon Valley Billionaires when he
backed this bold new proposal that could be put to California voters this
year – a one-time 5% tax on fortunes over $1 billion to fund schools, food
assistance, and healthcare. This would be a major step to Defund the
Oligarchs - and Fund the People - and we can't let them push allies like
Ro out of office.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34939?source=email-20260118&t=1014&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Headline: The signal chat where Silicone Valley is plotting against
California's billionaire tax

THIS is the kind of leader we need right now. But imagine if these
billionaires succeed: the message to Congress would be clear – challenge
the 1%, and your career is over. But if we rally together and defend Ro,
we show the world that organized people can defeat organized money. And
here's the truth: every time the billionaire class goes after us, our
movement grows stronger.

This fight isn't just about one seat. It's about showing politicians
across the country that you *can* stand up to wealth and power – even in
Silicon Valley – and win. If we let billionaires chase Ro out of office,
no champion for the working class will be safe.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34939?source=email-20260118&t=1015&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Add your name and together let's show that billionaires will NOT
silence our movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34939?source=email-20260118&t=1016&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Website |

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20260118.fH-Oxz&t=1007&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20260118.Dkx3yO&t=1008&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20260118.YdALQk&t=1009&akid=10091%2E5885482%2EnW4pOu ]GIVE MONTHLY

We’re checking in with our strongest supporters to hear more about what’s on your mind at the beginning of this critical election year — what you see as the top threats to democracy, how you intend to fight back, what gives you hope right now, and anything else as you reflect on what we must achieve together.
In 2026, we’ll have our work cut out for us, including:
* Electing voting rights champions up and down the ballot
* Preventing and mitigating the far right’s attempts at voter suppression
* Getting people all the information they need to make their voices heard at the ballot box
* Responding to a potential Supreme Court ruling that could undermine fair representation for at least a generation— making it even more vital to elect Democracy Champions to the state legislatures that could draw new voting maps

name: Donavan McKinney
subject: re: ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
I won't let them take another life
#
Peter,
I wanted to reach out after recent events. I hope you'll read this through to the end.
On January 7th, ICE's secret police killed a woman in cold blood and shot another person. The week before, they shot two more people.
These aren't the first acts of brutality from ICE, and unless Democrats act, they won’t be the last. In fact, we've always known that they were a danger to our families and the communities they terrorize.
**But despite that, earlier this Congress, Congressman Shri Thanedar VOTED TO 'THANK' ICE FOR EVERYTHING THEY'VE UNLEASHED.**
Specifically, he voted to “express gratitude” to ICE for “protecting our homeland.”
Only cowards surrender to the Trump administration like that.
My opponent supported a destabilizing secret police force because he's afraid and weak when he’s supposed to be defending our district from the Trump regime and fighting back. History will remember him alongside every other coward who bowed to fascism.
_**We can't reward this. Detroit's Congressman needs to play a role in eradicating every part of the infrastructure being used to kill our community members and kidnap our neighbors.**_
Peter, the Mighty 13th can no longer play a role in legitimizing the violence of tyrants. But taking on Thanedar and winning this Democratic primary means fighting AIPAC, corporate fossil fuel giants, and every oligarch trying to maintain their power.
**[Can you help us elect someone in MI-13 who will dismantle Trump's authoritarian secret police, not thank them, by splitting $5 or more to my campaign and Justice Democrats today?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260118-dm.2u3NMp&refcode=em20260118-37381&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=2&akid=37381%2E1203867%2EZGzvJU)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260118-dm.2u3NMp&refcode=em20260118-37381&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=21&akid=37381%2E1203867%2EZGzvJU)**
In solidarity,
Donavan McKinney

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260118-37381-footer&t=22&refcode2=37381_1203867_ZGzvJU&akid=37381%2E1203867%2EZGzvJU)**
---

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: 🪖 To ALL VoteVets supporters: We're humbly asking for your support 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter — Please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
#
Peter - please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
Thank you.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $21. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation before midnight. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan26.F9DuEZ&refcode=em260118-1-160&t=1&akid=34886%2E3013755%2EOFh7rP)

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Here’s where you come in.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4639%2E582294%2EYToEjd)
Hey, it’s Chris.
I’m running to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate because we have to fix this system that is too broken to serve the people.
But this race is officially locked in a tie. GOP billionaires have been funneling money into our race to close our lead. **_They’re determined to stop Democrats from flipping the Senate._**
I know that we can win because we have something they don’t. We have a powerful grassroots team of volunteers and small-dollar donors (like you) who believe in the same values: Taking on the biggest challenges. Fighting for working families. Defending our freedoms and standing up to MAGA extremism.
**[Together we can win that fight — so I’m asking for your help. Will you chip in $5 or anything you can spare so we can keep New Hampshire blue and take back the Senate?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260118_1.n9Uaxz&refcode=em20260118-1&t=2&akid=4639%2E582294%2EYToEjd)**

Thanks,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**

body:
FBI issues urgent warning

Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
**FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

name: James Talarico
subject: I nearly died
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
When I was 28 years old, I almost died.
I was running in my first race for the Texas House. I decided to walk the entire length of my district — 25 miles in one day — holding town halls along the way. I wasn’t worried — I hike Big Bend every year!
But about halfway through, I started feeling nauseous and fatigued. I threw up a couple of times on the way, but figured I was just dehydrated. Somehow, I finished.
When I got home, I slept for 36 hours. My family rushed me to the ER, where nurses checked my blood sugar. I was immediately diagnosed with type 1 diabetes. I was in diabetic ketoacidosis, which ends in coma and death without insulin.
When I got out of the ICU, I went to Walgreens to pick up my first 30-day supply of insulin. It cost me $684 for a necessary medicine that costs Big Pharma $10 to produce. I didn’t have that kind of money (most Texans don’t, either) — so I put it on my credit card.
This is why so many people with diabetes ration or skip doses. Some of them die because of it.
**So when I got elected, I passed bills to cap the price of insulin at $25 a month.**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260118-1-ak&t=1&akid=396%2E1347274%2E1RL6rl)
For years, politicians allowed Big Pharma to push people into bankruptcy or face death because corporate profit came first. With our bill, we put an end to Big Pharma’s manipulation of the insulin market, which drives up prices to maximize profit.
It’s time to take our fight for guaranteed health care to our nation’s capital and finally put the lives of Americans over the profits of billionaire mega-donors and special interests.
But I’ll be honest: it’s going to be expensive. **Big Pharma will likely come after me in this race, pouring millions of dollars into corporate PACs to defeat our movement.** And we have to fight back without a single dollar from corporate PACs.
**[Your support would mean a lot to me. If you believe we need new leaders fighting for the people in Washington, please consider making a donation to our campaign today as we sprint toward the primary on March 3.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260118-1-ak&t=2&akid=396%2E1347274%2E1RL6rl)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

| **[Donate $25](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-2026q1.TbKB0H&refcode=em260118-1-ak&t=22&akid=396%2E1347274%2E1RL6rl)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-2026q1.N0mCc7&refcode=em260118-1-ak&t=23&akid=396%2E1347274%2E1RL6rl)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/499?c0=jt-em-2026q1.2kKV7e&refcode=em260118-1-ak&t=24&akid=396%2E1347274%2E1RL6rl)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/500?c0=jt-em-2026q1.MJJTjD&refcode=em260118-1-ak&t=25&akid=396%2E1347274%2E1RL6rl)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-2026q1.jmBlL0&refcode=em260118-1-ak&t=26&akid=396%2E1347274%2E1RL6rl)**
---
****
I know what it means to fight for my life. In the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight for yours.
James

Austin, TX 78761

subject: This flag tells their story — claim yours now
body:
A powerful symbol. A historic moment. A mission worth joining. | | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0e79b266bda1443da22f49dbb82380e5&_e=_bHOo-OEV6QrwV-0T4H_6Al4-k3jNo0ZhbbCd9_wXcYvU3UWDVdFLx94AfcpAs-aXYFTU0hph1mn5ybg4qd5WKIdiw-BQxVt1xKdaJiB_7RrrrLYDew3HnwD5PLkxUJNFASRud-tsAWMAke4rT4mr8naReEOSKGFOvWogYyEzCVQOEFYbUV49shXEWbKCsRTIuKQ4ZnLMdLdwamiHvwFfmHBYq5BZTt9aN2nCpCnmuhgCwitFhTGeBirSD_lRCRX1vmDp1zYfZX3rulejDuktxJ8qCJXLF7KjWbfkB6H-eN5J46NPhFd6QjH_UiaBDZIzO9xtOPgkLedOz01ayi2Xl_7XDAdwX8ckQQq5ROD8kH4zALkFPhG8L_poDGbGnL6evpQWnXIEW2xn8tVB3D-vhDYquG1S6e4s2eRBtMrGk0FiP4yanY-66RwHBPMZEysMi20djTB4kVeI4S0iXa-eR2rcKIzsBAzne48f3NfWgRTA2iOipf3PLu8eaftGBq_1CaZWy4JXKOjwZA3ySC5DF9ONBuoP5kMv2dqYssvpfnVPSB8de46qtZ1UEAQXiazzHnzNhqi3j_FpEWfbzsmkXXMCXaDMFHEFMSyo6WQSaE2-ZEoXfdr40iyJTj1QmOfdlHZPGMnNgBYOiucFRcLslYqlsig-ftXm2-j5kakkzeKtNfEDwn-hZqi2ak6g0gc1dBfPzE0vAQ10Oi3VVByVctRUO5G8j5v9oUr1aprNVh3CNhj83v1dvwJR2ObryYBbIP069jKt4CjWNYfWtqtMQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.

clean_body: A powerful symbol. A historic moment. A mission worth joining. | | | Fellow Patriot, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce " American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes," a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations. But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it. This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year. We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale. This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Fellow Patriot -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free. Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars. And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you. To some, it may look like just a flag. But to those who served, it 's a promise kept. It flew over the beaches of Normandy. It sailed with the Pacific fleet. It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home. This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend. Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last. Fellow Patriot throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall. I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom. Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future. Sincerely, Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. name: Mark Warner
subject: Frankly, it’s pathetic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123564522/595860760/-1720966344?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_260118_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWM3YmZjNC04NGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugd430z43jB86kEp13ZL7M_tuokPj0gdD4yYPKb4Gq8=) Derek,

I want to be direct with you about something that's been on my mind.

In my years in public service, I've always believed that regardless of party, there are certain principles we don't compromise on. Free and fair elections. Independent oversight. The basic idea that the rules apply to everyone, including the people in charge.

That’s why what’s happening right now troubles me deeply.

**Donald Trump and his Republicans aren't only pushing dangerous policies – they're actively weakening the guardrails that allow voters to hold their leaders accountable.** They've gutted inspectors general, sidelined independent oversight, and now they're looking for ways to tilt the playing field in the midterms.

**Frankly, Derek, it’s weak and pathetic – and the consequences to our country are immensely concerning.**

It’s clear that right now, there’s no way for us to hold Trump accountable or bring transparency back to our government – not with Republicans in charge caving to his every whim and every move.

**If we want to finally turn the page on this dangerous chaos, we need to flip the balance of power in Washington – and we need to win in numbers so big even Trump can’t deny them.**

If you're in a position to donate today, I'm asking you to chip in and fuel this fight. Here’s a secure link where you can donate:

[_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mark-warner-2026**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123564524/595860762/-1720966344?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_260118_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWM3YmZjNC04NGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugd430z43jB86kEp13ZL7M_tuokPj0gdD4yYPKb4Gq8=)

Thank you for being part of this work. I don't take your support for granted.

The fight continues,

Mark Warner **Before you go:**

Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters.

**And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia.**

[_**Will you consider a contribution today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building to reelect Mark Warner and flip control of Congress? Your donation today will have a much bigger impact than a donation of the same amount made right before the midterm elections.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123564526/595860764/-1720966344?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_260118_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWM3YmZjNC04NGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugd430z43jB86kEp13ZL7M_tuokPj0gdD4yYPKb4Gq8=)**__********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123564528/595860766/-1720966344?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_260118_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWM3YmZjNC04NGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugd430z43jB86kEp13ZL7M_tuokPj0gdD4yYPKb4Gq8=)**********

clean_body: | | | = Derek, I want to be direct with you about something that's been on my mind. In my years in public service, I've always believed that regardless of party, there are certain principles we don't compromise on. Free and fair elections. Independent oversight. The basic idea that the rules apply to everyone, including the people in charge. That’s why what’s happening right now troubles me deeply. Donald Trump and his Republicans aren't only pushing dangerous policies – they're actively weakening the guardrails that allow voters to hold their leaders accountable. They've gutted inspectors general, sidelined independent oversight, and now they're looking for ways to tilt the playing field in the midterms. Frankly, Derek, it’s weak and pathetic – and the consequences to our country are immensely concerning. It’s clear that right now, there’s no way for us to hold Trump accountable or bring transparency back to our government – not with Republicans in charge caving to his every whim and every move. If we want to finally turn the page on this dangerous chaos, we need to flip the balance of power in Washington – and we need to win in numbers so big even Trump can’t deny them. If you're in a position to donate today, I'm asking you to chip in and fuel this fight. Here’s a secure link where you can donate: = Thank you for being part of this work. I don't take your support for granted. The fight continues, Mark Warner Before you go: Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters. And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia. =****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ots_header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ots_header]
Allow me explain where this all began.

For too long, I saw brilliant young leaders hesitate to run for office. I watched qualified, passionate women sit on the sidelines while men dominated our political landscape. I witnessed crucial voices go unheard in the rooms where decisions were made.

That's why I started Off the Sidelines.

I founded this organization because I believe our democracy is stronger when diverse voices have a seat at the table — and I'm not talking about just any seat. I'm talking about leadership positions.

Since launching Off the Sidelines, we've helped elect Democrats up and down the ballot. But right now, our progress is under threat.

With Republicans controlling the House and Senate, our hard-won gains on everything from health care to workers' rights are on the line.

That's why I'm personally asking you to rush your very first $ donation of the year to Off the Sidelines. We need to raise as much as possible to beat the GOP this November if we’re going to keep recruiting amazing Democrats, provide them with the resources they need to win and take back our majority.

Can I count on you to chip in right away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_em_q12026_ots?amount=]

clean_body: [] Allow me explain where this all began. For too long, I saw brilliant young leaders hesitate to run for office. I watched qualified, passionate women sit on the sidelines while men dominated our political landscape. I witnessed crucial voices go unheard in the rooms where decisions were made. That's why I started Off the Sidelines. I founded this organization because I believe our democracy is stronger when diverse voices have a seat at the table — and I'm not talking about just any seat. I'm talking about leadership positions. Since launching Off the Sidelines, we've helped elect Democrats up and down the ballot. But right now, our progress is under threat. With Republicans controlling the House and Senate, our hard-won gains on everything from health care to workers' rights are on the line. That's why I'm personally asking you to rush your very first $ donation of the year to Off the Sidelines. We need to raise as much as possible to beat the GOP this November if we’re going to keep recruiting amazing Democrats, provide them with the resources they need to win and take back our majority. Can I count on you to chip in right away? [=] If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $ >> [=] DONATE $ >> [=] DONATE $ >> [=] DONATE $ >> [=] DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT >> [] Together in the fight, Kirsten Gillibrand Founder, Off the Sidelines© 2026 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Dan Osborn
subject: People like me aren’t supposed to run for office, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I’ll be the 51st vote in the Senate
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123566949/595868255/358649031?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5689-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM2ODM3MS04N2Y0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCZ2KzUVVlF1jXeZDsdN74cri5ifnJKiTl7RshHB2fw=)
Hello,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts here in Nebraska. But before I do, please let me explain why your donation today is so important.
I'm not rich. I'm not a politician. I'm a blue collar guy who was president of my local union until I was fired for leading a strike.
People like me aren't supposed to be able to run for office – let alone U.S. Senate – and we certainly aren't supposed to be able to win...
**But last year we did almost just that. I got 47% of the vote in one of the closest Senate races in the country. And now, I'm running again for the U.S. Senate – this time against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts.**
In the Senate, I'll be the 51st vote to protect our democracy, the 51st vote to stop the corruption and get money out of politics, and the 51st vote to stand up against the billionaires like Ricketts who have been screwing over working people like me for decades.
And that's exactly why the Super PACs are going to come after me twice as hard this time to try to stop us again from flipping this seat.
**We need to raise $50,000 before our fundraising deadline if we're going to be able to fight back against the lies and win this Senate seat – but right now, we're still short with time running out.**
**[I have nowhere else to turn: Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's to help me defeat billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts and flip Nebraska's Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123566951/595868257/358649031?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5689-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM2ODM3MS04N2Y0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCZ2KzUVVlF1jXeZDsdN74cri5ifnJKiTl7RshHB2fw=)**
I know what it's like to work a 90-hour workweek. I know the value of a dollar. So I truly appreciate any amount you can afford to give.
Thank you – from the bottom of my heart,

Dan Osborn
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=rgEOGfWiPQqhuLEKz0WbOKr04Sw10BIs1PvpagHmwo2q29TKzUINX4TxG2z8QJ8O1UjMAMD%2BqkRq3q5aY%2F2MtfdH0d0KCB%2FPw4FRCoD1FQpIDJlv9oeZlfejX8yXcEMnQU0rK%2BwXyHII8YVrKuxQ5ljuhsWnK2LqNAQMyhvdcv7HZ7UAL9gYC8VYHPLa%2FbKAsXtw808QOQpStNU4zTwcJ47lQsXN6oUrKYvqKNaNPDNIqyWoufoFqK8kJqJCXK0YmU8aUlweQjjqgG1Nug1A%2BColcB4c93P9EsfFeDHoYzS6RAr8PjvAbYNAT0O4qkrT49Z8Wo8wtuKdsDhP%2FAzLV8LPGmt4H0S%2FGEmawULiWrOXHSI8s3dPZycWo7rxN73crHJlkCkBs3Vep9b5zQpj371r%2B890ynolPN35%2FSg7c2w%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
P.O. Box 46110
LAS VEGAS, NV 89114
