name: Chair Amy Carnevale
subject: MassGOP Winter Update
body:
Happy Election Year! As we settle into 2026..
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jhSnN8fx6UfuDXFgSIKyjZ1IvbjpOryfzBkRl31RNtpn_78WkA9420tju35QLZYPhxj2R2wUB8CQenFBZNO96xSngoQbPYozHx7ussiukqXvESnjv-zDvuzQ1L_kvr8EQ2mgUXvt0j2o1hja5myvJw==&c=GzzBu7o1IuQ-iTAVREctUKnIXnAhqC6itK_2T5Gvy53HpIuAU2Gtng==&ch=8k4GGEkgvj9sQ77rUHBfF69nOXzGfVk4-4CADrmZwom395qkpWTSCg==)
---
| MassGOP Winter Update
---
---
| Dear Massachusetts Republicans,
Happy Election Year! As we settle into 2026, I am pleased to share this winter update on the operations and strategic initiatives underway at the Massachusetts Republican Party. MassGOP is fully engaged in preparing for wins up and down the ballot in November 2026. The Party continues to make meaningful progress across all major fronts, including candidate recruitment, Convention, communications, data and finance.
None of this work would be possible without the dedication and commitment of our leadership, local committees, volunteers, donors, and candidates. Your time, treasure, and talent are the foundation of our success, and I am so deeply grateful for everything Republicans like you do to support our message, our candidates, and the GOP here in Massachusetts.
Convention
Planning for next April's Convention is full steam ahead. Our team at the MassGOP is bursting with excitement at the prospect of hosting a successful and fun event in April aimed at winning back the corner office, building our seats in the legislature and re-establishing a Republican presence at the federal level.
---
| |
---
| Held every four years, Convention remains the largest gathering of Republican activists in Massachusetts. Given the hotly contested state-wide races, interest in this convention is already running high. Delegates can expect to hear from notable national figures, as well as the full slate of candidates. Convention Eve continues to be one of the most enjoyable traditions, with campaigns hosting a variety of events throughout the host city.
The MassGOP held four virtual training sessions throughout December and early January for Republican leaders to prepare for delegate caucuses, and those caucuses are now underway. Please help get the word out to interested Republicans to run to be a delegate at the upcoming Convention by encouraging them to attend their hometown caucus.
Our nominating convention celebrates who we are as a party.
---
| | [CAUCUS CALENDAR](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jhSnN8fx6UfuDXFgSIKyjZ1IvbjpOryfzBkRl31RNtpn_78WkA9422xc9U10jh1H3DjCR49uA_0CHBNoDNej74QzbvcrwUfiF5NJOwUXh746x4kgbqCYrA9XmZx7COKjsaOh724BK6ld7RQcF96IFinNXeu8W51HcW26qievJKkJgrqHIX3Laplp22he998K_yCrlqWz7wk=&c=GzzBu7o1IuQ-iTAVREctUKnIXnAhqC6itK_2T5Gvy53HpIuAU2Gtng==&ch=8k4GGEkgvj9sQ77rUHBfF69nOXzGfVk4-4CADrmZwom395qkpWTSCg==)
---
| Strategic Messaging & Issue Framing
Over the past several months, our Communications Team has maintained a high volume of strategic media outreach focused on advancing our core messages of government accountability, fiscal responsibility, and public safety. Messaging has focused on:
* Calling out mismanagement and lack of transparency by the Democratic supermajority, especially regarding the migrant crisis, government spending, and corruption.
* Highlighting how the affordability crisis facing Massachusetts residents is a direct result of the failures of the Healey Administration.
* Highlighting our candidates: reinforcing the Party's vision that the days of one party rule are over this November.

---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jhSnN8fx6UfuDXFgSIKyjZ1IvbjpOryfzBkRl31RNtpn_78WkA9422xc9U10jh1H12efLtT3fxaTA4x--BwBLAuvO4utxomdoPBBowNPdfv_iUJr3miaNJOXHg28l1zJkwVnuDkiMpgLWkDVnfVmG6Ggr3khzuvz4zlk5AV3u48=&c=GzzBu7o1IuQ-iTAVREctUKnIXnAhqC6itK_2T5Gvy53HpIuAU2Gtng==&ch=8k4GGEkgvj9sQ77rUHBfF69nOXzGfVk4-4CADrmZwom395qkpWTSCg==)
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO SEE CHAIR AMY CARNEVALE'S STATEMENT ON THE MASSIVE SNAP FRAUD SCANDAL](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jhSnN8fx6UfuDXFgSIKyjZ1IvbjpOryfzBkRl31RNtpn_78WkA9422xc9U10jh1H12efLtT3fxaTA4x--BwBLAuvO4utxomdoPBBowNPdfv_iUJr3miaNJOXHg28l1zJkwVnuDkiMpgLWkDVnfVmG5ydBlMdvrcf8j33rJOQKxc=&c=GzzBu7o1IuQ-iTAVREctUKnIXnAhqC6itK_2T5Gvy53HpIuAU2Gtng==&ch=8k4GGEkgvj9sQ77rUHBfF69nOXzGfVk4-4CADrmZwom395qkpWTSCg==)
---
| "Under Governor Healey and the Democrats' watch, one of the largest public fraud scandals in Massachusetts' history has been exposed. This isn't an isolated incident -- this is the culture of negligence and lack of accountability that has blossomed under Democrats' One-Party rule in Massachusetts. Now is the time for solutions and real accountability from Democrats; anything less would be a disservice to the millions of hard working Bay Staters our government serves." - MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale
Growing Ranks
In 2025, we proudly welcomed not one, but two, sitting New Bedford City Councilors to the Republican Party. New Bedford Ward 1 City Councilor Leo Choquette left the Democratic Party to join the GOP in December, following in the footsteps of Ward 3 City Councilor Shawn Oliver, who switched his registration from unenrolled to Republican in August.
Massachusetts voters who feel left behind by Democratic leadership are not alone.
From city halls to school committees, Massachusetts Republicans serving in government continue to grow the party from the ground up, including:
* Shaunna O'Connell, Mayor of Taunton
* Todd Taylor, Chelsea City Councilor
* Mark Bodanza and Thomas Ardinger, Leominster City Councilors
* Rick Coughlin, Weymouth Town Councilor
* Jeffrey Thompson, Brockton City Councilor
* Jay DiLisio and Jonathan Tavares, Attleboro City Councilors; and so many more...

2025 also saw the election of a new wave of Republican voices, including:
* Christopher Peckham, Fall River City Council
* Jaclyn Corriveau, Peabody City Council
* Will Crocker, Barnstable Town Council
* Sean Powers, Braintree Light Board

And Republican-backed candidates earned important victories on several school committees, including:
* Marc Kurzberg, Braintree School Committee
* Maura Ryan-Ciardiello, Haverhill School Committee
* Stephen Pina, Brockton School Committee
* Kathleen Roy, re-elected to the Worcester School Committee

Special shoutout to Jaclyn Corriveau, whose successful Peabody City Council campaign led the field in grassroots outreach, knocking more than 5,300 doors! Congratulations to Jackie on this outstanding and well-earned accomplishment.
Finance
MassGOP raised $1,425,300 in 2025, representing 140% of our $1,015,000 goal for the year. Those funds were raised methodically (I can't count the hours of phone calls!) to support down-ballot candidates at record levels while simultaneously buttressing the Party's balance sheet.
By bringing key services in-house and negotiating aggressively, we delivered meaningful savings direct to our candidates last year:
* $130,000 in coordinated candidate mail at a postage savings of nearly 60 cents per piece, representing approximately $80,000 in savings.
* $20,000 saved through the Party's own coordinated texting service, enabling candidates to bypass more expensive outside vendors.

These savings were passed on to nearly 100 municipal candidates over the course of the year, resulting in historic levels of support for the Party's bench of up-and-coming talent.
In case you missed our recent news, MassGOP endorsed U.S. Senate candidate John Deaton, advised by Republican State Committee Member Caroline Alcock Cunningham, recently made what we believe is the largest ever contribution to the MassGOP. John's exceedingly generous contribution was made to unite the party by retiring much of the remaining debt left by past party leaders. The financial health of the Massachusetts Republican Party has finally been restored, better positioning our Party for victory in November - up and down the ticket.
New Hire
Aidan Carey is MassGOP's Political & Data Advisor. Aidan joins us after serving as the Executive Director of the Rhode Island Republican Party. As we seek to expand our reach and drive electoral success, Aidan will be point on:
* Ensuring cohesion between state party efforts and down-ballot campaigns.
* Identifying and recruiting strong candidates.
* Analyzing historical election and turnout data to inform cycle goals.
* Managing the GOP Data Center, Numinar, and all related data systems.

Aidan has already proved that his experience working closely with party leadership, campaigns, and grassroots organizations make him an asset to our Political & Data operation as we dive into 2026.
Aidan can be reached by email at [aidan@massgop.com](mailto:aidan@massgop.com).
---
| Candidate Recruitment
The MassGOP is actively recruiting candidates to run for office at the county, state and federal level. Over the new year, we ran the ad below in targeted districts. Party leadership completed a series of seven recruitment and training sessions across the state, in Worcester, New Bedford, Essex County, Western Massachusetts, and on the Cape! This follows our spring trainings held in Fall River, Holyoke, Lawrence, Worcester, Hanover, Waltham, and Gloucester. The MassGOP is leaving no corner of the Commonwealth uncovered!
---
|
---
If rising costs, high taxes, and lack of accountability concern you, our Commonwealth needs YOU!
You don't need to be a politician, just someone who cares. If you're considering running for office or know someone who should, please take the first step and contact MassGOP Political and Data Advisor Aidan Carey at [aidan@massgop.com](mailto:aidan@massgop.com).
Looking Ahead
The Massachusetts Republican Party enters 2026 unified, financially stable, and ready to win. Our April convention will be a celebratory occasion for Republicans to come together and warn Democrats that their era of one-party rule ends in November. Hope to see you there.
Thank you for your support, confidence, and activism as we head into the breach!
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
| Amy Carnevale Chair, Massachusetts Republican Party
---
| |
---
| P.S. - Meet the Declared Statewide Candidates:
---
| |
---
Mike Kennealy Governor
---

clean_body: Happy Election Year! As we settle into 2026.. | | | | | | | == | MassGOP Winter Update | Dear Massachusetts Republicans, Happy Election Year! As we settle into 2026, I am pleased to share this winter update on the operations and strategic initiatives underway at the Massachusetts Republican Party. MassGOP is fully engaged in preparing for wins up and down the ballot in November 2026. The Party continues to make meaningful progress across all major fronts, including candidate recruitment, Convention, communications, data and finance. None of this work would be possible without the dedication and commitment of our leadership, local committees, volunteers, donors, and candidates. Your time, treasure, and talent are the foundation of our success, and I am so deeply grateful for everything Republicans like you do to support our message, our candidates, and the GOP here in Massachusetts. Convention Planning for next April's Convention is full steam ahead. Our team at the MassGOP is bursting with excitement at the prospect of hosting a successful and fun event in April aimed at winning back the corner office, building our seats in the legislature and re-establishing a Republican presence at the federal level. | | | Held every four years, Convention remains the largest gathering of Republican activists in Massachusetts. Given the hotly contested state-wide races, interest in this convention is already running high. Delegates can expect to hear from notable national figures, as well as the full slate of candidates. Convention Eve continues to be one of the most enjoyable traditions, with campaigns hosting a variety of events throughout the host city. The MassGOP held four virtual training sessions throughout December and early January for Republican leaders to prepare for delegate caucuses, and those caucuses are now underway. Please help get the word out to interested Republicans to run to be a delegate at the upcoming Convention by encouraging them to attend their hometown caucus. Our nominating convention celebrates who we are as a party. | | == | Strategic Messaging & Issue Framing Over the past several months, our Communications Team has maintained a high volume of strategic media outreach focused on advancing our core messages of government accountability, fiscal responsibility, and public safety. Messaging has focused on: Calling out mismanagement and lack of transparency by the Democratic supermajority, especially regarding the migrant crisis, government spending, and corruption. Highlighting how the affordability crisis facing Massachusetts residents is a direct result of the failures of the Healey Administration. Highlighting our candidates: reinforcing the Party's vision that the days of one party rule are over this November. | == | | == | "Under Governor Healey and the Democrats' watch, one of the largest public fraud scandals in Massachusetts' history has been exposed. This isn't an isolated incident -- this is the culture of negligence and lack of accountability that has blossomed under Democrats' One-Party rule in Massachusetts. Now is the time for solutions and real accountability from Democrats; anything less would be a disservice to the millions of hard working Bay Staters our government serves." - MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale Growing Ranks In 2025, we proudly welcomed not one, but two, sitting New Bedford City Councilors to the Republican Party. New Bedford Ward 1 City Councilor Leo Choquette left the Democratic Party to join the GOP in December, following in the footsteps of Ward 3 City Councilor Shawn Oliver, who switched his registration from unenrolled to Republican in August. Massachusetts voters who feel left behind by Democratic leadership are not alone. From city halls to school committees, Massachusetts Republicans serving in government continue to grow the party from the ground up, including: Shaunna O'Connell, Mayor of Taunton Todd Taylor, Chelsea City Councilor Mark Bodanza and Thomas Ardinger, Leominster City Councilors Rick Coughlin, Weymouth Town Councilor Jeffrey Thompson, Brockton City Councilor Jay DiLisio and Jonathan Tavares, Attleboro City Councilors; and so many more... 2025 also saw the election of a new wave of Republican voices, including: Christopher Peckham, Fall River City Council Jaclyn Corriveau, Peabody City Council Will Crocker, Barnstable Town Council Sean Powers, Braintree Light Board And Republican-backed candidates earned important victories on several school committees, including: Marc Kurzberg, Braintree School Committee Maura Ryan-Ciardiello, Haverhill School Committee Stephen Pina, Brockton School Committee Kathleen Roy, re-elected to the Worcester School Committee Special shoutout to Jaclyn Corriveau, whose successful Peabody City Council campaign led the field in grassroots outreach, knocking more than 5,300 doors! Congratulations to Jackie on this outstanding and well-earned accomplishment. Finance MassGOP raised $1,425,300 in 2025, representing 140% of our $1,015,000 goal for the year. Those funds were raised methodically (I can't count the hours of phone calls!) to support down-ballot candidates at record levels while simultaneously buttressing the Party's balance sheet. By bringing key services in-house and negotiating aggressively, we delivered meaningful savings direct to our candidates last year: $130,000 in coordinated candidate mail at a postage savings of nearly 60 cents per piece, representing approximately $80,000 in savings. $20,000 saved through the Party's own coordinated texting service, enabling candidates to bypass more expensive outside vendors. These savings were passed on to nearly 100 municipal candidates over the course of the year, resulting in historic levels of support for the Party's bench of up-and-coming talent. In case you missed our recent news, MassGOP endorsed U.S. Senate candidate John Deaton, advised by Republican State Committee Member Caroline Alcock Cunningham, recently made what we believe is the largest ever contribution to the MassGOP. John's exceedingly generous contribution was made to unite the party by retiring much of the remaining debt left by past party leaders. The financial health of the Massachusetts Republican Party has finally been restored, better positioning our Party for victory in November - up and down the ticket. New Hire Aidan Carey is MassGOP's Political & Data Advisor. Aidan joins us after serving as the Executive Director of the Rhode Island Republican Party. As we seek to expand our reach and drive electoral success, Aidan will be point on: Ensuring cohesion between state party efforts and down-ballot campaigns. Identifying and recruiting strong candidates. Analyzing historical election and turnout data to inform cycle goals. * Managing the GOP Data Center, Numinar, and all related data systems. Aidan has already proved that his experience working closely with party leadership, campaigns, and grassroots organizations make him an asset to our Political & Data operation as we dive into 2026. Aidan can be reached by email at mailto:aidan@massgop.com. | Candidate Recruitment The MassGOP is actively recruiting candidates to run for office at the county, state and federal level. Over the new year, we ran the ad below in targeted districts. Party leadership completed a series of seven recruitment and training sessions across the state, in Worcester, New Bedford, Essex County, Western Massachusetts, and on the Cape! This follows our spring trainings held in Fall River, Holyoke, Lawrence, Worcester, Hanover, Waltham, and Gloucester. The MassGOP is leaving no corner of the Commonwealth uncovered! | If rising costs, high taxes, and lack of accountability concern you, our Commonwealth needs YOU! You don't need to be a politician, just someone who cares. If you're considering running for office or know someone who should, please take the first step and contact MassGOP Political and Data Advisor Aidan Carey at mailto:aidan@massgop.com. Looking Ahead The Massachusetts Republican Party enters 2026 unified, financially stable, and ready to win. Our April convention will be a celebratory occasion for Republicans to come together and warn Democrats that their era of one-party rule ends in November. Hope to see you there. Thank you for your support, confidence, and activism as we head into the breach! Sincerely, | | | Amy Carnevale Chair, Massachusetts Republican Party | | | P.S. - Meet the Declared Statewide Candidates: | | Mike Kennealy Governor | == | | Mike Minogue Governor | == | | Brian Shortsleeve Governor | == | | | | | Anne Brensley Lieutenant Governor | == | Elizabeth Dionne Treasurer | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

We’re running a targeted radio and digital ad campaign across the district right now. These ads are hitting the airwaves and appearing on screens — telling voters what’s at stake and urging them to vote.
But ads cost money. And if we can’t keep funding this push, the ads stop running. If the ads stop, awareness drops. If awareness drops, turnout falls.
We’ve seen the power of strong outreach before. Last year, strategic ad buys helped flip key races in Georgia. Now, we have a chance to do it again — **but only if we can afford to keep our message in front of voters through Tuesday.**
[Will you chip in $10 right now to help fund our final ad blitz? clean_body: This is not an update I wanted to send, folks. Our fundraising has plummeted since the start of this month.👇 = = | | = We thought that 2026 would spark momentum with our grassroots team. We thought that Democrats everywhere would give whatever they could to flip the Senate. And we thought that pundits saying the Senate majority is within our grasp would energize people. But what our team didn’t expect is being at risk of falling behind before we even get started. If we can’t get back on track and reach our daily goal, it means fewer resources to reach voters, fewer conversations in key battleground states, and ending January in the red. But I’m not ready to throw in the towel, folks. Not in a fight this important. = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s do this, Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: We did not expect this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We truly did not expect the HUGE response we got
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2032%2E791427%2ELMCfn-)
Wow friend, we didn’t expect this!
On Thursday, we reached to share Ilhan’s petition calling on Congress to join her in the push to impeach DHS Secretary Kristi Noem.
We knew that folks had seen the footage coming out of Minnesota. We knew that people are fed up with ICE’s brutality and this administration’s cruelty. But we truly did not expect the HUGE response we got.
Thousands and thousands of people signed on to say loud and clear: ICE is out-of-control, Kristi Noem is unfit for the job, and she must be impeached. It’s proof that Americans of all backgrounds are sick and tired of ICE’s trampling of civil rights and the Constitution.
Now, those people are hoping you will join them as we build a powerful grassroots movement to oppose Trump and Noem’s immigration crackdowns and political retribution.
[**Please, take just 30 seconds and add your name to our petition calling for Kristi Noem to be impeached. When the Executive Branch has lost control, it’s up to Congress to do its job and seek accountability. That starts with Kristi Noem and her failed leadership at DHS.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-impeach-kristi-noem/?source=em260118-1-180&akid=2032%2E791427%2ELMCfn-)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-impeach-kristi-noem/?source=em260118-1-180&akid=2032%2E791427%2ELMCfn-)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

name: Team Cooper
subject: How we started 2026
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
Happy 2026, Peter! We’ve had a busy start to 2026 over here at Team Cooper HQ — check it out! 👇
* * *
**ROY ON THE ROAD** [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4396?t=7&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr) When Roy was Governor, he helped to rename Exit 30 after North Carolina’s own NBA great Steph Curry — and over the holidays, he joined the ceremony to officially honor Steph on court at Davidson University. [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4397?t=8&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr) _Roy joined the Big Hitters Only podcast to talk UNC 2025-26 Tar Heels, why he’s running for U.S. Senate, and what the most important issues are for North Carolinians.**[Check it out on Apple Podcasts](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4398?t=9&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)** or **[listen on Spotify!](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4399?t=10&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)**_ | [APPLE PODCASTS](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4398?t=11&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
---
[SPOTIFY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4399?t=12&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
---
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4400?t=13&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
Roy met with faith leaders and business owners back in Rocky Mount. It was good to be back in his hometown area.
* * *
**HEALTH CARE ROUNDTABLE**
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4401?t=14&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
Recently, Roy participated in a roundtable discussion about health care. Too many of us face difficulties just trying to get the care we need — from rising costs, to an overall lack of access, to surprise bills and beyond.
**[Now, we want to hear from you: will you tell us about your experiences trying to access health care?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_HealthCareRoundtable_011726/?source=em_RC_OTH_NEWSLETTER_011826&t=15&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)**
[SHARE YOUR STORY](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_HealthCareRoundtable_011726/?source=em_RC_OTH_NEWSLETTER_011826&t=16&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
---
* * *
**ICYMI: ROY’S PROMISE**
Recently, Roy made a promise: as a candidate and as a sitting U.S. Senator, he will neither hold nor sell individual stocks.
Our elected officials in Congress and leaders in the Executive branch receive briefings and make decisions every day that affect the stock market. Their duty is to their constituents and the American people, not their bank accounts, and it should stay that way.
**[Sign on if you agree: Members of Congress and Executive branch leaders shouldn’t be allowed to own or trade individual stocks while they hold office.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/stocktradingpetitionv2/?source=em_RC_OTH_NEWSLETTER_011826&t=17&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/stocktradingpetitionv2/?source=em_RC_OTH_NEWSLETTER_011826&t=18&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
---
* * *
**RAISING FUNDS ALL ACROSS NC 👀**
Last week, we announced that during the fourth quarter of 2025, **this campaign earned donations from all 100 North Carolina counties!**
GOP PACs and dark money groups keep pouring millions into North Carolina, but we’re building a people-powered operation to earn every vote and win the most competitive race in the country. **[You can invest in this work by chipping in right here.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4402?t=19&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4402?t=20&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
---
* * *
**GET INVOLVED 📋**
This is going to be one of the most expensive and competitive races this whole year — and we can’t win without you! Races are won face-to-face, door-to-door, and neighbor-to-neighbor. **[Sign up to volunteer right here.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4403?t=21&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)**
[SIGN UP](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4403?t=22&akid=376%2E124072%2EDbhlOr)
---
* * *
That’s all for now. See you again next time!
— Team Cooper

---|---|---|---|---
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I will not let this stand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1378%2E181023%2E24KMPJ)
Friend, this headline is ridiculous and concerning.
Republicans are trying to pass this legislation off as a safeguard to defend the integrity of our elections. But the _SAVE Act_ is not a safeguard, **it’s a trick.**
The _SAVE Act_ would drastically change the way elections are run by:
→ Requiring voters to register in person with their birth certificate, U.S. passport, or naturalization certificate.
→ Eliminating a voter’s ability to register to vote online or by mail.
→ Forcing voters to go to an election clerk’s office every time they update their registration or change their address.
Its goal is not to “SAVE” democracy, but to end it. I will not let this stand. And neither should you.
As Michigan’s Secretary of State, I have worked to protect every eligible Michigander’s right to vote. And as Michigna’s next governor, I will continue standing in defense of every citizen’s right to vote.
**[Will you chip in now to help me fight to ensure every voice is heard, and every vote counts?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2224?c0=jmb-em-q12026.GtzdDm&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260118_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1378%2E181023%2E24KMPJ)**

subject: Why everyone wants to move to Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:

Peter, The numbers are clear — Oregon is leading the nation with the most inbound movers to our state. That means more folks are looking to head to Oregon than anywhere else. People know what Governor Kotek knows: Oregon is a great place to call home. Tina has been working for years to make Oregon an even greater place to live: defending Oregon values by protecting abortion access and provider safety, standing up for vote-by-mail protections, and founding the West Coast Health Alliance with other governors to safeguard public health. Now, her work is being rewarded by more neighbors moving in to take advantage of our great communities, strong values, and opportunities for everyone. name: ChrisForJustice.com
subject: Our extreme opponent could support a six-week abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260118-1025&t=1&akid=1031%2E294397%2EndYZ8H)
Folks,
At a recent event, our extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, said something every Wisconsinite needs to hear for themselves.
Lazar made it clear she could support a **six-week abortion ban** — one of the most extreme restrictions in the country.
A six-week ban would mean many people are denied reproductive healthcare access before they even know they’re pregnant.
This is exactly why right-wing special interests are lining up behind her, and why they’re preparing to spend millions to try to buy this Wisconsin Supreme Court seat.
What happens next depends on us.
**If we want a court that protects people’s freedoms instead of rolling them back, we have to act now.**
[**Rush a donation of $10 or any amount today to help us build the grassroots strength to elect Judge Chris Taylor and stop extremism from taking hold of our courts:**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260118_1_ak.CQybmk&amount=10&refcode=em20260118-1025&t=3&akid=1031%2E294397%2EndYZ8H)

clean_body: Folks, At a recent event, our extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, said something every Wisconsinite needs to hear for themselves. Lazar made it clear she could support a six-week abortion ban — one of the most extreme restrictions in the country. A six-week ban would mean many people are denied reproductive healthcare access before they even know they’re pregnant. This is exactly why right-wing special interests are lining up behind her, and why they’re preparing to spend millions to try to buy this Wisconsin Supreme Court seat. What happens next depends on us. If we want a court that protects people’s freedoms instead of rolling them back, we have to act now. Thank you, Team Taylor

name: Jon Ossoff via Heartland Patriots
subject: Why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Let me lay this out, clear as day:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99569?refcode=em20260118-9948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9948%2E614464%2E_2Sudp)
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight — **[please split $5 between my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99569?refcode=em20260118-9948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9948%2E614464%2E_2Sudp)**
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99569?refcode=em20260118-9948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9948%2E614464%2E_2Sudp)**
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
**[Please split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99569?refcode=em20260118-9948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9948%2E614464%2E_2Sudp)**
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99569?refcode=em20260118-9948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9948%2E614464%2E_2Sudp)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=6&akid=9948%2E614464%2E_2Sudp). name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: What real patriotism looks like
body:
[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?t=1001&akid=3829%2E898137%2Ejb0Xt8 ][IMG]

Hi friend,

I want to share something I said recently because it's a question I think
a lot of us grapple with: What does it really mean to be patriotic?

It’s not patriotic to build ballrooms while cutting SNAP benefits. It’s
not patriotic to pad your own pockets while claiming that “affordability”
is some kind of hoax.

What is patriotic is rebuilding the American dream. It’s rebuilding
democracy and showing Washington how we get things done in Michigan:
delivering for our families and communities. It’s the commitment we have
to rebuild the country and deliver for Michiganders.

That’s why I launched this campaign. Not because politics is glamorous or
easy (spoiler alert: it’s not) but because I believe in a version of
America that actually works for the people who live here.

I want us to have a government that reflects our values — fairness,
opportunity, dignity — and that means pushing back against the powers that
are more interested in headlines than helping people chart a path forward
to a New American Dream where affordable and accessible housing,
healthcare, and childcare are a reality, not a pipe dream.

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-jan2026.Z4k7f1&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260118_AM1_V1_S1&t=1002&akid=3829%2E898137%2Ejb0Xt8 ]If you’re with me and you’re ready to help us build a campaign that’s
grounded in reality and common sense, I’d be grateful for your support
today.

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-jan2026.Z4k7f1&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260118_AM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=3829%2E898137%2Ejb0Xt8 ]DONATE NOW

Thank you for being with us.

— Mallory

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3829%2E898137%2Ejb0Xt8

This petition is registered to you only.

Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

_Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory._

**Now, Sen. Elizabeth Warren is urgently pleading with Democrats:**
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72147?t=10&akid=23830%2E4449941%2EFDQl9J)
We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.

**So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again.**

[**_If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72147?t=11&akid=23830%2E4449941%2EFDQl9J)

name: Christina Bohannan for Congress
subject: The American dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Working families can count on Mariannette Miller-Meeks to throw them under the bus at every turn.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123570012/595876410/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEyZjFiMC04ZWY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CstimkkrvrPliuDG9QvvjrzqbYFcQHU26GlS_uBBJ5U=)

Peter, out-of-state groups are working overtime to sell another two years of Mariannette Miller-Meeks. The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just released a video praising Miller-Meeks for all her "hard work" for our district. But we know better, and that's why we HAD to debunk some of their claims:

**CLAIM #1:** "Mariannette Miller-Meeks is an America First fighter delivering real results for Iowans every day."

**THE TRUTH: Mariannette Miller-Meeks is a fighter for her party and her corporate donors.** In 2025, Iowans had to beg her to hold a town hall for months — even when she did, it was heavily censored.

**CLAIM #2:** "Working families know they can count on her to protect the American Dream and expand opportunity across the state."

**THE TRUTH: Working families can count on her to throw them under the bus at every turn.** Last year, she voted to kill tax credits that provided a lifeline for blue collar workers and their families. At the same time, she's also stood firmly behind crushing tariffs that are destroying family farms and small businesses.

**CLAIM #3:** "My biggest priority, I would say, is to help to lower costs for the average American and making sure that they have economic opportunities that increase their wages that help them."

**THE TRUTH: Again, this is the _same_ person who keeps supporting chaotic tariffs and voting in line with her corporate sponsors. She's also voted to make healthcare even more expensive** by voting against lowering medication prices, voting against extending the ACA tax credits, and rubber stamping the largest Medicaid cut in history.

Her record speaks for itself, Peter. **[This woman is not fit to represent our district. Help us replace her with a leader who will actually fight for Iowans by chipping in to Christina's campaign today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123570013/595876411/-2011951990?refcode=em26_260118_FRMMM_fnd_gq_act___CB4C_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260118_FRMMM_fnd_gq_act___CB4C_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1b12f1b0-8ef4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEyZjFiMC04ZWY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CstimkkrvrPliuDG9QvvjrzqbYFcQHU26GlS_uBBJ5U=)**

Thank you,

Christina Bohannan for Congress

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

clean_body: Working families can count on Mariannette Miller-Meeks to throw them under the bus at every turn. | = Peter, out-of-state groups are working overtime to sell another two years of Mariannette Miller-Meeks. The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just released a video praising Miller-Meeks for all her "hard work" for our district. But we know better, and that's why we HAD to debunk some of their claims: CLAIM #1: "Mariannette Miller-Meeks is an America First fighter delivering real results for Iowans every day." THE TRUTH: Mariannette Miller-Meeks is a fighter for her party and her corporate donors. In 2025, Iowans had to beg her to hold a town hall for months — even when she did, it was heavily censored. CLAIM #2: "Working families know they can count on her to protect the American Dream and expand opportunity across the state." THE TRUTH: Working families can count on her to throw them under the bus at every turn. Last year, she voted to kill tax credits that provided a lifeline for blue collar workers and their families. At the same time, she's also stood firmly behind crushing tariffs that are destroying family farms and small businesses. CLAIM #3: "My biggest priority, I would say, is to help to lower costs for the average American and making sure that they have economic opportunities that increase their wages that help them." THE TRUTH: Again, this is the same person who keeps supporting chaotic tariffs and voting in line with her corporate sponsors. She's also voted to make healthcare even more expensive by voting against lowering medication prices, voting against extending the ACA tax credits, and rubber stamping the largest Medicaid cut in history. Her record speaks for itself, Peter. = Thank you, Christina Bohannan for Congress Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. Chip in to support her campaign today >> | = = | PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | I’m already a Prime member. | Boxes show up at my door all the time. name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: We need to protect us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
“Supreme Court appears likely to uphold transgender athlete bans.” | |
---
Peter, The Supreme Court heard two cases this week on the legality of banning trans youth from participating in school sports. **Based on early reporting, it’s not looking good:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6HlJAyDtf15-NspJeT6BOS50H6ZcGjXZUO2WtGY-xR6iYa0TjNed3KbeEWSCfZqWeIS4bIn2WcbSwH2hJPG75OGwUzL6JE_qTsoALt--HZHwK_vzZCiD_NUnyh2g0t_ENotxhkC5hoLoMXtpq1VRcvsZh2mn0sE4oAGDwE1mDyl9nE1GWapnwLqFRm3bsJDvSuHOzlZKt0ojgff6U5RzKlsZNwlgGKk3lBxk4VaeNkMd3UilbUlt2yrxnEwpBsu5uIhwxYSrjnBChq3e7GyJesg/4ne/t9gF8wT5Q8W7onn5HK1rIQ/h0/h001.sL6tHZs0KuEeSjTIA6T7KHWd4KK73yAS0a5UXXkOGTU) According to those who were in the room, by the end of the 3.5 hour arguments most of the justices appeared to side with the states that banned a small handful of kids from having fun with their friends on the sports field. One lower court had previously ruled that the Idaho law violated the 14th Amendment’s equal protection clause and discriminates on the basis of sex. Another said the West Virginia law violated Title IX. **But the MAGA justices on the Supreme Court don’t appear to care about the 14th Amendment**** _or_****Title IX. They were more focused on finding ways to rule against trans teenagers than upholding our rights.** Justice Neil Gorsuch tried to lean on a definition of “sex” from 1972. Justice Brett Kavanaugh said there was too much “scientific uncertainty” to rule against the state laws. Chief Justice Roberts even indicated that whatever they rule about the definition of sex “would have to apply across the board and not simply to the area of athletics.” **The MAGA justices can’t reason their way out of an unreasonable decision. These are kids who just want to have a good time, there’s no reason they shouldn’t be protected by laws that were meant to protect everyone.** That’s not even to mention the unfair level of scrutiny and invasive sex verification procedures these laws force transgender teens to face. **It’s clear that the Supreme Court won’t look out for our rights and our most vulnerable community members. They’ve already ruled against trans kids and their right to access critical gender-affirming care. In a democracy, we shouldn’t need to look beyond the justice system to find ways to protect our trans neighbors, friends, and children.** [**United for Democracy will be here every step of the way to fight for the rights of all Americans, including youth trans athletes. We won’t be silent while a corrupt and purchased Supreme Court turns its back on our Constitution.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6HlJAyDtf15-NspJeT6BOS50jRUpqxtRhuZlnp0s0zdIWvghWkD_m7S1V2AoYJl1dvmnm6XfufrlUT3D3EWYb6_Gb1nUB4jf3FbxF8QEbKabYUgUquEneVkfTarxHktpgTyEyz3Gw2HaDk1sdhNp0k3pf-Glyra91rn1SJxZsSVsORFSG32IltU7cAg1BZ4q_1iQtKfUMYzrYGhkosOcQThbyOGHB8J3do5e7vTmxWgDlvheDBwXsJQUGs7ZxCKL5UZumQlEnOvCOC7lGQhJl9Q/4ne/t9gF8wT5Q8W7onn5HK1rIQ/h1/h001.teKTG4hK7fojExgoJGDCKZ5ctDcKxeAvnySkHHuhiHo) Thank you for fighting for our rights, Stasha Rhodes
United for Democracy
---

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: ABOLISH ICE! Add your name now >>
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260118-1839-foote&t=1001&akid=1839%2E342411%2EFiPLYz ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Renee Good was a mother. A wife. A daughter. Someone who mattered deeply
to the people who loved her and the community she called home.

She was killed in her car by an ICE agent who shot her multiple times at
close range. This tragedy was preventable and should never have happened.

And instead of confronting what really took place or demanding real
accountability, Trump’s administration and DHS Secretary Kristi Noem
rushed to justify the killing as “self-defense” — despite video footage
and eyewitness accounts telling a different story.

They didn’t pause, or ask questions, or stand up for Renee’s basic civil
rights.

This is exactly why so many communities live in fear every day. ICE
continues to operate with violence and impunity, and when lives are
destroyed, the government closes ranks rather than telling the truth.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/jan-2026-abolish-ice/?source=em20260118-1839&t=1002&akid=1839%2E342411%2EFiPLYz ]We’re done accepting this. We’re demanding ICE be abolished and removed
from our communities before more lives are lost. We’re asking if you’ll
stand with us today, and add your name.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/jan-2026-abolish-ice/?source=em20260118-1839&t=1003&akid=1839%2E342411%2EFiPLYz ]ADD YOUR NAME

Renee’s life mattered, her family deserves the truth, and no federal
agency should be allowed to operate with this kind of power and zero
accountability.

Thank you,

The Squad Victory Fund

P.S. In the face of this tragedy, signing might not feel like something
big, but it's a way to channel our energy and stay focused and clear in
our demands. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/jan-2026-abolish-ice/?source=em20260118-1839&t=1004&akid=1839%2E342411%2EFiPLYz ]Add your name today >>

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1839%2E342411%2EFiPLYz

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Mary has already proven she can win in Alaska |
---

**This seat is one of our best opportunities to take back the Senate.**

Mary Peltola has already proven she can win statewide in Alaska: She was elected to the state’s at-large U.S. House seat twice before losing by less than three percentage points in 2024. _(Meanwhile, that same year, Trump won the state by 13 points!)_

She’s a proven leader and a fierce advocate for Alaska — not special interests or extremist agendas. Mary was the first woman to represent Alaska in the House of Representatives AND the first Alaska Native member of Congress.

This will be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country. Republicans are already gearing up to pour _millions_ into stopping Mary and propping up her opponent Dan Sullivan.

If we’re going to win, we need to meet this moment _now_. Winning a Senate seat takes resources, organization, and momentum, so this is where the power of EMILYs List can make all the difference.

[**With our help, Democratic pro-choice women like Mary can flip this seat and secure a Democratic Senate majority in 2026. clean_body: Mary has already proven she can win in Alaska | = Peter, I have some exciting news to share: EMILYs List is proud to endorse Mary Peltola for U.S. Senate in Alaska. = | = This seat is one of our best opportunities to take back the Senate. Mary Peltola has already proven she can win statewide in Alaska: She was elected to the state’s at-large U.S. House seat twice before losing by less than three percentage points in 2024. (Meanwhile, that same year, Trump won the state by 13 points!) She’s a proven leader and a fierce advocate for Alaska — not special interests or extremist agendas. Mary was the first woman to represent Alaska in the House of Representatives AND the first Alaska Native member of Congress. This will be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country. Republicans are already gearing up to pour millions into stopping Mary and propping up her opponent Dan Sullivan. If we’re going to win, we need to meet this moment now. Winning a Senate seat takes resources, organization, and momentum, so this is where the power of EMILYs List can make all the difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Tiernan Donohue (she/her/hers) Chief Campaigns Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? name: Team Demand Justice PAC
subject: They’re ruling in lockstep with Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260118-61094&t=1001&akid=61094%2E1407376%2Evsxu1L ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260118-61094&t=1002&akid=61094%2E1407376%2Evsxu1L ]Demand Justice PAC

The Supreme Court is about to make decisions that will shape our country
for decades.

And with a conservative majority that consistently rules in lockstep with
Trump, the stakes couldn’t be higher.

This winter, the Court will hear cases that affect every part of our lives
— climate change, gun rights, presidential power, and even the very
definition of citizenship.

We’ll be clear: these cases are a test of whether the Court serves the
people or serves Trump’s agenda.

An extremist-packed Court is putting every vote, every law, and every
right on the chopping block. Left unchecked, this Court will keep siding
with Trump and powerful interests, rewriting the rules to benefit the few
and strip protections from ordinary Americans.

Demand Justice PAC is not sitting on the sidelines. We’re exposing the
Court, holding justices accountable, mobilizing public pressure, and
fighting to defend our democracy — but we cannot do it alone.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260118.wLIGTg&refcode=em20260118-61094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61094%2E1407376%2Evsxu1L ]Will you chip in $5 today to keep up the fight? Every
donation helps us push back against a Court that threatens to roll back
decades of hard-fought rights and cement Trump’s agenda for a generation.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260118.wLIGTg&amount=5&refcode=em20260118-61094&t=1022&akid=61094%2E1407376%2Evsxu1L ]Donate $5 ››

Thank you,

Team Demand Justice PAC

clean_body: [ ]Demand Justice PAC[ ]Demand Justice PAC The Supreme Court is about to make decisions that will shape our country for decades. And with a conservative majority that consistently rules in lockstep with Trump, the stakes couldn’t be higher. This winter, the Court will hear cases that affect every part of our lives — climate change, gun rights, presidential power, and even the very definition of citizenship. We’ll be clear: these cases are a test of whether the Court serves the people or serves Trump’s agenda. An extremist-packed Court is putting every vote, every law, and every right on the chopping block. Left unchecked, this Court will keep siding with Trump and powerful interests, rewriting the rules to benefit the few and strip protections from ordinary Americans. Demand Justice PAC is not sitting on the sidelines. We’re exposing the Court, holding justices accountable, mobilizing public pressure, and fighting to defend our democracy — but we cannot do it alone. [ ]Will you chip in $5 today to keep up the fight? Every donation helps us push back against a Court that threatens to roll back decades of hard-fought rights and cement Trump’s agenda for a generation. [ ]Donate $5 ›› Thank you, Team Demand Justice PAC

I'm reaching out to you from the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight?

* Most victims are only 12 years old
* 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day
* Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that

We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue:

* $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift
* $50 provides transportation to a safe house
* $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry

One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives.

name: Lisa (via Josh Shapiro HQ)
subject: Uncomfortable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I know you’d much rather be out shopping or preparing for today’s football games

Hi Derek, this is Lisa, Josh Shapiro’s campaign manager. I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I needed to tell you something. I’ve worked in politics for a long time now. And in that time, I’ve learned that sometimes, in order to win, you need to get a little uncomfortable. Take right now for example. I know it’s a Sunday — and I know you’d much rather be out shopping or preparing for today’s football games instead of scrolling through an email from a campaign manager. But trust me, sending you this email makes me a little uncomfortable too. After all, asking for money isn’t exactly my favorite part of the job. But I need to send you this email, Derek. Here’s why: **There’s a saying among folks who work in politics, Derek: As goes Pennsylvania, so goes the nation.** In other words, this election won’t only impact millions of families here in our Commonwealth. The outcome of **this race** will set a narrative in every corner of the country. If we win? _It means we’ve stopped the far-right’s movement dead in its tracks._ But if we lose? _The far-right will become even more powerful — and even more emboldened._ [_**All eyes are on us, Derek. Everyone across the country is watching our campaign — and they’re counting on us to win. We can’t let them down. clean_body: I know you’d much rather be out shopping or preparing for today’s football games Hi Derek, this is Lisa, Josh Shapiro’s campaign manager. I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I needed to tell you something. I’ve worked in politics for a long time now. And in that time, I’ve learned that sometimes, in order to win, you need to get a little uncomfortable. Take right now for example. I know it’s a Sunday — and I know you’d much rather be out shopping or preparing for today’s football games instead of scrolling through an email from a campaign manager. But trust me, sending you this email makes me a little uncomfortable too. After all, asking for money isn’t exactly my favorite part of the job. But I need to send you this email, Derek. Here’s why: There’s a saying among folks who work in politics, Derek: As goes Pennsylvania, so goes the nation. In other words, this election won’t only impact millions of families here in our Commonwealth. The outcome of this race will set a narrative in every corner of the country. If we win? It means we’ve stopped the far-right’s movement dead in its tracks. But if we lose? Fellow Patriot, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cfc195ce81a448c0b1127924ede85181&_e=B7nnT-J9nGtQgkAuvMCclBg724czDnhzss2fDqaeqyM45hQ4exmHCL5K240lL9vYPmUUBtquL4iDpkDWpUzOsCUeg_75GiBDPzyyt5IP2lHyH2tKdhh072zscjVR003BFEIRUDkkgBViEWYTnXfpuwhavMnbUq8w89ufyZiRUk0ia2FQffMxFjBDX8M7wphVwFRBMVW5dyQmO6mXIvgWJYxJkbZ3708v_LE-xJLHjNmJW260FzNlzZ609I5Wnq5nQU-4CcRPWZtU20kp0Wxv9cGQs6-3eUACUjZaG0KDbpvMN3psaU6jJJEt4QIY-08nq8ezgBLFG3-eZWsd6xoLnhR-1JvCFoVOJM66JUL2K2CJrMMCPZhtJnPAFAVdlf6AR9QvnFesihN0rNTR8LEQmPwnMfbP23gLvPKV1lVKkyZ6Tb0DagEI61zmyQu-PdL4hQloJRskemg3rFJm6bJrwiG1NzW1u4ZuKzxXHkhs_3UzBfNuK9qWtC0FbNHBHsWO08OLK6EKT1yBNFYXEHK7CA32GRKkjSjcWqDQ-z-vw0jntJVghXjAlqJ86ynBPotPea0hbgrBuPivifY4LEe1_Yirk5zKuSOWYs7J9J_B68Bqe4L-dVWAmfdXggn51zkf5WdGCk4-IoEThSdal4tGyjvt61FHRJT2cYhdkTFxE3eWwRaT7pg5zZ4v5LGNhRbK_hl5BzC85mLYnQCTBl9PK0RC98yrEocIKYMziA0tBO3k2L4l54qWoxSqVVhaoNd-8IMAb967zSuVG6T8jsJDhA%3D%3D)

This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Fellow Patriot -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Fellow Patriot make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time — and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cfc195ce81a448c0b1127924ede85181&_e=B7nnT-J9nGtQgkAuvMCclBg724czDnhzss2fDqaeqyM45hQ4exmHCL5K240lL9vYPmUUBtquL4iDpkDWpUzOsCUeg_75GiBDPzyyt5IP2lHyH2tKdhh072zscjVR003BFEIRUDkkgBViEWYTnXfpuwhavMnbUq8w89ufyZiRUk0ia2FQffMxFjBDX8M7wphVwFRBMVW5dyQmO6mXIvgWJYxJkbZ3708v_LE-xJLHjNmJW260FzNlzZ609I5Wnq5nQU-4CcRPWZtU20kp0Wxv9SEb8iQxNu9TFEKZXR5HR2OvlwZnYL2BZtutGr8Cz7Ch9REkfmvLuVF1ojDJGtesbPXtE10jB4iu0lt3ufVBuR8Ey7EesTAGeZ-KDAbQTk_RmJ-JthAxn3eL2cc8qlGm8uHoHTU2rpPy2mCjNnxAmNlRcApRzL9zFhcrrSr3KPyrlB8WTwEGquHHfFRmVTU_6AbD7QFk5bz6Wete9FSbH46MOxkd6oznKts3pqw5RdKHNKwg3Oo0EZyggOR81l0SLClxbQ1hJnHWzdB4VzQ9JCGDY_cbC6ys6X_r9pLlQXwLZp_kZlsREbH1neK9r_ppY6zdJD8HsQsi1j8wclvdO-FRdlk5MTlgquAK2FLwBtX25slqBoJpF4MLCXTCskipW3n-YaPmwA5Nznw1t3MCJ6VJ2GKkvHyWJBoX4bRq6UtTMKJhAuzBKX6nRkrKs9yWS9OjE_zlEC6f4yOgGEiWmIeBNnh84f5l4CGh5iW_QUV892vDyiIpmJk7l__8nKkZNg%3D%3D)

Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future.

This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Fellow Patriot -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free. Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars. And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you. To some, it may look like just a flag. But to those who served, it 's a promise kept. It flew over the beaches of Normandy. It sailed with the Pacific fleet. It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home. This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend. Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last. Fellow Patriot throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall. I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom. Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future. Sincerely, Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: One of my biggest frustrations with the Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1575%2E251025%2EWKdiNt ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1575%2E251025%2EWKdiNt ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi Peter,

Can I share something with you? It’s one of my biggest frustrations with
the Democratic Party.

Too often, Democrats talk a big game about “changing the system,” but
then, they turn around and take money from the same corporations that
bankroll Republicans.

Take DTE, for example, Michigan’s largest utilities company.

This is a company with a horrible reputation for ripping off Michiganders
— raising rates, tacking on junk fees, and delivering unreliable service —
while padding profits.

And here’s the part that really gets me:

Democrats and Republicans in this race have taken DTE’s money. I’m the
only candidate who hasn’t and never will. 👇

[ A ]A graphic that says 'DTE spends more to buy off politicians than any
other corporation in Michigan.' There's a bar graph chart with three bars
showing money taken from DTE + Consumers Energy: The Republican in the
race has taken $94,000, the other Democrats in the race have taken
$77,500, and Abdul has taken $0.

So when you hear any politician say they’re going to “upend the status
quo,” you have to check the receipts.

Because if a Democrat is taking money from the same corporations that rip
us off and fuel Republican campaigns, that’s not change. That’s two sides
of the same coin.

Peter, I’m not
running for Senate to play that game.

I’m running to actually take on corporate power. And because of that, I’m
going to be targeted.

Corporate PACs don’t like candidates they can’t buy. The only way we win
is with grassroots support.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260118-1-ak.99EUnV&amount=10&refcode=em20260118-1569&t=1004&akid=1575%2E251025%2EWKdiNt ]If you can pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today, it
would make a huge difference. We're building something different here, but
we can only do it together.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260118-1-ak.99EUnV&amount=10&refcode=em20260118-1569&t=1023&akid=1575%2E251025%2EWKdiNt ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

subject: We need your signature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is how forever wars start.
#
**FIRST:** Donald Trump launched illegal military attacks without congressional approval on Venezuela, completely ignoring the Constitution and putting lives at risk.
**THEN:** He escalated threats to invade multiple countries, treating U.S. military power as his personal weapon.
**NOW:** Trump is openly talking about seizing Greenland by any means necessary, including military force.
**_This is how “forever wars” start.**_
Americans don’t want endless wars. Our troops shouldn’t be sent into harm’s way on a president’s whim.
**That’s why Sarah is fighting to pass new War Powers Resolutions right now — to rein in Donald Trump and stop the next generation of forever wars.** But to win this fight, we need to show just how many people are with her.
[**Add your name now to send a loud and clear message: No more forever wars.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/sign/em-20260118-1-no-forever-wars/?source=em20260118-2704&t=1&akid=2704%2E21716%2E74kDpZ)
