name: Doug Lloyd for MI Attorney General
subject: ICYMI: Let's Put These Rumors to Bed
body:
Before Convention, Please Review the Record
| | |
---
| | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ydJT6P6mu0IH0h75RkUmWL6NrlBq0-2XYuGQWqaJOdYoZeilqlkfAF6SNLjdVmVTmn93gnCAm0C5d8ACREvp_PqEuxk8nG01RrezMlYmN5WcUqlJGxIlU8vlfcrIfdIN5QccNu-KZGogAnb-t0CMnW6ZVA2GdgJC1fqju1LOfjI=&c=OaSReaWRCPgDyLWUAsAeR1BEVbgPI4gzYsKyZJLuP3mETSJvGj3V0Q==&ch=cLwTtItYERp_f3Lk5L2Is_v-bEfj_HtvhDW6bIa0cf944-l8J4rC0g==)
---
| | | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ydJT6P6mu0IH0h75RkUmWL6NrlBq0-2XYuGQWqaJOdYoZeilqlkfAF6SNLjdVmVTmn93gnCAm0C5d8ACREvp_PqEuxk8nG01RrezMlYmN5WcUqlJGxIlU8vlfcrIfdIN5QccNu-KZGogAnb-t0CMnQW4c4r-swt-B7TZjdC5q2c=&c=OaSReaWRCPgDyLWUAsAeR1BEVbgPI4gzYsKyZJLuP3mETSJvGj3V0Q==&ch=cLwTtItYERp_f3Lk5L2Is_v-bEfj_HtvhDW6bIa0cf944-l8J4rC0g==)
---
| | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ydJT6P6mu0IH0h75RkUmWL6NrlBq0-2XYuGQWqaJOdYoZeilqlkfAMAp23TFV6ywKqCbJPQgquRE_2eapIwxRe3Q2_huxH0ZjYMLOjsdxRcIQ58xx6ZUT0zszYk6_IZ1jLADaeZTrKRZLU4ipQfeNqTrof5DCT3_EWdzcSgMmj4uoeSmGX3WCPqbQNwhUpEr1DF70RfX1Xk=&c=OaSReaWRCPgDyLWUAsAeR1BEVbgPI4gzYsKyZJLuP3mETSJvGj3V0Q==&ch=cLwTtItYERp_f3Lk5L2Is_v-bEfj_HtvhDW6bIa0cf944-l8J4rC0g==)
---
| | Friends and Delegates,
I understand that rumors continue to persist about how my office handled the COVID-related mandates in Eaton County. At the top of this email, you will find a short video with a brief explanation. As discussed in the video, there was only one instance early in the pandemic involving law enforcement protecting a closed business, and any COVID-related charge was incidental to the arrest and far more serious charges for Possession of Methamphetamine. The matter was driven by public safety concerns and the need to protect a closed business, not COVID enforcement.
Although my office had the authority to act, our policy was firm. We did not turn ordinary, law-abiding citizens or business owners into criminals over COVID mandates. My office did not have a "snitch" hotline. My staff deliberately identified COVID-related tickets written by law enforcement that were filed with the courts and dismissed them. My office did not participate in any MDHHS civil cease and desist actions, and the Eaton County Prosecutor's Office was not legal counsel for MDHHS.
We focused on real crime, real victims, and public safety.
One of the advantages of serving as an elected public official is simple. Your record is public. Nothing is hidden. Every decision is documented. That is why I invite you to look up my record as Eaton County Prosecutor and judge it for yourself.
You will not find a single instance where I, or my office, shut down a business, targeted job creators, or enforced Governor Whitmer's COVID mandates against law-abiding citizens. In the Eaton County courthouse, I stood firm in defense of the constitutional rights of my constituents.
By contrast, my opponent, while serving as superintendent of Detroit's Catholic schools, publicly discussed and supported compliance with Governor Whitmer's COVID mask mandates for school children. I have included an article below so you can review his own words and draw your own conclusions.
Read Article: [For Catholic school students, wearing a mask is a way to imitate Jesus' sacrifice](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ydJT6P6mu0IH0h75RkUmWL6NrlBq0-2XYuGQWqaJOdYoZeilqlkfAMAp23TFV6ywtpkI_BRkXEwZPMRQoneGM40GVvX0hOH5T6idSSEoQWpZrg6naNzNB7C9XndhULKD_E7A3pUzgUQd7Id2BgiscaP3UEAd91xuZPLF-gk_JHwhaPxddSNWwXgWhwxp94d2mvElVjV3_HE8ITvhj58AHxKP7uaFGqhdpHmPwSD_8JD15DJi72Saqy16sCNFUTm6pFeAQKch8mdrggNwA8HSQA==&c=OaSReaWRCPgDyLWUAsAeR1BEVbgPI4gzYsKyZJLuP3mETSJvGj3V0Q==&ch=cLwTtItYERp_f3Lk5L2Is_v-bEfj_HtvhDW6bIa0cf944-l8J4rC0g==)
This distinction matters, especially as Republicans decide who should carry our banner into the general election.
I don't just talk about conservative principles, I have defended them in court, when it counted. My record is proven, public, and transparent.
I have worked hard to keep this campaign positive and focused on the future of Michigan. But when misinformation is spread in an effort to undermine my integrity, I cannot remain silent.
Before you cast your vote at convention, I respectfully ask that you review the record, consider the facts, and decide who has demonstrated the judgment, independence, and constitutional resolve required to win in November.
Sincerely,

clean_body: Before Convention, Please Review the Record | | | | | == | | | == | | == | | Friends and Delegates, I understand that rumors continue to persist about how my office handled the COVID-related mandates in Eaton County. At the top of this email, you will find a short video with a brief explanation. As discussed in the video, there was only one instance early in the pandemic involving law enforcement protecting a closed business, and any COVID-related charge was incidental to the arrest and far more serious charges for Possession of Methamphetamine. The matter was driven by public safety concerns and the need to protect a closed business, not COVID enforcement. Although my office had the authority to act, our policy was firm. We did not turn ordinary, law-abiding citizens or business owners into criminals over COVID mandates. My office did not have a "snitch" hotline. My staff deliberately identified COVID-related tickets written by law enforcement that were filed with the courts and dismissed them. My office did not participate in any MDHHS civil cease and desist actions, and the Eaton County Prosecutor's Office was not legal counsel for MDHHS. We focused on real crime, real victims, and public safety. One of the advantages of serving as an elected public official is simple. Your record is public. Nothing is hidden. Every decision is documented. That is why I invite you to look up my record as Eaton County Prosecutor and judge it for yourself. You will not find a single instance where I, or my office, shut down a business, targeted job creators, or enforced Governor Whitmer's COVID mandates against law-abiding citizens. In the Eaton County courthouse, I stood firm in defense of the constitutional rights of my constituents. By contrast, my opponent, while serving as superintendent of Detroit's Catholic schools, publicly discussed and supported compliance with Governor Whitmer's COVID mask mandates for school children. I have included an article below so you can review his own words and draw your own conclusions. Read Article: == This distinction matters, especially as Republicans decide who should carry our banner into the general election. I don't just talk about conservative principles, I have defended them in court, when it counted. My record is proven, public, and transparent. I have worked hard to keep this campaign positive and focused on the future of Michigan. But when misinformation is spread in an effort to undermine my integrity, I cannot remain silent. Before you cast your vote at convention, I respectfully ask that you review the record, consider the facts, and decide who has demonstrated the judgment, independence, and constitutional resolve required to win in November. Sincerely, Doug Lloyd Eaton County Prosecuting Attorney Candidate for Michigan Attorney General P.S. The facts are public. The video explains the context. The record speaks for itself. == | | | | | == == == == == == | | | | == == == == | | | | | == | | | | Doug Lloyd for MI Attorney General | PO Box, 80536 | Lansing, MI 48906 US | | | | | | | |

Hi Peter,

We’re officially in an election year, and with January already halfway over, I wanted to share a few important updates on where things stand and why this moment matters so much:
* **This election will determine control of the House.** With just three seats separating control, races including CA-27 will decide whether Democrats can deliver real results or whether Republicans continue to block progress.

* **I’m delivering for our communities, even with the odds stacked against us.** Just this month, the House passed an extension of the ACA tax credits, a critical step toward lowering healthcare costs for families across our communities. It’s a reminder of what’s possible when Democrats stand firm.

* **I’m focused on the issues that hit home.** One year after the devastating Southern California wildfires, recovery is still ongoing. I’m pushing for long-overdue federal disaster relief and introducing legislation to protect the health and safety of the wildland firefighters who put their lives on the line for us.

* **Republicans are already gearing up to flip this seat.** Despite new district lines, political experts continue to rank CA-27 as one of the most competitive races in the country. National Republicans know it, and they’re preparing early to pour money and attacks into this district.

**[If you’re able, I’d be grateful for your support with a contribution of $3 today. clean_body: | = = Hi Peter, We’re officially in an election year, and with January already halfway over, I wanted to share a few important updates on where things stand and why this moment matters so much: This election will determine control of the House. With just three seats separating control, races including CA-27 will decide whether Democrats can deliver real results or whether Republicans continue to block progress. I’m delivering for our communities, even with the odds stacked against us. Just this month, the House passed an extension of the ACA tax credits, a critical step toward lowering healthcare costs for families across our communities. It’s a reminder of what’s possible when Democrats stand firm. I’m focused on the issues that hit home. One year after the devastating Southern California wildfires, recovery is still ongoing. I’m pushing for long-overdue federal disaster relief and introducing legislation to protect the health and safety of the wildland firefighters who put their lives on the line for us. Republicans are already gearing up to flip this seat. Despite new district lines, political experts continue to rank CA-27 as one of the most competitive races in the country. National Republicans know it, and they’re preparing early to pour money and attacks into this district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

body:
Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been...
---
|
---
| | | [Beth Farnham for Congress](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com&sr=0&signature=234e71905ce6fc7ea848d3ba9fc507a0&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) | [Read on blog](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F01%2F18%2Fdistrict-round-up-1-18-26%2F&sr=0&signature=afb20468835356c3945a01d4804b2e13&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) or [Reader](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fblogs%2F213069660%2Fposts%2F6124&sr=0&signature=60db68502ffa640ef0d6b0e437fe77d8&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)

# [District Round-up 1.18.26](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F01%2F18%2Fdistrict-round-up-1-18-26%2F&sr=0&signature=afb20468835356c3945a01d4804b2e13&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on January 18, 2026
---
| Dear Neighbor,
---
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: <https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1>
---
|
---
|
---
Many, many thanks to Eileen and Stu Roberts of Blair County for graciously opening their home on Sunday in order for their friends to meet me and hear about my positions on the issues.
---
It was a lovely afternoon of good friends, good food, and progressive support.
---
If you’re interested in hosting such an event, please reach out to Eileen at VolunteerRecruiterBFFC@gmail.com.
---
Photo credits: Jack Stansbury
---
|
---
Reminder: Sign up to share what is on your heart and mind about the sharply rising costs of healthcare and essentials for Everyday Americans!
---
Town Hall on Healthcare and Affordability
---
Beth Farnham for Congress is excited to host a Town Hall on Healthcare and Affordability on Saturday, January 24, 2026, at The Franklin County Visitors Bureau, 15 S. Main St. Chambersburg, PA 17701 from 2 PM to 4 PM.
---
Check-in will begin for those registered at 1:45 PM, and the town hall will start at 2 PM and end at 4 PM. Because of limited seating, only registered attendees will be admitted. Please allow for check-in time, which is required.
---
Free required registration for the Town Hall here: [https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/chambersburg/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2Fchambersburg%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcUh2MjVLaGlrUGZVNjdKaHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5N1UD9p2WhBiOSS4Fm5DCYbFXWzavwBAnrSS_foNjWjlG7eK1hwUS4lDZx9Q_aem_B0LRLIZq7ZCCzBotJLl0Kw&h=AT0016QV9Lpu6C1HdUx5q7eDRHyIgLDD2zjlTQsEPq4ZSvtm_5bNSlW7tOcUlMox4zKS1lUd7iNcQrF11EYwr0ida0f-TFEs3uY4hYUj0HTipam5UyRVQRVSkal4wlwkw7dFWrNdkcPQhkVgvJp9ja7J9a3ukHs&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT0zJ3Cfhlo53x1JGKgHOzSzO5UHNC7bbfNttAs_wkgz8q_P7VwMqdTKBIBO4qkO_48I9In_bP-nRwB1NWtm5dOc5RzFf-E45TIvIr4NhuZ_06tMKGbhAUav2SrrGSirR7SR2vty03UhG5tNFh0gRDOvH4YmJ48tkGRJIpzpotP8b4KnxoXhO63CDJrZXqjitnOJjULp0rB5a2p6Gow_J911K-CJzQ)
---
There is free parking along Main Street on Saturdays and in the metered public lots. Please do not park behind the church.The Town Hall will take place inside the 11/30 room on the second floor. Please use the ramped side entrance on the left of the building, enter the doors, and use the elevator to go up 1 floor. The check-in process for registered attendees will begin at 1:45 PM. If enough seats are still available, on-site registration may be held.
---
Please note that no signs, firearms, or weapons will be permitted at the event, and security prohibits large bags, backpacks, or diaper bags, but reserves the right to check any bag. The event will be recorded.
---
The event program will be provided at check-in and is the key for entry to the room.
---
Voters from Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional district (PA-13) are urged to attend and share concerns or ask questions of Beth Farnham, candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional district. This event is paid for by Beth Farnham for Congress.
---
|
---
I stand with Governor Tim Walz and the people of Minnesota against the violence of the Trump administration.
---
“The governor also called on Minnesotans to be peaceful as they continue to protest the shooting death of 37-year-old Renee Good.
---
‘We must protest loudly, urgently, but also peacefully,” he said. ‘Indeed, as hard as we will fight in the courts and the ballot box, we cannot and will not let violence prevail.'”
---
The people of Minnesota deserve to exercise their First Amendment rights against the tyrannical government that is the Trump administration.
---
No more Americans nor any person on US soil who is not a threat to others be gunned down by law enforcement. That violence, paid by taxpayers, is at the direction of a criminal who does not have America’s best interest in mind.
---
Please elect me in November so I can hold the Trump administration accountable for their crimes.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/choosedemocracy?__eep__=6&__cft__%5B0%5D=AZYPZoCVXCcP53fdgej-5bhxFuAvkYsLmbCQiLdMzQGaXv-526hx_X8U0AuX4hRw-6iv6WwtZ18rlqX7kHOg3QgodMxYTKuMcgGXIHKdjVpbvrcylKVw3m5ZKpf5yIxfFt-n338007ddl1Z2fxiANoUOC-txyFgF93QL8RzxFU3rEGLjNrMYKa3KspdWLA7PlVRh5DoC2o5qIVOMHuv7ACF2&__tn__=*NK-R) and Justice!
---
|
---
Why am I the best candidate for mental health?
---
Because I believe in MORE funding for mental health and drug addiction services, not less, and in universal healthcare that consistently provides needed treatment independent of employment status.
---
“The Trump administration sent shockwaves through the U.S. mental health and drug addiction system late Tuesday, sending hundreds of termination letters, effective immediately, for federal grants supporting health services.
---
‘We are definitely looking at severe loss of front-line capacity,’ said Andrew Kessler, head of Slingshot Solutions, a consultancy firm that works with mental health and addiction groups nationwide. ‘[Programs] may have to shut their doors tomorrow.'”
---
And the Trump administration should be accountable for the severe harm they are doing to the residents of this country.
---
I have never supported that person who just arbitrarily cut off funding for mental health services.
---
Meanwhile, our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, will likely twist himself into knots because he will try to justify Trump’s horrible actions instead of impeaching Trump for illegally impounding congressionally-approved funds.
---
But it doesn’t have to be this way. Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, in November so that I can work on improving the lives of Everyday Americans.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/choosedemocracy?__eep__=6&__cft__%5B0%5D=AZYcZm0Tohc-WTOqN52DVVVi-CnbDiXhZC2XRvntP-HAcIoHVWNaaa1GgRozwunLWrvdBm6rYK5M26rvUE6BhF8GuKASIqyfG0nMeF0pOV-fzVV48Vxg4BnCW_rX6DBD2ApSyaVX1wRkdM0M_iHPPvFeD5dREp9AIfHYlxXFyqngscxmQxSAvf0LWFjXpN06JDvn8Ss-w8cz-k37Jf-3PiqY&__tn__=*NK-R) and Universal Healthcare!
---
**NEW SECTION! Joyce’s votes on recent legislation**
---
| | | **Legislation**| **Joyce’s vote**| **US House Result**| **How Beth would have voted**| **Rationale for Beth’s vote**
---|---|---|---|---
[H.R.5184 – Affordable HOMES Act](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/5184/text) | Yes| Passed| No| – Repeals Department of Energy (DOE) energy efficiency regulations applicable to manufactured housing and eliminates DOE’s authority to issue similar regulations (Sec. 2).
-Repeals the DOE final rule titled Energy Conservation Program: Energy Conservation Standards for Manufactured Housing and published on May 31, 2022 (Sec. 2).
-Authorizes the DOE to provide recommendations to the Department of Housing and Urban Development for revisions to energy conservation standards applicable to manufactured housing (Sec. 2).
[H.R.6504 – Haiti Economic Lift Program Extension Act](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/6504/text)| No| Passed | Yes| Extends, through December 31, 2028, the special duty-free rules for various apparel products imported from Haiti, including the duty-free treatment provided for a limited amount (referred to as tariff preference levels) of certain apparel products assembled in and imported from Haiti (Sec. 2).
Requires the President to proclaim such modifications to the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States (HTS) that may be necessary to restore preferential treatment to articles that became ineligible for such treatment due to prior revisions to the HTS (Sec. 3).
Specifies that this Act also provides for the refund of duties (i.e., liquidation or reliquidation of entries) on covered articles from Haiti that entered into the United States on or after September 30, 2025, and before the date of this bill’s enactment (Sec. 3).
[H.R.6500 – AGOA Extension Act](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/6500/text)| No| Passed| Yes| Extends, through December 31, 2028, trade preferences that provide duty-free access to the U.S. market for most exports from eligible countries in sub-Saharan Africa (SSA) (Sec. 2).
Specifies that this extension applies to the duty-free treatment of the products of beneficiary SSA countries under the Trade Act of 1974 (specifically, the Generalized System of Preferences) and the African Growth and Opportunity Act (AGOA) (Sec. 2).
Specifies that the extended period applies to the following provisions of AGOA (Sec. 2):
The duty-free treatment of certain apparel articles from beneficiary SSA countries; and
The third-country fabric provision, which allows limited amounts of apparel articles from lesser developed beneficiary SSA countries to qualify for duty-free treatment, even if the yarns and fabrics used in their production are imported from non-AGOA countries (e.g., apparel assembled in Kenya with Chinese fabrics).
Authorizes the refund of duties (i.e., liquidation or reliquidation of entries) on articles from eligible SSA countries that entered into the United States after September 30, 2025, and before the date of this bill’s enactment (Sec. 2).
Extends, through December 31, 2031, customs user fees and merchandise processing fees (Sec. 3)
[H.R.2683 – Remote Access Security Act](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/2683/text)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Expands the scope of the U.S. export control system to include remote access of items (Sec. 2).
Defines “remote access” as either of the following (Sec. 2):
Access to an item subject to the jurisdiction of the United States by a foreign person through a network connection, including the internet or a cloud computing service, from a location other than where the item is physically located; or
Any other form of access specified in regulations promulgated by the Department of Commerce.
Extends the application of export controls under the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (ECRA) to remote access of items, thereby allowing Commerce’s Bureau of Industry and Security to issue licenses and impose penalties related to remote access of controlled items (Sec. 2).
[H.R.4593 – SHOWER Act](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/4593/text)| Yes| Passed| No| It increases water flow to waste water and increase utility bills.
[H.R.2262 – Flexibility for Workers Education Act](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/2262/text)| Yes| Passed| No| Amends the definition of “hours worked” under the Fair Labor Standards Act to exclude certain voluntary training that occurs outside an employee’s regular working hours (Sec. 2).

Specifies that such training does not count as hours worked even if it is offered by the employer, provided that an employee’s working conditions are not adversely affected by choosing not to participate and the employee does not perform any work for the employer during the training (Sec. 2).
[H.R.7006 – Financial Services and General Government and National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs Appropriations Act, 2026](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/7006/text)| Yes| Passed| No| Abortion bans,
weakened contraceptive access, funding to Isreal that perpetrates Gaza murders after “ceasefire”, Palestinian statehood only granted through US Secretary of State, no expanding healthcare coverage.
[H.R.2988 – Protecting Prudent Investment of Retirement Savings Act](https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/2988/text)| Yes| Passed| No| Retirement plans should not include cryptocurrency investments and should consider Environmental, Social, and Governmental factors concerning investment decisions.
Source: <https://justfacts.votesmart.org/candidate/key-votes/178911/john-joyce>
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
---
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
---
Sincerely,
---
Beth
---

clean_body: Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been... | | | | | or ---|---|--- By Elizabeth Farnham on January 18, 2026 | Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: <> | | Many, many thanks to Eileen and Stu Roberts of Blair County for graciously opening their home on Sunday in order for their friends to meet me and hear about my positions on the issues. It was a lovely afternoon of good friends, good food, and progressive support. If you’re interested in hosting such an event, please reach out to Eileen at VolunteerRecruiterBFFC@gmail.com. Photo credits: Jack Stansbury | Reminder: Sign up to share what is on your heart and mind about the sharply rising costs of healthcare and essentials for Everyday Americans! Town Hall on Healthcare and Affordability Beth Farnham for Congress is excited to host a Town Hall on Healthcare and Affordability on Saturday, January 24, 2026, at The Franklin County Visitors Bureau, 15 S. Main St. Chambersburg, PA 17701 from 2 PM to 4 PM. Check-in will begin for those registered at 1:45 PM, and the town hall will start at 2 PM and end at 4 PM. Because of limited seating, only registered attendees will be admitted. Please allow for check-in time, which is required. Free required registration for the Town Hall here: There is free parking along Main Street on Saturdays and in the metered public lots. Please do not park behind the church.The Town Hall will take place inside the 11/30 room on the second floor. Please use the ramped side entrance on the left of the building, enter the doors, and use the elevator to go up 1 floor. The check-in process for registered attendees will begin at 1:45 PM. If enough seats are still available, on-site registration may be held. Please note that no signs, firearms, or weapons will be permitted at the event, and security prohibits large bags, backpacks, or diaper bags, but reserves the right to check any bag. The event will be recorded. The event program will be provided at check-in and is the key for entry to the room. Voters from Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional district (PA-13) are urged to attend and share concerns or ask questions of Beth Farnham, candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional district. This event is paid for by Beth Farnham for Congress. | I stand with Governor Tim Walz and the people of Minnesota against the violence of the Trump administration. “The governor also called on Minnesotans to be peaceful as they continue to protest the shooting death of 37-year-old Renee Good. ‘We must protest loudly, urgently, but also peacefully,” he said. ‘Indeed, as hard as we will fight in the courts and the ballot box, we cannot and will not let violence prevail.'” The people of Minnesota deserve to exercise their First Amendment rights against the tyrannical government that is the Trump administration. No more Americans nor any person on US soil who is not a threat to others be gunned down by law enforcement. That violence, paid by taxpayers, is at the direction of a criminal who does not have America’s best interest in mind. Please elect me in November so I can hold the Trump administration accountable for their crimes. Together, we and Justice! | Why am I the best candidate for mental health? Because I believe in MORE funding for mental health and drug addiction services, not less, and in universal healthcare that consistently provides needed treatment independent of employment status. “The Trump administration sent shockwaves through the U.S. mental health and drug addiction system late Tuesday, sending hundreds of termination letters, effective immediately, for federal grants supporting health services. ‘We are definitely looking at severe loss of front-line capacity,’ said Andrew Kessler, head of Slingshot Solutions, a consultancy firm that works with mental health and addiction groups nationwide. ‘[Programs] may have to shut their doors tomorrow.'” And the Trump administration should be accountable for the severe harm they are doing to the residents of this country. I have never supported that person who just arbitrarily cut off funding for mental health services. Meanwhile, our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, will likely twist himself into knots because he will try to justify Trump’s horrible actions instead of impeaching Trump for illegally impounding congressionally-approved funds. But it doesn’t have to be this way. Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, in November so that I can work on improving the lives of Everyday Americans. Together, we and Universal Healthcare! NEW SECTION! Joyce’s votes on recent legislation | | | Legislation| Joyce’s vote| US House Result| How Beth would have voted| Rationale for Beth’s vote ---|---|---|---|--- | Yes| Passed| No| – Repeals Department of Energy (DOE) energy efficiency regulations applicable to manufactured housing and eliminates DOE’s authority to issue similar regulations (Sec. 2). -Repeals the DOE final rule titled Energy Conservation Program: Energy Conservation Standards for Manufactured Housing and published on May 31, 2022 (Sec. 2). -Authorizes the DOE to provide recommendations to the Department of Housing and Urban Development for revisions to energy conservation standards applicable to manufactured housing (Sec. 2). | No| Passed | Yes| Extends, through December 31, 2028, the special duty-free rules for various apparel products imported from Haiti, including the duty-free treatment provided for a limited amount (referred to as tariff preference levels) of certain apparel products assembled in and imported from Haiti (Sec. 2). Requires the President to proclaim such modifications to the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States (HTS) that may be necessary to restore preferential treatment to articles that became ineligible for such treatment due to prior revisions to the HTS (Sec. 3). Specifies that this Act also provides for the refund of duties (i.e., liquidation or reliquidation of entries) on covered articles from Haiti that entered into the United States on or after September 30, 2025, and before the date of this bill’s enactment (Sec. 3). | No| Passed| Yes| Extends, through December 31, 2028, trade preferences that provide duty-free access to the U.S. market for most exports from eligible countries in sub-Saharan Africa (SSA) (Sec. 2). Specifies that this extension applies to the duty-free treatment of the products of beneficiary SSA countries under the Trade Act of 1974 (specifically, the Generalized System of Preferences) and the African Growth and Opportunity Act (AGOA) (Sec. 2). Specifies that the extended period applies to the following provisions of AGOA (Sec. 2): The duty-free treatment of certain apparel articles from beneficiary SSA countries; and The third-country fabric provision, which allows limited amounts of apparel articles from lesser developed beneficiary SSA countries to qualify for duty-free treatment, even if the yarns and fabrics used in their production are imported from non-AGOA countries (e.g., apparel assembled in Kenya with Chinese fabrics). Authorizes the refund of duties (i.e., liquidation or reliquidation of entries) on articles from eligible SSA countries that entered into the United States after September 30, 2025, and before the date of this bill’s enactment (Sec. 2). Extends, through December 31, 2031, customs user fees and merchandise processing fees (Sec. 3) | Yes| Passed| Yes| Expands the scope of the U.S. export control system to include remote access of items (Sec. 2). Defines “remote access” as either of the following (Sec. 2): Access to an item subject to the jurisdiction of the United States by a foreign person through a network connection, including the internet or a cloud computing service, from a location other than where the item is physically located; or Any other form of access specified in regulations promulgated by the Department of Commerce. Extends the application of export controls under the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (ECRA) to remote access of items, thereby allowing Commerce’s Bureau of Industry and Security to issue licenses and impose penalties related to remote access of controlled items (Sec. 2). | Yes| Passed| No| It increases water flow to waste water and increase utility bills. | Yes| Passed| No| Amends the definition of “hours worked” under the Fair Labor Standards Act to exclude certain voluntary training that occurs outside an employee’s regular working hours (Sec. 2). Specifies that such training does not count as hours worked even if it is offered by the employer, provided that an employee’s working conditions are not adversely affected by choosing not to participate and the employee does not perform any work for the employer during the training (Sec. 2). | Yes| Passed| No| Abortion bans, weakened contraceptive access, funding to Isreal that perpetrates Gaza murders after “ceasefire”, Palestinian statehood only granted through US Secretary of State, no expanding healthcare coverage. | Yes| Passed| No| Retirement plans should not include cryptocurrency investments and should consider Environmental, Social, and Governmental factors concerning investment decisions. Source: <> If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — **California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.**

clean_body: In 2024 we got Democrats close, in 2026 let’s finish the job. | = | In 2024, we flipped three seats from red to blue and defended all of our vulnerable incumbents. But Democrat incumbents lost in other states, so Republicans held on to their razor-thin majority. = = Republicans tried to rig the 2026 midterms by pushing red states like Texas to eliminate blue districts to make it impossible for Democrats to retake the U.S. House. But Governor Gavin Newsom and all Californians stood up to Trump’s election-rigging plot. We turned to the voters and gave them the option of protecting fair elections, and Proposition 50 passed by a landslide. Winning Prop 50 means that Democrats are still in the game for the U.S. House. But now it’s up to us to take this new map and flip the districts we need to win. And the MAGA movement is not throwing in the towel with Republicans like Rep. Darrell Issa defiantly saying they will fight to keep their new districts red. = = = = = = Thank you, \- The whole team at the California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I wanted you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
Hi, Peter, it’s Sherrod. I wanted to reach out personally and share some incredible news: **A brand-new poll shows me leading my opponent Jon Husted – 49% to 48%.**
First, I want to say _thank you._ I got back in the fight to take on a rigged system that benefits the wealthy and well-connected, while working people pay the price. And this early momentum is a strong sign that our people-powered campaign is resonating with Ohioans.
But here's the problem: The wealthy donors, the corporate special interests – they’re all panicking after seeing this poll. Last cycle, they spent more than $250 million against me, and they're gearing up to spend millions more to crush our momentum.
We can't let that happen, Peter. They know as well as we do that we have what it takes to flip this seat, but it could all come down to resources.
That’s why we set a goal to raise $50,000 before midnight to keep up our momentum, and I'm personally asking you to help us reach it. **[Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can, split with State Democrats Committee, to help us fight back against the corporate special interests and win this race?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99106?refcode=em20260118-9962&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=1&akid=9962%2E614464%2EcSJEkZ)**
I’m so proud to have you on this team, Peter.
In solidarity,
Sherrod

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=2&akid=9962%2E614464%2EcSJEkZ).

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: How can a billionaire know what Californians are going through?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40722%2E3422442%2EN75oKW)
Peter,
One of our opponents in this race is worth **$2 billion dollars.**
That number is hard to wrap your head around, so here's one way you can look at it.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260118_1_ak.ID6ugX&refcode=em20260118-40722&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40722%2E3422442%2EN75oKW)
What we’re left wondering is **how could a person that out of touch know the struggle of working Californians?**
That’s where Katie Porter comes in. She’s a single mom who knows what it’s like to shop on a tight budget, hunt for sales, and worry about bills piling up.
_Unlike our opponent, Katie doesn’t need a team of consultants to tell her what’s best for working people. She lives it every day._
Running against a billionaire who’s already given his campaign $28 million dollars is daunting, but **Katie’s proven that people power can beat big money.** That’s why she’s counting on you today.
**[Can you chip in $5 to her campaign to help elect a governor who understands what Californians are going through and how to fight for them?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260118_1_ak.ID6ugX&refcode=em20260118-40722&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40722%2E3422442%2EN75oKW)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260118-40722&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40722_3422442_N75oKW&akid=40722%2E3422442%2EN75oKW)**

Charlie understood that election years don't reward hesitation. Your support at the start of this year goes directly toward the work that will help win some of the most competitive races for the House and Senate:
---
* Expanding ballot-chasing operations in battleground states

* Deploying door knockers and voter-contact teams early, not late

* Locking in data, turnout infrastructure, and ground operations that can't be built at the last minute

---
**This is the work that separates winning movements from reactive ones.** The support received and decisions made now determine how much ground we cover, how effectively we compete, and whether the America First movement is setting the pace or trying to catch up. Strong starts **win **election years.
Weak starts _cost _them. **[Patriot, will you help us start the year off with strength and momentum by making your first New Year’s contribution of 2026 today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e4ae96165d214d358b9698b536c8245d&_e=Ss-BuOBnhAlkbQNGG283-P5_DzCE8yssTALAQ9aEuSZ-gin8nkhjkujGS9SkSrSPI17ZDgIey6jFYnaAOOM_KSarZ8rZ8NCY4Y98uWmRzKuE5vECGxUAJTKsIR3CfdPZuisrR9k0_MvEpPJzmqQeTFaUa3J3oLvktjut3LGg8Tnm5jURo6ukUjBhuZbCZ0Iyk0Rq-cU8TOGdtSia-bN3d6DPw2QI9QTIUBwp0wZZUuYVKidMXxCrG9ch8xNV7X5YGqqY_jAjMPQwW_irLKvHLndRUVlBN-7Q9RFh_lfPgX5GHhBIS0shIWyh8i0bTUOLo6DsGoJnU-Sl4bkCuR4HcIuc38h0aUBpi3WLBmdPDRYT1SZMbkcDmlZgZ33r37Q9vbvNM3Ki4nANck8iX2WqxfQtoEhjeNm6BNOSY-3h2yUkVOj9pTGp4A3RgZaUAmOC4ayPC-dsi4Pet-DhFjvZ8BadQtDam7iEHiTwhyih6_nDxoMgBKsGKmettrjFTGkyxMbr6tL3Ztq_yrKH-akkEey83orfWFNDO94urglBIbz8GEczP01ZWAhfBIYM-k7P7yGroZWTTaMtwfNUd4K9oKehurEWZDzrxloXRwq27j4mXsTcUfoZVfXr8uEQbAQj)**

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. This is THE year - Election Year. The outcome of 2026 will be decided by what happens right now -- in the opening weeks, when momentum is set and lines are drawn. Charlie understood that election years don't reward hesitation. They reward movements that start strong, stay disciplined, and build early pressure while others are still catching their breath. | | Your support at the start of this year goes directly toward the work that will help win some of the most competitive races for the House and Senate: Expanding ballot-chasing operations in battleground states Deploying door knockers and voter-contact teams early, not late Locking in data, turnout infrastructure, and ground operations that can't be built at the last minute This is the work that separates winning movements from reactive ones. The support received and decisions made now determine how much ground we cover, how effectively we compete, and whether the America First movement is setting the pace or trying to catch up. Peter,

Over the weekend, photographs started flooding in from Iran—young women boldly lighting cigarettes from the flames of burning photos of the Iranian Ayatollah. What a raw, unyielding act of defiance against a tyrannical regime that murders its own people, sponsors terror worldwide, and chants “Death to America” like it's their national anthem.

I've seen my share of warzones. As a Navy SEAL, I put on the uniform and battled in the most dangerous corners of the globe during the war on terror. Those days shaped me—taught me to confront threats head-on, no matter how ruthless the enemy. Now, in the U.S. Senate, I'm applying those same lessons to dismantle the status quo that's rotting our nation from within. But let's be clear: the fire of freedom burning in Iran right now? That's no accident. _**It's a direct result of President Trump's America First agenda, which has strategically weakened and destabilized this terrorist state, backed by a strong Republican majority in Congress.**_

[**help us hold our majority**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e21184f318434f90b77e3b73ec1e980b&_e=eOu96jqf2RpnZUsqC1bsY0vVrNHW8UZZ65Vw2Kg20VX0gGH5oIKmoB2Lg2dfpFaN9HCSb4cXE1fyHaeBiWqQjM7b9XahmDB7l1ZSF_3SeBnrDKjUEU7Z3Do6qcPQRi5Fkwy0_Qqku7mQaTv4303WDtOKG3E3CA3hxuJZpFht93Mjz8uwGThuleGaWw4UXwlgshFuPXeCvaM2cfwlkucQB1digRTVMc2FdwcNPq-t5KKUBBZy_ZP42wHbfvOXjze6b6ekAXGj9ofLbYRA5wsgXM0avo_Q7-5p1-0Cb76Adfh9QhTTQ98ulB5dh8V6UMXYy-GT_ORgWSNb5alQOZFrz96jwdeJWepqOQSPFrYzf67RQmR4-NS-iuKKvgD4X6ODWRN3yNUHYV3UvmZ4V7oXiD-TDKzJj90LhLfB1A_ULTL928MePyOM34XvIBaGU-pG6Mcp90vGG9IZN9xqSogyEiDQdUkMBCO9ErHelDHjs2TRrtoKNzikfM-YMMHNbR1--oktuPR4dOfvjvjc4ms3FicWr7asL3suQec98R5xLUYFyZ4J-G0d2qQt32AFXSJyMaLCTL3SKG2d86RC98EPsGBkk8-yLDoTCFwXUHUQVmGhZ1Gb3WLhwyIXtp-Fwc_91GCD4b8uCKaxUY1ZZZLk656iV_T43nU9-h3i6Jlmv74EXj_yZ8B-UJcIBwUV2KABerH-XkLE21EGpRPf_7M_rjNYhWASFf-PVaDLx596SBI%3D)

Iranians crave freedom. They demand fundamental human rights, and they're risking everything—protesting by the thousands, and being viciously murdered by the thousands – to topple a regime that's spent decades slaughtering its citizens and Americans alike as the world's largest state sponsor of terror.

The biased hacks in the liberal media and their Democrat allies would love to spin this differently. However, the truth is undeniable: _**This wouldn't be happening if Joe Biden or Kamala Harris were still calling the shots from the White House.**_ They'd be propping up these murderers with pallets of cash, just like before. Instead, we're witnessing President Trump Make America Great Again in real time—crushing our enemies abroad while we drain the Swamp at home.

[**CONTRIBUTE $5 TO HELP US CONTINUE OUR IMPORTANT WORK**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e21184f318434f90b77e3b73ec1e980b&_e=eOu96jqf2RpnZUsqC1bsY0vVrNHW8UZZ65Vw2Kg20VX0gGH5oIKmoB2Lg2dfpFaN9HCSb4cXE1fyHaeBiWqQjM7b9XahmDB7l1ZSF_3SeBnrDKjUEU7Z3Do6qcPQRi5Fkwy0_Qqku7mQaTv4303WDtOKG3E3CA3hxuJZpFht93Mjz8uwGThuleGaWw4UXwlgshFuPXeCvaM2cfwlkucQB1digRTVMc2FdwcNPq-t5KKUBBZy_ZP42wHbfvOXjze6hXGvfgxK03kMT_DxnslifVjslEu7X88Fty3SUdI3KP2bKYW4t2TM3_EcxvVegNqET9aTLCkdZKxp8_eBksCyybxnrdMoqyiPA0lrvIq9lQXiXcRjFkxdQApOEuQrE5Em4m56pS3pP0JRVL3mDIEp8i5ziYfjSu6NIiEHOXGvPw7e3a1BkQDrY49y3NgRxiPzAMJzJO0TDqaecYkWRDYaKWzw9e882u9WOxLC_8JxucfP5drfGzJYCVPRmBFc_9juBWz93B-lpBq9ircX9jW5-0RIYpM73esJLSCKZ-H5A91PfjFxvrEH4xZWHighw0V0v72W0lXPjq0ErwY-DokMGeCPJRTTYq9Lwzi87pC5GFbUZ44-6tBkl8FrbWdtm323aazVuw84ELC51Oa6Tp1mpSxB39h5Gd6Bt2nmFVIcUwfr2neuQ0RbEwNGWgZiJ2VcsIeR7ZYrmUCaa7pt9l1sosvsAWciENxByo7p3VfFR9g%3D)

But the fight's far from over. The vengeful Democrats and mainstream news outlets are desperate to protect their cozy globalist bubble. They hate what I'm doing in the Senate—exposing waste, fraud, and the corrupt insiders who've sold out our country. **They attack my SEAL mindset** and my support for President Trump's agenda that puts America back on top._** And they're terrified because YOU elected us to upend their dystopian vision and restore the free, great nation our forefathers built over centuries. **_

_**If they can muzzle voices like mine, they'll come for you next.**_ That's why I'm holding the line, but I need your support to fuel this battle for America's future. There are less than 300 days until the November midterms, and if we lose our majority in the House or Senate, **kiss goodbye to this transformational change unfolding before our eyes.**

Don't let this moment pass us by. **[Your first contribution of 2026 could be the spark that keeps the fire burning—not just in Iran, but right here at home.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e21184f318434f90b77e3b73ec1e980b&_e=eOu96jqf2RpnZUsqC1bsY0vVrNHW8UZZ65Vw2Kg20VX0gGH5oIKmoB2Lg2dfpFaN9HCSb4cXE1fyHaeBiWqQjM7b9XahmDB7l1ZSF_3SeBnrDKjUEU7Z3Do6qcPQRi5Fkwy0_Qqku7mQaTv4303WDtOKG3E3CA3hxuJZpFht93Mjz8uwGThuleGaWw4UXwlgshFuPXeCvaM2cfwlkucQB1digRTVMc2FdwcNPq-t5KKUBBZy_ZP42wHbfvOXjze67oi0Ai-L9HFfIe1dOk0YDY5Gum_BCE4tP39f7__uBDcGh-AIuAOLnyA9o--2gYcmRZg3gNHP-_qU4_Hc5j9VRmOm8f11rKOkWMhJZQ2gZ2a0ZAkbfkrBDTOW_OsdtJnr0sIunFWjcKr7eY6j1DvUr-Ab-ITgQ8_OqYhMurfCvD_qOt0kZAX7MqSLOB1Pvlf3pMpBjxXeL2Gh9lnkQHrrnVgwwMfcAUvxhGI-K3gjaXYGyrMAo5d6HhKGRgFxQBtDvgg_DTxdlXrxS2mfpumB9UXLln68Bu4Dnkvf3gzX61N9U_0KXvABb01hIRk9BbVR6TWAwCWOfjO69lm90Vmi06dgkGcI7s_88rBknfWndS6dwfBxBD-EJDQ1GVqg33V89wN4WFkNRxBVscPP0jS2IpoNgjoXNBYXlfURi-GrJgoMS93LVTVMUIseT7JJC6d6RjtQqbP0qSKCZQFhq-7AGHLkOWl4AATqdXF8tG-c6ZI%3D)**

clean_body: —----------------------------------------------- | Peter, Over the weekend, photographs started flooding in from Iran—young women boldly lighting cigarettes from the flames of burning photos of the Iranian Ayatollah. What a raw, unyielding act of defiance against a tyrannical regime that murders its own people, sponsors terror worldwide, and chants “Death to America” like it's their national anthem. I've seen my share of warzones. As a Navy SEAL, I put on the uniform and battled in the most dangerous corners of the globe during the war on terror. Those days shaped me—taught me to confront threats head-on, no matter how ruthless the enemy. Now, in the U.S. Senate, I'm applying those same lessons to dismantle the status quo that's rotting our nation from within. But let's be clear: the fire of freedom burning in Iran right now? That's no accident. It's a direct result of President Trump's America First agenda, which has strategically weakened and destabilized this terrorist state, backed by a strong Republican majority in Congress. Iranians crave freedom. They demand fundamental human rights, and they're risking everything—protesting by the thousands, and being viciously murdered by the thousands – to topple a regime that's spent decades slaughtering its citizens and Americans alike as the world's largest state sponsor of terror. The biased hacks in the liberal media and their Democrat allies would love to spin this differently. However, the truth is undeniable: This wouldn't be happening if Joe Biden or Kamala Harris were still calling the shots from the White House. They'd be propping up these murderers with pallets of cash, just like before. Instead, we're witnessing President Trump Make America Great Again in real time—crushing our enemies abroad while we drain the Swamp at home. But the fight's far from over. The vengeful Democrats and mainstream news outlets are desperate to protect their cozy globalist bubble. They hate what I'm doing in the Senate—exposing waste, fraud, and the corrupt insiders who've sold out our country. They attack my SEAL mindset and my support for President Trump's agenda that puts America back on top. And they're terrified because YOU elected us to upend their dystopian vision and restore the free, great nation our forefathers built over centuries. If they can muzzle voices like mine, they'll come for you next. That's why I'm holding the line, but I need your support to fuel this battle for America's future. There are less than 300 days until the November midterms, and if we lose our majority in the House or Senate, kiss goodbye to this transformational change unfolding before our eyes. Don't let this moment pass us by. Tim Sheehy U.S. Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. I was there. I saw it firsthand. And I refused to stay silent. While Washington worshiped Anthony Fauci like a hero, I challenged him under oath. I asked the questions no one else would ask. I exposed his lies about gain-of-function research. I confronted him about natural immunity. I forced him to answer for his flip-flopping on masks and his censorship of real scientists. _**And for it, they tried to destroy me.**_ They called me dangerous. They called me reckless. They said I had “ _blood on my hands._ ” **But today, even my fiercest critics quietly admit what Joe Rogan said out loud:_I was right!_**
---
[ **WATCH THE INTERVIEW & FIGHT TO STAND WITH RAND** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=da38c9921b4049b3aee89237dc47a144&_e=hZTaRh5ee-EQdx40DtJgqYvtyUViiXhxb4OkN5jI8lVDguWsETOglbnDNDKawVFmMEKZ4nObdKgFOjFJnh-Ujj-4hFNdqjxfAqLIadfumGZLKzPikxiv-o3kadFDnPHAzkc0mmBiqWxX9Ip1krF8KWkBw5rjb3F6pzzw2caYliZh_A8Dad4NBqcxgRn3RG8o9iyyxLlZpzYwHQ19ramitaOXxvIxiAxicc5ZZTgQSSYAB0H3CXZ1a2Nj_mhdKky8S7udjTzl6-L-qn2nYhZs3peIylOEdxSSVZ9Wa7WH4RAQIP3kakQT-_BQfc5sIzkhlLh6NKLp3q7C59bfLJZKTWHfiQIV-My_RyJE1EPdXVOdXXrUgif0aXrMZqpbi6mErVyTOUEmkUSqhXQWjwMx9bkJiEn_ha-mNtHXzYFnjjU91XIykDCOGCrTABUjNNf5NxktX75KloGx1wPWTmMtGlyPXZCMhJqAb1RtTBQOQhDsBzxH8ktptuhbt65RTga-uYxiMbvRk8RVfvs27luoavhUMfXHNVH1wS6QYIC0fNRhTMS_gH9tAHogpHVFYBL0tJz4UialOaBpakD9P-gXAWk4hXadpYBGQlvs0Uq2g4KbuiiUg4xVapde_ZKotgbAGVY-k7an-8MnTEfqg4yXkoyQr0asKiNXB4DP0KMJ61vaHhNAI51Sj3mHHCjL6UZYltZBOrs_AZAa3ocpzHmnY4qeZA5dcGDvHhkin9TBOfTTpOXWaHxRmM_sVWYDSN68sBGPHkY-lEk2MnxQAkwnqw7tOR31sXKH-nAIkwwHvX8Op5fC_PdvyuNkCCZHJ-6gfMglRnAYeWwGnbjPnw2wCg%3D%3D)

I exposed his lies about gain-of-function research. I confronted him about natural immunity. I forced him to answer for his flip-flopping on masks and his censorship of real scientists. And for it, they tried to destroy me. They called me dangerous. They called me reckless. They said I had “ blood on my hands. ” But today, even my fiercest critics quietly admit what Joe Rogan said out loud:I was right! We knew early on that kids were not at serious risk. We knew natural immunity was real. We knew lockdowns would cause massive harm. We knew masks were never proven to stop a respiratory virus. And we knew Fauci was protecting his power, NOT your health! Because if Fauci falls, the entire COVID narrative falls with him. And they WON’T allow that to happen. Friend, this fight is not over. name: Team Jayapal
subject: Will you join us next Sunday for our first Resistance Lab training of the year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Together, we’ll hold space to process the pain of ICE violence happening across the country.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260118-5825-footer&t=1&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)
Peter,
In moments like this, many of us are feeling grief, anger, and urgency all at once.
That’s why Pramila is inviting you to join a special Resistance Lab training on Sunday, January 25th at 11 a.m. PT / 2 p.m. ET — held in honor of Renee Good and the many communities and individuals brutalized by ICE’s reign of terror. [**If you’re interested in joining, you can RSVP using this link.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260118-5825&t=2&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260118-5825&t=3&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)
**[RSVP](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260118-5825&t=4&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)**
This session, **Stand For Good** , will be a virtual organizing training focused on immigration justice and nonviolent resistance. Together, we’ll hold space to process the pain of ICE violence happening across the country, learn from one another, and build real strategies to support immigrant communities and confront authoritarianism where we live.
**Authoritarianism is on the rise, and history shows it is everyday people, organized together, who stop it.** That’s why Pramila launched the Resistance Lab — to help people understand how democracies erode, how nonviolent movements have successfully fought back, and what we can do right now to resist in our own communities.
In this session, you’ll:
✔️ Learn how authoritarianism takes control and how it’s taking over our country in this moment
✔️ Study real examples of successful nonviolent resistance movements
✔️ Brainstorm concrete actions to support immigrant communities and demand accountability
✔️ Connect in regional breakout groups to build local strategy and solidarity
**Whether you’ve joined a Resistance Lab before or this is your first time, we’d love to have you with us.[So, if you’re ready to stand up, speak out, and take action, we hope you’ll join us next Sunday at 11 a.m. PT / 2 p.m. ET!](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260118-5825&t=5&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)**
**[RSVP](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260118-5825&t=6&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)**
See you soon!
— Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260118-5825-footer&t=7&refcode2=5825_420207_sbzTRi&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=8&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=5825%2E420207%2EsbzTRi)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: I did not come to Congress to play games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| | I did not come to Congress to play games. The problem is, however, it seems like quite a lot of my Republican colleagues came to Congress to do just that: play games with people’s health care and food assistance, _all to satisfy Trump’s billionaire agenda._ While Congress has been full of chaos caused by Trump and the Republicans, I have been focused on delivering for families and stopping the damage. I have been at the forefront of the fights for working families. **I will not be backing down anytime soon.** [**To continue this work, I need your support to hit our ambitious goal. | Peter,

_The election is this year_ which means that there’s no long runway and no room for delay.

If we do not hold this seat, Democrats cannot flip the House. And if Republicans keep control, the consequences will be real and immediate for people across the country.

This is one of the most competitive districts in America. It was decided by just 2 points last cycle and Republicans are already gearing up to take it back.

clean_body: This is one of the most competitive districts in America. It was decided by just 2 points last cycle and Republicans are already gearing up to take it back. | = | Peter, The election is this year which means that there’s no long runway and no room for delay. If we do not hold this seat, Democrats cannot flip the House. And if Republicans keep control, the consequences will be real and immediate for people across the country. This is one of the most competitive districts in America. It was decided by just 2 points last cycle and Republicans are already gearing up to take it back. Laura is doing the work to defend this seat. But she can’t do it without strong grassroots support. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Team WFP
subject: How are you feeling about the current political moment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Hey, Peter — just checking in. **We know the last few weeks have been frightening.** ICE violence is escalating nationwide. In Minneapolis, an ICE agent shot and killed Renee Good. Days later, another ICE agent shot a man in the leg as he ran into his own home. People are being grabbed off the street without explanation. Unarmed protesters demanding justice are being met with tear gas, detentions, and _brute_ force. And while communities are being terrorized., Trump and Republican leaders aren’t calling for accountability. They’re doing the opposite. They’re _protecting ICE_ — smearing victims, sidestepping local investigations, and even threatening to invoke the Insurrection Act to call in troops against people demanding safety and justice. **They’re signaling loud and clear that ICE can act with impunity and that dissent will be met with force.** [**We want to hear directly from you, both about how you are feeling in this moment, and how your elected leaders are responding. So we’ve put together a short WFP Supporter Survey asking:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKyhBlDFUOX27FGRtASMIzgAQuzRi7opcTnPrH4fhIRycR_i9o2INuQHc_cZ_bmddht-aF5xk5HNqTNnSP0weCTO0fWYahJ2jdFSfZwB6nVCwNc6TK85qN_jWp2bdq-NUeVEYvHeHiY8W8G4-6c8sAZ-3qto0SUC-l0g15uEBkTSLB40ocLdrA-Yc2ieFTSR1z8jkR28vlNcydAIvi7aZ28b7kVCkyyjrHsjNmh0-y3C3WiewCqUd2bWNeeVgqwgNC2rgeC7VWunjb2dXzOLWbNfX3tWXhkmbExT46HaWsTOSloK3eHvwahzP9v5a3Abi8/4ne/cc-p4eAfQPCrPGHSkRXVYg/h0/h001.v6mtcohoxwSOuM08VqIVSOYTuDTxYRRdSubT4jJlGeg)
* How concerned are you that your family, friends, or community might be targeted by ICE?
* How would you rate the response by Democratic leadership in Congress to ICE's escalations?

**We read every single response, and we share what we learn directly with WFP leadership.** This is how we make sure strategic decisions aren’t made in a vacuum — and that your experiences aren’t ignored. **[Take the WFP Supporter Survey »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKyhBlDFUOX27FGRtASMIzgAQuzRi7opcTnPrH4fhIRycR_i9o2INuQHc_cZ_bmddht-aF5xk5HNqTNnSP0weCThU2hH4dnC8XOccqiy0NDT-T5zP5cnO0Q68yF_yZr9LCcgJbuw-M_hUzh3avqEUAu547hPd3dIlxJqaFqBVAsnNTmIlWjP4QL8H3yfNTM-cXaqOgDPQGJKDDH8i2elLv_GAivx8rlEpX89t5Cdk87kCr4DJ6daAKnAX2inqTQr2IFL-oDtr8Tnnu-BbTlmIB4-mruBFTGZUvAjf52hel7A6nvyQZlQXN57yzR3RrXGaE/4ne/cc-p4eAfQPCrPGHSkRXVYg/h1/h001.-Ezp1leu9Ngo4IweN3Tq1iH4isDsQR_BoVyZ4s9KjzM)** name: Nida Allam
subject: The far-right Twitter trolls are coming after me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
And I know that rhetoric can have real consequences
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260118-1&t=1&akid=3060%2E587540%2Eo9WgPI)
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260118_1_nida.5PhauM&refcode=em20260118-3060&amount=5&t=2&akid=3060%2E587540%2Eo9WgPI)
Hey Peter, it’s Nida Allam running for Congress in NC-04 and I’ve officially “made it”. An anti-Muslim organization with its conspiracy-theorist figurehead have started attacking me and my campaign.
My fight for a living wage, affordable healthcare, a great public education, and a livable planet is setting off alarm bells because the far-right _know_ how popular these things are, and they are terrified by the power of the people fighting for the future we deserve.
I know that hateful speech and rhetoric can have real-world consequences. In 2015, my three friends were murdered in a hate crime in Chapel Hill, targeted for their Muslim faith. Today, I’m running today to carry on their legacies of service – regardless of what this Twitter troll has to say about it.
**[I’m not backing down in the face of hate, and we can step up now to send an overpowering response of 1,000 new donors by 11:59 pm, and prove we won’t surrender in the face of hate. Would you join me right now by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Leaders We Deserve?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260118_1_nida.5PhauM&refcode=em20260118-3060&amount=5&t=3&akid=3060%2E587540%2Eo9WgPI)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260118_1_nida.5PhauM&amount=5&refcode=em20260118-3060&t=22&akid=3060%2E587540%2Eo9WgPI)**
This Twitter mouthpiece also compares me to Zohran Mamdani – what a compliment! Because aside from also having to deal with constant attacks on his platform and identity like me, you know what else Zohran Mamdani did? **_He won._**
And that’s exactly what we’re going to do, Peter, and no amount of conspiracy-laced vitriol is going to stop our grassroots power.
**[We’re on a roll, we have momentum, and now we just need you. Would you make a split contribution now between my progressive, outsider campaign and Leaders We Deserve to power us to victory?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260118_1_nida.5PhauM&refcode=em20260118-3060&amount=5&t=23&akid=3060%2E587540%2Eo9WgPI)**
Thank you for standing with me,
Nida Allam

clean_body: And I know that rhetoric can have real consequences Hey Peter, it’s Nida Allam running for Congress in NC-04 and I’ve officially “made it”. An anti-Muslim organization with its conspiracy-theorist figurehead have started attacking me and my campaign. My fight for a living wage, affordable healthcare, a great public education, and a livable planet is setting off alarm bells because the far-right know how popular these things are, and they are terrified by the power of the people fighting for the future we deserve. I know that hateful speech and rhetoric can have real-world consequences. In 2015, my three friends were murdered in a hate crime in Chapel Hill, targeted for their Muslim faith. Today, I’m running today to carry on their legacies of service – regardless of what this Twitter troll has to say about it. This Twitter mouthpiece also compares me to Zohran Mamdani – what a compliment! Because aside from also having to deal with constant attacks on his platform and identity like me, you know what else Zohran Mamdani did? He won. And that’s exactly what we’re going to do, Peter, and no amount of conspiracy-laced vitriol is going to stop our grassroots power. Thank you for standing with me, Nida Allam

Team Marlene | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The MAGA Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Axios - Scoop: GOP expects SCOTUS boost [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=011826_1&amount=25]
Straight from Axios , Team: " President Trump's political team privately told big donors that the Supreme Court will soon issue rulings on voting rights and contribution limits that could tilt future elections their way. "
Two main cases are making the MAGA movement feel like things are going to break their way ahead of the 2026 elections:
➜ In Louisiana v. Callais , the court is set to decide whether to gut Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) and return to a time of racial gerrymandering. This would be the capstone of Chief Justice John Roberts career, as he's been working to neuter the VRA since he worked for Ronald Reagan.
➜ In National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) v. the Federal Elections Commission (FEC) , the court is tackling a case that could eliminate a federal law capping how much big-money party committees can spend in direct coordination with favored candidates. This could be the most consequential campaign finance case since the Citizens United decision opened the floodgates of corporate spending in our elections.
To be clear, these cases boil down to a simple idea: do voters get to make the decisions, or can politicians choose their voters and pump unlimited cash into their campaign coffers?
Team: We have to spread the word about these cases and the consequences we would face in the worst comes to pass. Fuel our work to defend voting rights with $35 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=011826_1&amount=35]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_1&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=011826_1&amount=35]
The potential consequences of these cases are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Section 2 of the VRA requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters.
In the NRSC case, there are limits on how much political parties and outside entities can coordinate financially with certain candidates. Removing these FEC limits would make it easier for the uber-rich to direct spending and influence elections , limiting the value of voters and making it harder for challengers to enter the political process.
Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $35 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters and protect our fundamental right to vote? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=011826_1&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011826_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011826_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=zOsG9Vrm3uPKHtNgn8pTko%2FzYEHWVCSqx7XLhl3ovEUazM5Wj3F51oLfTEoCl%2FPmrXu5rAUtfozf4vWEJXo0UxIck15uunV2%2FS9fbZhN2tW8xzSAp0a7UcP5R1ZchpFSnhHk%2FJeLWV03vZO2To0rncaXr8R1VBMfzJPeeWoBlrdD%2BkBGn%2Fl1eCE46HJTNvpwSAY5JQv6zuNoPzd99HVHgZ6UMpfw7yUUtTSksFoJ0WzPgG6ukrxvk64wNL9KcE0LJ5jgCNKV0lhyGRm7AQmvmYWi20g9NTDqLLNOZXVmEBBxpWEvmtxKs%2FUEk6%2BaPevHUCNsSdIbu%2F4AeJDsegnStwE62e3g9lcVudoxyOTd5jGC%2BFhRzfGESoRu0JEtyyvnU4i%2FO9%2B%2ByF%2FhgydaaieKc8gxui17ssQywIy7ejGU%2FnE%3D .

subject: One of the most important races in the country
body:
OH-09 is on the front line of our most important political fights. This is what's at stake in November:

| |
---
**Friend, our district is one of the most important battlegrounds in the nation. ** That's not an exaggeration: OH-09 is on the front lines of our biggest political fights, and the stakes for winning here in November could not be higher. **[If you read on, we'll tell you more about what makes this race so critical. But first, can you rush a donation to help defend this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123575816/595897257/-1968428927?refcode=260118_team_frontline_l1&ms=260118_team_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWNkMjA0Yi1hMGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5t4szuAzR3aw9S5B1UMzWEFGS4I5g5ZfRjKP8I6yFKw=)** [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123575817/595897258/1039792322?refcode=260118_team_frontline_b1&ms=260118_team_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWNkMjA0Yi1hMGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5t4szuAzR3aw9S5B1UMzWEFGS4I5g5ZfRjKP8I6yFKw=) Friend, Ohio has always been a bellwether for the nation, and no district exemplifies that better than OH-09. This was already one of the most vulnerable blue seats in Congress. It's one of just **thirteen districts in the country** that voted for Trump and also elected a Democratic representative. Then, in late October, MAGA passed a **new gerrymandered Congressional map** that made our district even tougher, making our race the epicenter of the fight between democracy and corruption. They've made our district the latest experiment in their effort to take power out of the hands of the people. The Republican primary is filling up with extremist candidates, and dark money groups are lining up to pour millions of dollars into the race. **Winning here in November would be a major victory for democracy and a rejection of divisive, corrupt politics. We must defend districts like this one if we're going to retake the House and pass an agenda that delivers for working people.** To do that, we need your support. ### About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123575831/595897272/1039792322?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=09cd204b-a0f4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=260118_team_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWNkMjA0Yi1hMGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5t4szuAzR3aw9S5B1UMzWEFGS4I5g5ZfRjKP8I6yFKw=) | [Give Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123575832/595897273/1039792322?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=09cd204b-a0f4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=260118_team_frontline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWNkMjA0Yi1hMGY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5t4szuAzR3aw9S5B1UMzWEFGS4I5g5ZfRjKP8I6yFKw=)
