clean_body: OH-09 is on the front line of our most important political fights. This is what's at stake in November: | | Friend, our district is one of the most important battlegrounds in the nation. That's not an exaggeration: OH-09 is on the front lines of our biggest political fights, and the stakes for winning here in November could not be higher. = = Friend, Ohio has always been a bellwether for the nation, and no district exemplifies that better than OH-09. This was already one of the most vulnerable blue seats in Congress. It's one of just thirteen districts in the country that voted for Trump and also elected a Democratic representative. Then, in late October, MAGA passed a new gerrymandered Congressional map that made our district even tougher, making our race the epicenter of the fight between democracy and corruption. They've made our district the latest experiment in their effort to take power out of the hands of the people. The Republican primary is filling up with extremist candidates, and dark money groups are lining up to pour millions of dollars into the race. Winning here in November would be a major victory for democracy and a rejection of divisive, corrupt politics. We must defend districts like this one if we're going to retake the House and pass an agenda that delivers for working people. To do that, we need your support. This will be the toughest election we've ever faced, and with the stakes so high, we can't afford to lose this seat. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, friend. — Team Kaptur | | | ---|---|--- About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | = | = ---|--- Follow Marcy | | ---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . clean_body: This is personal. Not for anyone else.| | | | | Peter, It’s Mike Rogers. I’m writing to you directly because I don’t know who else I can trust right now. I just left a series of meetings that shook me: the kind of conversations that never make it into press briefings or fundraising emails. I’m not supposed to tell you what I heard. I’m not supposed to share anything written. Please understand: I’m asking you humbly to read it immediately. Quietly. I wouldn’t come to you like this if I had any other choice. — Mike Rogers Michigan U.S. Senate Candidate | | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate

**Please, friend, Democratic leaders like Pete Buttigieg are going all in to help Deb win — and we need YOU to join them.**_**[Will you rush $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help Deb win in November and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3773?refcode=jtk108-fr-nd&t=8&akid=6819%2E400544%2Ewu-p6C)**_

name: Team Walz
subject: Governor Walz won’t back down
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
We wanted to make sure you saw.
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/235?refcode=tw-em-20260118-421&%3Bamount=5&t=1&akid=421%2E34582%2E_lrIfk)
Trump’s Department of Justice has announced that they are opening an investigation into Governor Walz.
Tactics like these from the US Government are meant to scare and keep folks from fighting for what’s right — but Governor Walz isn’t going to back down.
Fights like this aren’t cheap — that’s why the DOJ is picking it. That’s why we need you.
**[If you’re able, please contribute $5 to our Legal Defense Fund today and help ensure we can stand behind Governor Walz.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/235?refcode=tw-em-20260118-421&amount=5&t=2&akid=421%2E34582%2E_lrIfk)**
Thank you,
Team Walz

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dgalegalfund?refcode=tw-em-20260118-421&t=3&refcode2=421_34582__lrIfk&akid=421%2E34582%2E_lrIfk)**
---
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

St. Paul MN 55104

body:
I can’t stay silent| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bb86cb5065084d53a0fb3a253a09c7f7&_e=z2dEOJt4EARg321hVcl5_OPtUnIWdnqORLGvRMKsvs7Enc0a-d76Sqw56lBJFEAiGRgQBR9flzarvx9Rnag8fKr2NZKyZSFiB47I_SkOHveBCilI185urXiQF6sdcV3BTgPPNIRRO53v-2bpit1nNn6LIX4_H92d0hSbUE_Cnp61IBcl-mcKv75_7JVeG11-zeolXMLrOLUK4vs-WMIZCTqZI2-Y496AhJrlN8BtQIJ0-gDJHyj1XWDaMlzOEsedgMsV6KVxHFf1nPUInqVj34QjRlumf4RDHJkyH0hqFF0os57dYtliqLS6FG0kuQnMfm3vzl6UvHoFoleThLKzthFRfxjAYhOXGTICX0NC9Ps8lmWBn0dMeH0eGw9LcMTOXYjMYnTRF7bwmglN8roEt8rGB97hhoMlzhyAYqIgVFYgDNnTaVwmwen4CaQtoStw-jrBxZday8bWn9art1FKpSAv3FkPeu9KjHGAFAhF9Mi5G4MC-Dql50Wxsp_qzFNIiIPb4X11W6kJxAO5LYGGzdV6KdVIxS_EJ6ToIABcdsIUbi3LfbiNmhXV4QPtxWV-etSpOErwnLUbjtAv_pAvELFM93lWx04SKSaBwhnGf_52o5RpPZGjIgWnE7TYT6C1GngRc57G3xvvESYikRETyQBSAH21_IWjN-LL24SyHTwINvQV4BwB6R4ucHlCmukTkgKr9bpnGsGClF028xsHuieORJwS1aHzkTc02s5ANDI%3D)
---
Peter, In the wake of the assassination attempt on my father's life - and the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk - the opposition has made things clear:

**Violence is all they have left.** They don't want to talk. Or debate. Because they know they'll lose. So how do we as patriots live in an America where so many people openly despise us... and wish us harm? Well, that's something the Trump family knows a lot about. In fact, I've had so many people ask me how our family has endured living under constant attack for a decade that I decided to write a book about it. **It 's called _Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation._**_ _
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bb86cb5065084d53a0fb3a253a09c7f7&_e=z2dEOJt4EARg321hVcl5_OPtUnIWdnqORLGvRMKsvs7Enc0a-d76Sqw56lBJFEAiGRgQBR9flzarvx9Rnag8fKr2NZKyZSFiB47I_SkOHveBCilI185urXiQF6sdcV3BTgPPNIRRO53v-2bpit1nNn6LIX4_H92d0hSbUE_Cnp61IBcl-mcKv75_7JVeG11-zeolXMLrOLUK4vs-WMIZCTqZI2-Y496AhJrlN8BtQIJ0-gDJHyj1XWDaMlzOEsednMA_g09lcQmCSdWIglSru9lwDZtETxG3uoYjZRmpkLFs2kdg5UldUMCMiMLUbNNSjwQFkGZ3jDAz1G2g4OZNaElEQ9pMZiA1QqR27O5IvUX7MTmXKFORKvkNdyv34ZNJn4AXVKGWxODjrsyHsgA-rm3QJ413dNgeBB92hTE-Fri1wR6l9nRMmzCv16ASpOKX7JmCFoihwAuCCrr_K5er6SaiKg5nT7mW2BawRUsef5w8CFtzcv_QU2u1ZE8avm4aMcnnI6QYVUZLuH73ZHL9UZ7hnEOmV92GG1j82a7ElMou1iM_pAAHAdwsxwdTaDYs0j6las1NKRCY8Bk1F2UOdcMU1YhR8LdwJ0YOjrUQ3Lz_MxjbVji0UNXMurTQdvaHQrTsTgTAa7BTCLd3whV-5FHgao8jFkVMTPFOfmzIW0u6gtTrp_t08jmX8UzLKJMukdo1gg0CwM3uFwOGZ4Fp-j1_HLnvgGpcRg8IfRVu0ZQ%3D)
---
Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. I'd like to send you a copy, Peter. Because we all need to know how to look evil in the eye - and overcome it.
---
[ **Yes, Eric! Send Me Your Book >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bb86cb5065084d53a0fb3a253a09c7f7&_e=z2dEOJt4EARg321hVcl5_OPtUnIWdnqORLGvRMKsvs7Enc0a-d76Sqw56lBJFEAiGRgQBR9flzarvx9Rnag8fKr2NZKyZSFiB47I_SkOHveBCilI185urXiQF6sdcV3BTgPPNIRRO53v-2bpit1nNn6LIX4_H92d0hSbUE_Cnp61IBcl-mcKv75_7JVeG11-zeolXMLrOLUK4vs-WMIZCTqZI2-Y496AhJrlN8BtQIJ0-gDJHyj1XWDaMlzOEsedYXYus2bxCEHfsZCqHRU5E2zpGymx2j-s52_Y2ZWhA0bH8cd2L_XJG4YqM3CA4f5FmWFn4xjIMcL-gmgQ-CpHDdptLr45CHnwwpTCjbVHjIKf-FPKaHsRwSEtMeJmPVHYC0KDgtRgVWFVqKApu6372W5CaXc5YaI37CEZ0s70PJEI2hV6LTh7sZ20TQ-qN9UNf9wJhuzfMy8X01YN4V2HgAzvJOps18tIY4WE8N81t3gGpv7D_zEAyFuehcuPCgV31W0WEozvBw7pdoGSG5ILlLb854dJIn9atOtq93VnWNWWIip2icpMVaefv3ST0WSxK96C-THhQSChrG5lRxz-C15IlTfkOSdssnUXFE_hmXDsnW2DTdqEe_GZL2iHbm4wj3IB_MhGU3lqOxsCMFS2ntgaFOke81HpxhpQ9NWVauPQ4MflktO4WZxn1M3ELvtLSANjYatHHoXAHnKvkwYB6U-2MhkOz-FBORPWwC2XZ9Q%3D)
---
That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. That day I was watching the rally at home. Both my 4-year-old daughter and my 6-year-old son were sitting on my lap. We stared in shock at the TV as "Grandpa" dropped to the ground behind the podium. I remember thinking that he was gone. But the worst attacks on my dad have resulted in his greatest triumphs. **When he stood up with blood running down his face, pumped his fist in the air, and challenged us to "Fight! Fight! Fight!" you and I witnessed a "turning point" in American history.** Sometimes I can't believe what we've all been through. Not just my dad and the entire Trump family... but all of us patriotic Americans. Think about it: _The millions of illegals dumped off in our small towns and cities..._ _The "mail-in ballots" and rigged census numbers..._ _Billions of our tax dollars laundered through fake "USAID" programs to rig elections and fund left-wing propaganda..._ It was all designed to break us. Demoralize us. **And silence us.** We watched as Steve Bannon and Peter Navarro were marched off to prison... As our schools and churches were shut down. **Members of the Legacy Media repeatedly call us "fascists" and "Nazis" for supporting my dad. ** But you know, when he stood up after that assassin's bullet tore through his ear, I think it clicked for millions of people: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. It was a moment of true courage and true leadership. And it spurred a generation of young men and women who've been told their whole lives that there's nothing good about this nation to suddenly stand up a little taller and say, "Donald Trump is right. America is worth fighting for." **Charlie Kirk reached millions of Americans with the same message. A message of courage, hard work, and Christian values that cost him his life.** Under Charlie's leadership, **Turning Point Action** became the top group, training, and organizing conservatives to promote freedom across the country. And that's not going to stop. Charlie's wife, Erika, has vowed to make sure that Turning Point Action will become stronger, bolder, louder, and greater than ever before. _Charlie 's voice will become millions of voices._ I'm proud to be one of them. That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Turning Point Action today. Thirteen years ago when Charlie looked at our college campuses, he saw teenagers from good, Christian, conservative homes being indoctrinated with leftist contempt for America. And he realized, just like my dad did, that America was going to be destroyed from the inside out unless our young people were taught to love this country again... the way our grandparents were. **Turning Point Action is inspiring a new wave of conservatism across our country.** It's why my dad believes in Turning Point Action. Because Donald Trump knows that one administration alone can't save this nation. We need millions of Americans to have their own "turning point" moment and realize that our country will survive only if citizens value freedom more than left-wing Socialism and race-baiting politics. The attacks on my father and Charlie are proof that the Left wants to destroy this nation. **Peter will join with me in supporting Turning Point Action by sending a one-time gift of any amount today?** Just as light pushes back darkness, a stronger Turning Point Action will defeat the America haters. clean_body: I can’t stay silent| | | Peter, In the wake of the assassination attempt on my father's life - and the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk - the opposition has made things clear: Violence is all they have left. They don't want to talk. Or debate. Because they know they'll lose. So how do we as patriots live in an America where so many people openly despise us... and wish us harm? Well, that's something the Trump family knows a lot about. In fact, I've had so many people ask me how our family has endured living under constant attack for a decade that I decided to write a book about it. It 's called Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation. Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. I'd like to send you a copy, Peter. Because we all need to know how to look evil in the eye - and overcome it. That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. That day I was watching the rally at home. Both my 4-year-old daughter and my 6-year-old son were sitting on my lap. We stared in shock at the TV as "Grandpa" dropped to the ground behind the podium. I remember thinking that he was gone. But the worst attacks on my dad have resulted in his greatest triumphs. When he stood up with blood running down his face, pumped his fist in the air, and challenged us to "Fight! Fight! Fight!" you and I witnessed a "turning point" in American history. Sometimes I can't believe what we've all been through. Not just my dad and the entire Trump family... but all of us patriotic Americans. Think about it: The millions of illegals dumped off in our small towns and cities... The "mail-in ballots" and rigged census numbers... Billions of our tax dollars laundered through fake "USAID" programs to rig elections and fund left-wing propaganda... It was all designed to break us. Demoralize us. And silence us. We watched as Steve Bannon and Peter Navarro were marched off to prison... As our schools and churches were shut down. Members of the Legacy Media repeatedly call us "fascists" and "Nazis" for supporting my dad. But you know, when he stood up after that assassin's bullet tore through his ear, I think it clicked for millions of people: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. It was a moment of true courage and true leadership. And it spurred a generation of young men and women who've been told their whole lives that there's nothing good about this nation to suddenly stand up a little taller and say, "Donald Trump is right. America is worth fighting for." Charlie Kirk reached millions of Americans with the same message. A message of courage, hard work, and Christian values that cost him his life. Under Charlie's leadership, Turning Point Action became the top group, training, and organizing conservatives to promote freedom across the country. And that's not going to stop. Charlie's wife, Erika, has vowed to make sure that Turning Point Action will become stronger, bolder, louder, and greater than ever before. Charlie 's voice will become millions of voices. I'm proud to be one of them. That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Turning Point Action today. Thirteen years ago when Charlie looked at our college campuses, he saw teenagers from good, Christian, conservative homes being indoctrinated with leftist contempt for America. And he realized, just like my dad did, that America was going to be destroyed from the inside out unless our young people were taught to love this country again... the way our grandparents were. Turning Point Action is inspiring a new wave of conservatism across our country. It's why my dad believes in Turning Point Action. Because Donald Trump knows that one administration alone can't save this nation. We need millions of Americans to have their own "turning point" moment and realize that our country will survive only if citizens value freedom more than left-wing Socialism and race-baiting politics. The attacks on my father and Charlie are proof that the Left wants to destroy this nation. Peter will join with me in supporting Turning Point Action by sending a one-time gift of any amount today? Just as light pushes back darkness, a stronger Turning Point Action will defeat the America haters. Charlie was taken from us - but his missionlives on in us. His courage is an example to all of us. So is his patriotism. Thank you for helping Turning Point Action ensure that everything he fought for - and everything our forefathers fought for - will endure for future generations. For Charlie & America,Eric Trump On behalf of Turning Point Action P.S. We were all under siege. And I hope my book reminds you that evil will not prevail when patriots stand together. Thank you again for standing with the Trump family and all the patriots at Turning Point Action. And with Charlie. | | TURNING POINT ACTION, INC. body:
A hospital bed can stop a child from being trafficked
There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now.

| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a6fcc573dd0d481c84e794684416c58c&_e=ihXo0M0Mj3W01TExR6BjU_5LPLy2yuxecZjBqZHZT3SgEpTYqFmpLxrSA3ZPz1bvKgwRnQoTZjBPkl7z2obpsIs-V1DFIqiJPxKc94NroQSyjvraGX3JtI0Fg921XnL-ZETxYgZppOrnH_sN_dHvpDboUNgnIwou0qZWt0ZRJNEd6k9pKc6abKXVHK2PhLjGWlRo0znb4f89VG6dugVAWjUVL54erN7pQ9v0V65WDM7MSjyUkibh_YiNQRJtVgomgo6WMYHEHiUrkUYWV88OWdtOlgZ3roDr-G0nSoHEVnT6ulwwiiFrdRoinl769JEPJCR8j0ppyHt_45OK3jUmIDXDDR2HMkDtpGzwa-hUjKw95KIcmiwnN7oiftlwunDNFStCmLVu2BJGnZk9QQz48u-S-3InYG7UQ5m3WuNGEuOkIjeyDvIQJGAcKM31WWuXhSfx8Ds90yLPdHX_D7RZrarxVyNamsaT1btS0nGmOG9N9Nyq_KCN7vAW1IVhf5tUO76qSC2hi-hHCPsopqX4FeTYX3URc157s8OyKwrghret-n7SfEnRALNR3kZUa7gdyyHOtluUHVbiVu1W6ky-9f8l1IvpL826VLpZ_mo_t9fs3ANbrfG6NzfftwRVQR_QoBoNdaE5Quiz8iR2ffDzs1aFg-X4eFmXDOPzRF4krY_G5Ny7vOCoZtfVd2NODta1XwzFFBZhan_AjOhrD_oSWER4Oq5cSCXY-RBt3SHbVgM2R88AQfsb3F-LiMqtFdZCUFA2_9rv331l5Wo-4h1PELk_Lg0vY-20H6Lh7g26r62BwiFAGrNyDWjZladnP1bI)
---
Peter,
---
Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film _Sound of Freedom._ But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal:

**I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds** to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City.
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a6fcc573dd0d481c84e794684416c58c&_e=ihXo0M0Mj3W01TExR6BjU_5LPLy2yuxecZjBqZHZT3SgEpTYqFmpLxrSA3ZPz1bvKgwRnQoTZjBPkl7z2obpsIs-V1DFIqiJPxKc94NroQSyjvraGX3JtI0Fg921XnL-ZETxYgZppOrnH_sN_dHvpDboUNgnIwou0qZWt0ZRJNEd6k9pKc6abKXVHK2PhLjGWlRo0znb4f89VG6dugVAWjUVL54erN7pQ9v0V65WDM7MSjyUkibh_YiNQRJtVgomgo6WMYHEHiUrkUYWV88OWdtOlgZ3roDr-G0nSoHEVnQKi3n1Jf35sLjYMExYNGfj28HpHLr37f2EoF_HhqU5GJTZwUD_yqI0wfQz1o7zFGK6HTN1Zop2TXgVMbNr6BM77_sxMyW3E3oDhI0wAcqc3KexPuDQD0i8sf-0oC2KWGE36DYQeR3I8QFShns-P3WBpRnBr4vBoueYPQt6kam1JQNptqNSBhDi-cZHBNveiHpv27e8kJNbsVRbILDQoCcvRstlUMSaHJcMgYto8JXfgL0a94iG3lppukZgFYZsZd8sS3DMe8xPLjjbjAvJZTH_pAlMhfN1aJRl4Ba8cSWpOy7TZCnGxZzPDCKcEymwc82khXP-bBAV0Hlq0s5doA9tgaZpjLjHZ6o9417DgTvqEMzN5OtPEc3DfQX-ol7sFqlov9c-OTJIi_m42eVNiy_-SjiDkwXQ5HL5upPbKY-GLBekWgrJCf1ECfiOH9U8kJ-iFgHFWeRGhOfbae-644mPv-ToB_I5BLfius-MyxO926GTJB3o2Fv11aiLPZC-ss3SDFXKJfl03ExE1rSb94Ga)

These beds are lifelines. Every $1 you give becomes $10 of real medical value.How?Because through the Sound of Freedom Foundation's partnerships with trusted humanitarian distributors, we're able to secure **bulk discounts on high-need medical equipment**. That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help.$25 -> provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies.
$50 -> provides $500 toward children's ICU beds.
$100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies.
$250 or more -> helps equip an entire hospital ward for rescued children. **_[Will you give $25, $50, or $100 today to help us reach this goal and bring healing to God’s children?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a6fcc573dd0d481c84e794684416c58c&_e=ihXo0M0Mj3W01TExR6BjU_5LPLy2yuxecZjBqZHZT3SgEpTYqFmpLxrSA3ZPz1bvKgwRnQoTZjBPkl7z2obpsIs-V1DFIqiJPxKc94NroQSyjvraGX3JtI0Fg921XnL-ZETxYgZppOrnH_sN_dHvpDboUNgnIwou0qZWt0ZRJNEd6k9pKc6abKXVHK2PhLjGWlRo0znb4f89VG6dugVAWjUVL54erN7pQ9v0V65WDM7MSjyUkibh_YiNQRJtVgomgo6WMYHEHiUrkUYWV88OWdtOlgZ3roDr-G0nSoHEVnTmf1kXBEudI33A8isAT9a5b1NVZCC_CsN-vRpbWSFauZDvKSBJfja4RN9ZwToS8_IBSjDYU8ZwX1G6SPrW2UxH6nmeWV2d23pxiScmVs8YFkeXhg2HuX0WHgNfmceFtZLZ6ZEoajIN24VlhQOUD2mhe6_AzIA0fV32o6iG9LQhjrbOTDeixYZEuiCPDBRWA1eE7s3W26BdBcA7qBypvBrynizscHyK9rzBmQYxjC0QUpnGCoxRfUkTGoofrsmTzn1xCAgtTEQ4q9vkQDZhDdQbpBfPosAQyrA6iFtppZ9O-35UF0KYXiiwE7_nIKX2ACpycmRkiBijbG6u51i5fNIc2M3vSImNxkY1M0I7XdfTRU6ouHtIgyTS3D5eZbhygBw6T-FSE3Acvef-yS9k5Ov361UDncROCjzvdTT5FgiIz_VjF5uFCwRcdAW6j6m4pkFe9Gp7M9RHgfnAuX9usyRf_a-mA-x9-PfLjKfTYUS0OHM5ICRaHiuoDMp_7bzC7sJj99btNpW4Qajh5PO99czV)_**

When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive.In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, **a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused.** This is what we can change together.We have the plan.
We have the partners.
But this mission can't launch without you.Peter, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation.If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit.**[Will you give $25, $50, $100, or more today to help us deliver these ICU beds to Mexico City before time runs out?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a6fcc573dd0d481c84e794684416c58c&_e=ihXo0M0Mj3W01TExR6BjU_5LPLy2yuxecZjBqZHZT3SgEpTYqFmpLxrSA3ZPz1bvKgwRnQoTZjBPkl7z2obpsIs-V1DFIqiJPxKc94NroQSyjvraGX3JtI0Fg921XnL-ZETxYgZppOrnH_sN_dHvpDboUNgnIwou0qZWt0ZRJNEd6k9pKc6abKXVHK2PhLjGWlRo0znb4f89VG6dugVAWjUVL54erN7pQ9v0V65WDM7MSjyUkibh_YiNQRJtVgomgo6WMYHEHiUrkUYWV88OWdtOlgZ3roDr-G0nSoHEVnROw-yKzjhqaKo31YjJZhcyhQ9vh6_GiOzhynhnYeNvU5e7-N9WKrPfIxbv48CneWBexLLL8dNfjFUjvM_uUYzHcUPCbAgh9Muj-QWaZEbB3SlVVB5IhdUcuuG0RxYRM7E-WoCCEvFigDMB2mBd8fiRi_yfHkKvCmUumVCfjFL3Qj4Ys6T8AlLrdGolmwM_mYxq4mQ2rSo8zuvCiHaCGGPmSqpVEGXyjXDwCmmS98Xxa-csWgFwJjTT6PspW4DiO9T_ENdMKjemo5HitonbAb86SRAnGGSMu2Gu1yGENhi9bIcGd1I7Ia9L6hrmamDMid4mdrp472wHwrgavc3RsswE378QvrW2NMGGdraKPfMk3qjUiIOQUID-9dPF-MFUvXDxkzBRn29ZpoBBlipjSBPMdkqyT-XLZaeQbRjK55RIsc8B50wAZn0cDOGcrXIYwL6AXTt1TqMisPpAJQ1fqYxkxYbQKmzmwaev59iZnzu47zwUebO3w9su1Ys3TJvClAUYzJZHLxmSsfJbetPhVDr7)**

clean_body: A hospital bed can stop a child from being trafficked There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now. | | | Peter, Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film Sound of Freedom. But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the Sound of Freedom Foundation. A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal: I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City. These beds are lifelines. They are where a fragile heartbeat stabilizes, where a child's breathing grows stronger, where healing happens. Every $1 you give becomes $10 of real medical value.How?Because through the Sound of Freedom Foundation's partnerships with trusted humanitarian distributors, we're able to secure bulk discounts on high-need medical equipment. That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help.$25 -> provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies. $50 -> provides $500 toward children's ICU beds. $100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies. $250 or more -> helps equip an entire hospital ward for rescued children. When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive.In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused. This is what we can change together.We have the plan. We have the partners. But this mission can't launch without you.Peter, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation.If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit. For God's children, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: your credit card fees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?refcode=jtk466-su-fl-header&t=1001&akid=10543%2E434096%2E1ebBb9 ]John Fetterman

NEW from WTAJ → “Fetterman targets ‘predatory’ credit card late fees with $8 cap”

Folks – big banks are charging up to $41 for a single late credit card payment. That’s up to five times more than it actually costs them to collect it. It's messed up. 😡

This isn’t about responsibility. It’s about squeezing people for profit. And it’s wrong.

Families are already being crushed by the affordability crisis. Groceries cost more. Rent costs more. Utilities and medication cost more.

The last thing folks need is big banks and credit card companies gouging them with credit card late fees that make it harder to stay afloat, let alone get ahead.

That’s why John introduced the Credit Card Fairness Act. It caps late fees at $8 – because penalty fees shouldn’t be profit centers.

For far too long, big banks have profited from families falling behind on credit card bills. Now, we want to hear from you. Will you take 10 seconds to be one of the 5,000 responses we need? >>

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52578?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10543%2E434096%2E1ebBb9

Should credit card late fees be capped at $8?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52578?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1003&akid=10543%2E434096%2E1ebBb9

Thanks for your quick response,

Team Fetterman 💛

name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: Because people refused to give up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Seth has been fighting for affordable health care — and will keep going.

| |
---
Team, Late last week, the House took a step forward on health care. After months of pressure, lawmakers voted to renew enhanced Affordable Care Act subsidies — relief that helps families here in Massachusetts afford coverage and stay insured. Seth has been on the front lines of this fight, pushing to protect coverage and lower costs while others tried to delay, deflect, or block action altogether. Last week’s vote shows what’s possible when leaders refuse to back down. But this fight isn’t over. The Senate still needs to act, and families are still at risk of losing coverage if Congress stalls again. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123576687/595899792/-197407844?refcode=260118_sfm_hcpass&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQ3NTdiMi1hN2Y0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkAnhTZE0bnCrhlU5h-oJ3c2JIm5bQGjwxIZ_TbRiXY=&emci=6b4757b2-a7f4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=704757b2-a7f4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=194769) And Seth’s not stopping there. ### About Seth Moulton

clean_body: Seth has been fighting for affordable health care — and will keep going. | | Team, Late last week, the House took a step forward on health care. After months of pressure, lawmakers voted to renew enhanced Affordable Care Act subsidies — relief that helps families here in Massachusetts afford coverage and stay insured. Seth has been on the front lines of this fight, pushing to protect coverage and lower costs while others tried to delay, deflect, or block action altogether. Last week’s vote shows what’s possible when leaders refuse to back down. But this fight isn’t over. The Senate still needs to act, and families are still at risk of losing coverage if Congress stalls again. And Seth’s not stopping there. He just introduced the Healthcare Reinvestment Act to redirect money away from ICE and into health care, instead of continuing to fund an agency that has been terrorizing people in communities across the country. At a time when families are struggling to afford health care, Washington shouldn’t be sending more money to ICE instead. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. — Seth for Massachusetts | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to: Seth for Massachusetts - PO Box 2013, Salem, MA, 01970 Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Seth for Massachusetts PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: We Can Change Who Holds Power – Now
body:
Why my race matters.

| | | | | [|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=04c5c1b11f&e=395a33a3d2)
| | | | | | It’s been another rough week, hasn’t it?
President Trump has waged several wars – both at home and abroad.
He’s waged a war against Denmark and [tariffs on eight EU countries](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=9d92860b20&e=395a33a3d2) to try to steal Greenland, [sparking protests today](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=8d57720976&e=395a33a3d2) in support of self-determination.

[](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=55e590d5e0&e=395a33a3d2)
He’s waged [a war against the Federal Reserve](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=a3b2d52e26&e=395a33a3d2) – an independent agency that he’s trying to bend to his political will to serve himself, not us.
[](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=0ca97202b1&e=395a33a3d2)
And he’s waged a war against Minneapolis - [sending nearly 3,000 federal agents](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=2527530544&e=395a33a3d2) and [threatening to invoke the Insurrection Act](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=6eb4893064&e=395a33a3d2) to deploy our military against protestors amidst tensions in the aftermath of [Renee Good’s murder](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=bda0516c88&e=395a33a3d2) and a [man being shot by federal agents](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=0f84199b0f&e=395a33a3d2).

[](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=0db01f2247&e=395a33a3d2)
The reason that ICE is able to ramp up their secret police efforts is because of [Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” – which gave ICE $170B in our taxpayer dollars for immigration enforcement](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=ebf05dde2b&e=395a33a3d2) that is [inflicting violence](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=561d65aee9&e=395a33a3d2) [and terror on our communities](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=da64aa2e8c&e=395a33a3d2).
Guess who was the last hold out who ended up supporting the BBB so it could be signed into law?
This guy.
---
[|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=63280f6c5f&e=395a33a3d2)
|
---
| |

**Whether you live in our district or not, who fills this seat in our district matters because it impacts every single person in this country.**
With Chip now running for Attorney General – this an open seat for the first time since 2018.
And Trump’s recent hissy fit to demand five new Texas seats so Republicans don’t get wiped out in the midterms led them to pull conservative voters from our district – making it more competitive.
_May their incompetence and greed be ever in our favor._
When I’m elected to Congress, you can be sure that I will work to fix all that this corrupt administration has broken and to ensuring every city in our nation is safe.
---
| [DONATE](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=eaaaf2d688&e=395a33a3d2)

It finally happened.

Anonymous **Dark Money Democrat** **groups** are officially spending money in AZ-05 to attack me. The radical left is promising **Trump’s IMPEACHMENT** if they flip the House this fall. And now, they’re making renewed calls to abolish ICE and law enforcement.

On top of all that, fellow Patriot, donations have slowed to a halt. I get it. It’s January. People are less engaged. People are recovering from the holidays.

[**But the urgency of this particular moment in the year can not be understated. Our January mid-month deadline is critical for two reasons:**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d69545c44dbd439ab8c55a218bb57ab2&_e=Npy2IOH9KRR4j-alJEgScun3oImGzfGqIDLs0tnMOsSMaofigx27hM3KhxE72qRN78OEBgok6wsvcIigk4QioAxWi_aWcrw0X-zQNTplJkspe3bB5RXuYQKCWif8kWEpAKUi4Itq00Pxlj18QIER3mJxpCbeVdhF2sOHGhTjXqBZYrNNJOoIu31k_fQdTFqMq-DM98bDeeI4ULsbewRA-HYJ_IvE2-DG1LiPF1F9VAapv5scQk6EsSdJSNTxMiUgaI3wLvo2UzkfpzXa03ALXdxi4MpVa5Vi34Tl_R0Z0lgsTLddPTmFSLPI-yE7dr21IXNco1M0GiDt1whGZTJRtgvKCj88HUmO-gbyWejPeClDd_y5tmtK77jU0FPc4K-hZgCG17eMa0Rq_StE2KHscPZ61bnFhsomEx7KjSonRG53msWO55QdRZC5VpLncIZp-Cjmk_YjXc4zX9OVvFDSrCECBpmdqsRG53og6h23xNIsObS65r4xP39uGm7qQFUm7UFYhra2trJK3agREnMaB0nJBTKkCMLJpc99eF8Da_qI-uVCFFP39XKMtrnhgFHezmEiWs_f2Hw5mqd7tIwL4xJCT-1-LlkcbGN2MAFjxl8XZyJrNZ-pZWyAeiIxKD69Sb9MPUCQ-HF8qAVzRlSLvvii4T7_7oRgOuhJ7cJhuFw%3D)

There comes a point in every man’s life...
| Dear Peter,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---
No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: **_“Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.”_**

**I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump.**

_Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my** _own_**._

**That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**

_Peter, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit._

But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get.

_I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America._

With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and _WON_!

_But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day._

clean_body: There comes a point in every man’s life... | Dear Peter, There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you. No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: “Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.” I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump. Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my own. That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE. Peter, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit. But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get. I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America. With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and WON! But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day. Thank you and God Bless you! Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

body:
Powered by People is creating the infrastructure on the ground that helps us fight back and build political power.
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240613%2E444211%2EPIB4YC)
We want to take a moment to talk about what’s happening in Minnesota.
Donald Trump sent ICE to terrorize communities across the state. Agents are beating civilians. They are causing chaos and destruction. And one even shot and killed a mother—Renee Good.
Instead of turning down the temperature, Trump is intentionally stoking the flames. He’s even threatened to invoke the Insurrection Act—an extraordinary and dangerous escalation.
**What’s happening is entirely unacceptable.** But seeing the people of Minnesota organizing their communities against Trump’s authoritarianism is nothing short of inspiring, and we stand behind them.
Why? _Because action is the antidote to despair._ Community action. Community organizing. Bringing our neighbors together to show that we reject this, and that we are willing to fight for something better.
**We know that Trump won’t stop with Minnesota. He’s willing to bring his political games anywhere, anytime. So we have to stay organized and ready here in Texas—just like we were in the summer during the gerrymandering fight.**
Powered by People has been establishing the infrastructure on the ground that helps us resist his authoritarianism, fight back, and build political power throughout our state. We’re registering voters, training volunteers, hosting community events, and connecting people with actions they can take—like the rallies we held to fight back against their attempt to steal five congressional seats.
All of our fights are connected, and the future of Texas depends on us stepping up for each and every one of them.
[**We are committed to building a movement that can change Texas for the better, but we need your help to do it. Can you pitch in $3 to support our organizers who are doing the work on the ground each day?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260118-1.HZcNmi&refcode=ema20260118-240613&t=3&akid=240613%2E444211%2EPIB4YC)

Why? Because action is the antidote to despair. Community action. Community organizing. Bringing our neighbors together to show that we reject this, and that we are willing to fight for something better. We know that Trump won’t stop with Minnesota. He’s willing to bring his political games anywhere, anytime. So we have to stay organized and ready here in Texas—just like we were in the summer during the gerrymandering fight. Powered by People has been establishing the infrastructure on the ground that helps us resist his authoritarianism, fight back, and build political power throughout our state. We’re registering voters, training volunteers, hosting community events, and connecting people with actions they can take—like the rallies we held to fight back against their attempt to steal five congressional seats. All of our fights are connected, and the future of Texas depends on us stepping up for each and every one of them. Thank you, Powered by People

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: There’s a lot on our plate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
As you might imagine, running for Governor is tough.
| Hi, Mandela Barnes here -- we’re chipping away here at our monthly fundraising goal. **As you might imagine, running for Governor is tough.** From combating relentless attacks from the GOP... ... to raising enough money to compete with Tom Tiffany’s $2 million war chest... There’s a lot that needs to get done so we can share our bold vision with voters across Wisconsin. How we do in November depends on the resources we're able to invest in today. [If that’s enough to convince you to pitch in, would you consider donating $15 or $27?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_011826_B1_MMFR&t=2&akid=5781%2E196590%2EONcnVN) We don't want to be scrambling in October, which is why we need to build the campaign infrastructure we need to reach every WI voter early. One of the ways we do that is through direct contact with voters. A contribution today goes toward placing early orders of yard signs, posters, clipboards, and more. Today, I need 35 people who are willing to contribute $15 to our campaign so we can continue reaching our goal and connecting with voters. name: Team Trisha
subject: Blood in the water
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Our shocking victory in Boebert’s most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However [if you'd like to unsubscribe,](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lmkfDLT97CpMot3-oILgm2cb_H-uin_89mqsRz4KsLa891tCMywodqxvZBQHzRqYJuVShGxhTYMCu94aOSpLd8SdrSXcc_kG57qc1UkVZABPVkDv0g43UFLPShFwEZPf0whcdzLuQL1FDfxNFE8pPfSPVcGm8VduQORgaVVoBvHwca2TlWVnIz6rgFis1Hx6kBP6_jCWkbg=&c=EYKccRy5a_izbqYYiQB0_KlC-1QZ0wFYMkwPrP6e1jQ_lSAOHe_kHw==&ch=XHAKGW-IvaopMWikV5Kaqp4woh87bugHwKrm5QZZE8cTpk2HqhFe7A==) you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lmkfDLT97CpMot3-oILgm2cb_H-uin_89mqsRz4KsLa891tCMywodpQoRApdjvG6wjZSfrgwnXNg0mRADkbCGwkNclXX2fH3O0fYKK4bvYwW86v3lESqPTR1yGNvL-IljMeP0F2wSgBgygYIKn3u9B462UldSv-qMH8LVxh8mNHBvmmOrqfpB7F5oueTst7Z96YHJjJeNt2Ikq6dMxxBvwHc_tG59U1Ib1E3YViONV0=&c=EYKccRy5a_izbqYYiQB0_KlC-1QZ0wFYMkwPrP6e1jQ_lSAOHe_kHw==&ch=XHAKGW-IvaopMWikV5Kaqp4woh87bugHwKrm5QZZE8cTpk2HqhFe7A==)
---
| Peter,
To say that Lauren Boebert is vulnerable in the upcoming 2026 midterms is an understatement.
After reading this we hope you will understand why we so wholeheartedly believe that Trisha Cavarese can beat Boebert in 2026.
In June 2025, MAGA launched a lightning push to pass a "home rule" ballot initiative in Douglas County, the most populous county in Lauren Boebert's congressional district. Home rule would have allowed this red county to create its own constitution and in a sense secede from the state putting the county at odds with the Governor and legislature.
Against all odds, Democrats managed the effort to stop home rule in Douglas County and together we defeated the initiative with a landslide 70% of the vote.
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lmkfDLT97CpMot3-oILgm2cb_H-uin_89mqsRz4KsLa891tCMywodpQoRApdjvG6wjZSfrgwnXNg0mRADkbCGwkNclXX2fH3O0fYKK4bvYwW86v3lESqPTR1yGNvL-IljMeP0F2wSgBgygYIKn3u9B462UldSv-qMH8LVxh8mNHBvmmOrqfpB7F5oueTst7Z96YHJjJeNt2Ikq6dMxxBvwHc_tG59U1I3IZBUBkXwXQ=&c=EYKccRy5a_izbqYYiQB0_KlC-1QZ0wFYMkwPrP6e1jQ_lSAOHe_kHw==&ch=XHAKGW-IvaopMWikV5Kaqp4woh87bugHwKrm5QZZE8cTpk2HqhFe7A==)
---
Our shocking victory in Boebert's most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert, our campaign had the best performance any Democrat has had in this district ever and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points.
This combined with the deep unpopularity of the GOP and Trump, the fact that Boebert is seen as a carpetbagger (she moved hundreds of miles to CD4 after it became clear she would lose in CD3), and the Boebert campaign reporting their lowest ever fundraising this year, means that she is critically vulnerable for 2026.
There is blood in the water and everyone will soon know that Boebert is a paper tiger. She can be beaten this election. [Can we count on you to make a donation of $25 or whatever you can spare to get Trisha the firepower that she will need to demolish Boebert in this coming election?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lmkfDLT97CpMot3-oILgm2cb_H-uin_89mqsRz4KsLa891tCMywodpQoRApdjvG6ZhEZtevlA_aiQl7PTpnMELu3r_q0zzF7f23cKjYSorKdSkOdGIffMN9hIsY2QzaUv9w-Jm_i9_F2zWo00VwdoaTGm_doLW4ImRW3T-7vnE1RmDmVl9HuPHWWWAqEc2qD4d9G2aQ-q1D0zAVXQ88oJxEVtPHEMmQ5-MLjyHRxckrdljVYDzDctA==&c=EYKccRy5a_izbqYYiQB0_KlC-1QZ0wFYMkwPrP6e1jQ_lSAOHe_kHw==&ch=XHAKGW-IvaopMWikV5Kaqp4woh87bugHwKrm5QZZE8cTpk2HqhFe7A==)

| Peter,
To say that Lauren Boebert is vulnerable in the upcoming 2026 midterms is an understatement.
After reading this we hope you will understand why we so wholeheartedly believe that Trisha Cavarese can beat Boebert in 2026.
In June 2025, MAGA launched a lightning push to pass a "home rule" ballot initiative in Douglas County, the most populous county in Lauren Boebert's congressional district. Home rule would have allowed this red county to create its own constitution and in a sense secede from the state putting the county at odds with the Governor and legislature.
Against all odds, Democrats managed the effort to stop home rule in Douglas County and together we defeated the initiative with a landslide 70% of the vote.

Our shocking victory in Boebert's most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert, our campaign had the best performance any Democrat has had in this district ever and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points.
This combined with the deep unpopularity of the GOP and Trump, the fact that Boebert is seen as a carpetbagger (she moved hundreds of miles to CD4 after it became clear she would lose in CD3), and the Boebert campaign reporting their lowest ever fundraising this year, means that she is critically vulnerable for 2026.
There is blood in the water and everyone will soon know that Boebert is a paper tiger. She can be beaten this election. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However == you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | == | Peter, To say that Lauren Boebert is vulnerable in the upcoming 2026 midterms is an understatement. After reading this we hope you will understand why we so wholeheartedly believe that Trisha Cavarese can beat Boebert in 2026. In June 2025, MAGA launched a lightning push to pass a "home rule" ballot initiative in Douglas County, the most populous county in Lauren Boebert's congressional district. Home rule would have allowed this red county to create its own constitution and in a sense secede from the state putting the county at odds with the Governor and legislature. Against all odds, Democrats managed the effort to stop home rule in Douglas County and together we defeated the initiative with a landslide 70% of the vote. | == Our shocking victory in Boebert's most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert, our campaign had the best performance any Democrat has had in this district ever and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points. This combined with the deep unpopularity of the GOP and Trump, the fact that Boebert is seen as a carpetbagger (she moved hundreds of miles to CD4 after it became clear she would lose in CD3), and the Boebert campaign reporting their lowest ever fundraising this year, means that she is critically vulnerable for 2026. There is blood in the water and everyone will soon know that Boebert is a paper tiger. She can be beaten this election. == | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | The time to beat Boebert is now. name: Haley S.
subject: this is an important moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:

Null, I just got out of an emergency meeting with my finance team, and I need to be honest with you:
**Fundraising****has been slow this month.** We’re pacing well behind where we need to be, and with GOP megadonors already flooding this race with dark money, we cannot afford to fall short.
That’s why we’ve set a $15,000 daily fundraising goal. I know. It’s ambitious, but it's necessary. **[Will you rush $5 right now to help us hit this goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12324?t=3&akid=1969%2E49239%2E0DGjrL)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12325?t=4&akid=1969%2E49239%2E0DGjrL)
---
I don’t mean to sound alarmist, but I do want to be clear: **This is an important moment for our campaign.** MAGA Republicans are circling this seat. And if we fall behind now, I’m worried we won’t have the resources to fight back.
So I’m personally asking: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford so we can hit this goal, stay on track, and win this race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12324?t=5&akid=1969%2E49239%2E0DGjrL)**

Thank you for your urgent support,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1969%2E49239%2E0DGjrL) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12323?t=11&akid=1969%2E49239%2E0DGjrL)

Haley

Friend,
As of this month, we’re one full year into Donald Trump’s second term. It’s been a year filled with chaos and cruelty, and the American people have borne the brunt of his disastrous agenda.
We’ve seen Trump’s reckless tariffs send everyday costs soaring. We’ve seen him sign the biggest cut to health care in U.S. history into law to fund another tax break for billionaires. We’ve seen him pull directly from the playbook of authoritarians.
I could keep going, but I’ll try to keep this brief. It’s already been a long year.
**Now, with new polls showing Trump’s approval rating falling to historic lows, I need to know where _you_ stand one year into this administration.**

subject: Never expected to get the cold shoulder from YOU
body:
Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I've reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they've texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you've always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump's mission to save America, so I'm giving you one more chance!

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=3&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI) | [ **“ _CBS_ and _CNN_ Are Being
Sacrificed to Trump”**
[**_The Atlantic_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=5&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI) ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=4&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
---|---
[**150,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=6&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
[**Sign our petition to stand with the free press against Donald Trump’s TAKEOVER →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=7&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
[SIGN MY NAME NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=8&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
---
* * *
We are in a state of CONSTANT DREAD, team.

Donald Trump is literally trying to take control of _CBS_ and _CNN_ and SPREAD his propaganda ACROSS THE COUNTRY!!!!!

Just in time to LIE to the American people and [**STEAL THE MIDTERMS.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=9&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI) This is a blatant [**ATTACK**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=10&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI) on the Constitution.

[**We have to stop this in its tracks FAST. That’s why Elizabeth Warren is sounding the alarm:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=11&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=12&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
In response to this horrible news, we are launching a **RAPID RESPONSE PETITION** to STAND with _CBS, CNN,_ and the Free Press. We CAN’T let them fall victim to these attacks – they NEED our support!!
[**150,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=13&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
[**PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE: Don’t click away from this email without signing. Our petition (and the idea of free speech in the United States) needs you NOW >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=14&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
[SIGN MY NAME NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=15&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
---

[**Still not convinced you need to sign?? Keep reading:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=16&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)

1️⃣ Since returning to office 1 year ago Donald Trump has repeatedly attacked the Free Press, even going after those who speak out against him.

2️⃣ This attempt to control _CBS_ and _CNN_ is all a ploy to STEAL the Midterms and we CANNOT let the Free Press be used as a pawn in his game.

3️⃣ We are racing to gather 150,000 SIGNATURES on our **RAPID RESPONSE PETITION** to show Trump that the American people STAND with the Free Press.

4️⃣ This **RAPID RESPONSE PETITION** will only remain open for [24] hours and we don’t see your name on it yet!! **_Trump is LAUGHING!!!!!!!!!!_**
[**We know this is scary to think about, but if we are going to save our Democracy, we ALL need to step up and do our part.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=17&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)

This is the best way to fight back, team. Please, don’t wait any longer.
[**150,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=18&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
[**Add your name NOW to our RAPID RESPONSE PETITION to STAND with _CBS, CNN,_ and the Free Press in the next [24] hours >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=19&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)
[SIGN MY NAME NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72659?t=20&akid=23837%2E4449941%2EJ4DvQI)

Counting on you,

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Ben will always be a reason I fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Ben will always be my “why." [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123578208/595904753/-671935818?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.21_Disability-Champions_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0NTY0Mi1hZmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8wS40QLIyAT1rLBiZPo0S9PdfTThYCKW4A3xkVFnF8=) Ben is my 37-year-old son who was born with cerebral palsy. I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like Ben would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children.

Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. attacking key rights and protections for the disability community, that mission has become more important than ever.

**That’s why I’ve taken on RFK Jr. for his radical conspiracy theories, his anti-vaccine platform, and his blatant attacks on Americans who live with disabilities. And I’ve stood up to Trump’s efforts to slash Medicaid and government services that the disability community relies on.**

Today, more than 70 million Americans report that they are living with a disability. It’s clear: We need leaders in the U.S. House and Senate who will fiercely advocate for disabled folks to have the access to the health care, caretakers, jobs, and _lives_ that they deserve.

[**_So I’m personally asking: Will you please chip in $5 or more to elect a wave of disability champions to Congress in 2026 who will stand up to Trump and RFK Jr.’s attacks?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123578209/595904754/-671935818?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.21_Disability-Champions_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0NTY0Mi1hZmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8wS40QLIyAT1rLBiZPo0S9PdfTThYCKW4A3xkVFnF8=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123578210/595904755/-671935818?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.21_Disability-Champions_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDg0NTY0Mi1hZmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8wS40QLIyAT1rLBiZPo0S9PdfTThYCKW4A3xkVFnF8=)

clean_body: Ben will always be my “why." = Ben is my 37-year-old son who was born with cerebral palsy. I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like Ben would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. attacking key rights and protections for the disability community, that mission has become more important than ever. That’s why I’ve taken on RFK Jr. for his radical conspiracy theories, his anti-vaccine platform, and his blatant attacks on Americans who live with disabilities. And I’ve stood up to Trump’s efforts to slash Medicaid and government services that the disability community relies on. Today, more than 70 million Americans report that they are living with a disability. It’s clear: We need leaders in the U.S. House and Senate who will fiercely advocate for disabled folks to have the access to the health care, caretakers, jobs, and lives that they deserve. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I’ll always be fighting for folks like Ben to have a chance to succeed. Thanks for all your support. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

For all of 2025, the GOP was haunted by one major problem that hurt our chances in nearly every election...
_**[Republicans aren’t turning out to vote when President Trump isn’t on the ballot!](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/U2DilejIPl8TOanLTaIKc6dskMs5TS_U9ERtOxhMP588Iyq7EduVnPwN67JznK9Vb7bRDVQBkrSYCvcSdHzEW8pwDPv1eIIjWNlGRlA_RE6z7JA-5PwKwdozh5TfuhWyI6SAN_9BCAp3hnDTBOi1XGzk88j1P-VwvEJXb4n4-qLzxPzY4ONtEAsGpEdm7IpFxvv8I-iGlZO5JWMUm9jHenMYVxNg610M4ZRBDQy0b4FHl3wVkFdRLa0xHbj-Cd-R-q_5nPQZQUXR-enPZ44fiSu5Y4GjQrSVQjmfQ6A5Uiiv6-BmIGv2_A7CkxibHNyo7PKVr5YulzOrS3uZ-9S8tQ9lkPxCDB4Q3PFO-E5aO3HwnkmxQPNwlmK-ZLNclGUpKIVf1Avzj0X_avdUO0pcyrjgkRoCf9dUYKtTHSrFDPUrQ1GDfeeSOpxroG83IcL8zD3ER5uqSi3aBGFIwzoLmGgmYVoMYxB-RWIafrxbwF_rP2wDM8fdvhAaU3GWE5buSoAPSXKN6LjwVojxw-LIDpF3kBJZ2kAysutkcENVYSzqiMtvXH0sJRBumQn-xosIo0DndBUEMtRFr2jqO9pphrEHDO5uPsoyFR_e6b8ilcw5cY38VaZwHQOjMFWJv5QEBQZirDF5z4H1C5c15jYLDPYuphGqHRkSw6e-6l7QPvKUBccXR0bx7RHaVPDm1kN1LsY7t6f6wFz-onWnIX2_SkbNR2EERUETXggV0A_vL4gPM9f66usBU209w09qylKsstjAvpvq68BtRzMaWjBTYM0pvgQqsUjDZwxlXhgC7THMTzMUH6RUWc70_R0eYV0_snero1BWN2zLs-nt_ocGfnUtf_B8_zzOJ9mpcrYtVuJCu_9YT4TidV2rF8AQ37jnKeC84pUeTQT_RYEKF5peqjmrW_ecAw-je4ABGPFdXZb8anXfjYDWOWl2_jxZmaZP75GzNKkBllmTlYAisZAr0nSh7AUV0pKFV-msaWbJJ5vRCLpi6I8JEZ-YTpvm6BY41QW9ztpAhv_SuWFphnYWF7RKoQIv5025TKU1/c9qkJ4H24XP3n49-hYWOxNs1_ozmn-2r/16)**_
That's why the Democrats overperformed in special election after special election last year AND won big in the November 2025 elections.

**[But I’m here to tell you today that President Trump and his agenda is on the ballot for the midterms!](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Dw33Aj8OA7PtDSSuwKdWkvexm78Xi9G6ab3n0mjJVgcYqAjNV2AHIst2oKdWE8j0DHTdHQlxfz_RxUF0NZr0PM_raSbJrBPXlxxzk90hOX5684gqbtCxzsDIGXhRA6HiqBZVwGG-_oOjqgSOY6mLS0kMLDRdzAm9XQtHolHpbq0PSZvUFaaRRZE96TEEDVe9Pf5OBdYCqGxbAeXHxTlguNlGpLzcg1IqwfV1GDVs_9zrQjdbdKjUsmKnyNKEhg4_J-e46hXM_KQiiQZ6nx2_r_DREaqrG10byvE0XPaUhqb8IDvHGQSZXYsQkp7ocq7-o4OImYF83jU3MhY7iX1sJb4H2SvXIIIiwqV90fGnXgP4xhtyUapic_MMOlO9zYJ6A7tmaOZYMWh4n7R5qA6jXIC4xhzelxD0_iBI2GSMH8DYGSTclpN-2bLQkmRTmf9tJ2zGq05GwqwS8UhQy48RruHb0LuLwotSV0-3LYimGtSUrgy8I8VBmZngVixspvb4E1eJLkkVGYAJjodxDLvNAn5vveIZ0_H-m3b1UxC8VMxbMvf-es9MJLyWKOqfzsDGSL_5rVa6gMDMXUmwUXwfbl1ar4YCzYDX-z61Ybor1wiHCpG8do9T0Khd3SjiQcpYJDq0gQ4399_hbZDuWamys64kd6TzrNU0QcLpOkPaI9G2cg5Qr_i7DhfKo5iZOPXAC2runvVkEK7iFHA-9Roj_wadGDNt-Fqf-0HiJalFJGZbV-QfIKh-0W28Q1AHoUrSncmY1iY9YPBY3ecmHgCHgQj2RWR0BWtL1KdFk9l79JaeYoOLTBL37zupTPRagYSPehi10OZKpB1Xij8yl6SEfObVwAGYpKsj_DzJqYaXKCwag1wDzUZNDTz0Eg9uv0vhNZbxR3nJctEyiZVcTqyIYa-wnZ6ycrmWlS8X20C1Gr0tEkH7yGlUNGI1wB7GSAzY0M4Z5v9Xkffhb7WCiJBamAa_mndYwN622N0Xe2jjKeM54-6qyGi7WueerRExgqH0z1j43Mw27yxUDASz2AET_gLcgeUYOetNrimr/Vc1XKeHCkp4TUSOoqbZkoy9o4KRfdc2w/16)**

That's not an exaggeration...

_If we lose Congress, radical far-Left Democrats will take over - and they'll go right back to bogus investigations, hoaxes, and impeachments._

The entire America First agenda will be dead in the water, and it will only be a matter of time before Democrats attempt to remove President Trump from office.

Now that he's on the ballot, President Trump will be hitting the campaign trail and holding rallies all over the country just like he did in 2024.

But one event is set to surpass them all...
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/rnO0569KU3qR9ofhpvJlhV9jQfUScC5Z_yf0LdIUA6tHcIBEK5tmQhbuIGAxScVM922DqwpWBgZ1CMurEAAPbGxT76sfdefAuiTT8dPiYk1B4HQRpqGGr69U1MOOM0CwrY6OsV_uMSFJFuWEpDwKAQGo59shIoW317Xm1jJJRoIc-oPywLUPJyjPtmHSKcKgc068gkqKluyNjB3S0eemuxEupo4nEfSFxwWeTuVezSJYzf6v7snPbBD-cr1rPbC1x-nAMYC4h7w_7fMZFXgYHdnXar0lA6hblegK1d1lXxEY68Q_SRp2vIciNAzY2KnQ-6FRcD4IZ6tYay2KEwRQSJI6Hozj0-zIvMIWZp7YF7aD0rZH6aLb6L12ht4bIcX7gmDpCthH_Df_LY6q7lUr9b7NLthjBkZzGjPolsqiQt6zEksUei-9towLwxWjuLk0YwxlXE1th1VFJKAx-eBh2SBRVTW4oD7P8L4SRelRDDvHIRJE3di17qymEtfVGrwOm0RakBPYBC4UI-QPtSwThzWeqQ7h1TtcBR5zYgXXltG6BZmr44BoHVyJJF8eriVvjILRzjsIrAraaoAQF645rRjeqoT27cHyvJJ-P3FXAoIN1kOTBv27HO-y585FxTmqyh66tP5gGmdvK6tWgEONF8d6wQLvPa4toXrBRrhw8jfl1bgUVkSbQrKV86CJD-sB-inTBqGFiIN8aI0499lJmtdgghet2_bQOJ8UoJSV9tOdiPSbJlFvmAVgLJKNR75wXMUIGHJyL-tw-5yDoRLVUZxHFVGl9TTrMkBjSO9klFmEgYNTfbNLkmu2KQYZOIxPRJM-bpDIAG2gDBw0oBKlBx-21YmTMEtxSrcHYEesgSqtJuIceMDj59Uu3zFc4APSjyPH0vzcHKkxovW6Krx55YZWoEC-sf08Ifbzddg5gZzxA43iLr3_9tTo34JdDxzvdKxDeEiSt6nA48jy65S8dCDg_enVpeYApMvXZV1RvBzuYGk9-O3cLOiMOue2F0yyLcax6HoEavkyJxyE4R9VxjbpiNjFe3fam6tA/QGWFx-o-OCirnWlmEmm1fl8OnTppLVsG/16)
Before this historic event, I want your help setting the GOP's official platform, Peter.

That is why, in my capacity as the Chairman of the NRSC, I'm sending YOU the GOP's official 2026 Midterm Convention Platform Survey.

clean_body: Peter, For all of 2025, the GOP was haunted by one major problem that hurt our chances in nearly every election... That's why the Democrats overperformed in special election after special election last year AND won big in the November 2025 elections. That's not an exaggeration... If we lose Congress, radical far-Left Democrats will take over - and they'll go right back to bogus investigations, hoaxes, and impeachments. The entire America First agenda will be dead in the water, and it will only be a matter of time before Democrats attempt to remove President Trump from office. Now that he's on the ballot, President Trump will be hitting the campaign trail and holding rallies all over the country just like he did in 2024. But one event is set to surpass them all... Before this historic event, I want your help setting the GOP's official platform, Peter. That is why, in my capacity as the Chairman of the NRSC, I'm sending YOU the GOP's official 2026 Midterm Convention Platform Survey. This is your chance to help shape our winning agenda for the most important midterm elections our country has ever seen. ******************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Senator Tim Scott NRSC Chairman | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Elaine Luria
subject: Congratulations, Gov. Spanberger!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine Luria for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123578745/595906740/-507177818?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_260118_FR_SpanbergerInauguration_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmQ3YzQxMi1iMWY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTZE_2hQ_cjY7v9uGMaatUDhtEcAonREVWhVvOf5ELE=) I woke up in a great mood. Yesterday, my friend Abigail Spanberger was sworn in as Virginia’s first female governor. Abigail and I were both elected to Congress in the blue wave of 2018. We’d both just come out of long careers in national security, and were juggling the demands of public service while raising young daughters. It’s because I know Abigail well that I’m confident she will be the steady, fearless champion Virginians need and deserve. It was a delight to watch her achieve this historic goal, and I look forward to being her supporter, friend, and ally over these next four years! Let this mark the start of a new chapter for Virginia. _**A quick note before I go:**_ _One of the best ways to support Governor Spanberger is to elect a Democratic majority to Congress in November._ _We only need to flip three seats to do it, and Virginia’s 2nd District is one of our best pickup opportunities in the entire country._ _A strong majority will ensure federal programs like SNAP and Medicaid are funded, and protect states’ rights to govern themselves.[**Please chip in whatever you can to support my battleground campaign and ensure Governor Spanberger has trustworthy allies on Capitol Hill.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123578746/595906741/-507177818?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_260118_FR_SpanbergerInauguration_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmQ3YzQxMi1iMWY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTZE_2hQ_cjY7v9uGMaatUDhtEcAonREVWhVvOf5ELE=)_ | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123578747/595906742/-507177818?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_260118_FR_SpanbergerInauguration_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmQ3YzQxMi1iMWY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTZE_2hQ_cjY7v9uGMaatUDhtEcAonREVWhVvOf5ELE=)

_Elaine Luria is a retired member of the US Navy. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense._

clean_body: | | = I woke up in a great mood. Yesterday, my friend Abigail Spanberger was sworn in as Virginia’s first female governor. Abigail and I were both elected to Congress in the blue wave of 2018. We’d both just come out of long careers in national security, and were juggling the demands of public service while raising young daughters. It’s because I know Abigail well that I’m confident she will be the steady, fearless champion Virginians need and deserve. It was a delight to watch her achieve this historic goal, and I look forward to being her supporter, friend, and ally over these next four years! Let this mark the start of a new chapter for Virginia. A quick note before I go: One of the best ways to support Governor Spanberger is to elect a Democratic majority to Congress in November. We only need to flip three seats to do it, and Virginia’s 2nd District is one of our best pickup opportunities in the entire country. A strong majority will ensure federal programs like SNAP and Medicaid are funded, and protect states’ rights to govern themselves.= | | | = — Elaine Luria | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Join us TOMORROW for a Celebration of MLK Jr. and Community
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100171283.172319.2&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100171283.172319.2&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171283.172319.2&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16427)
# **Celebrate Martin Luther King, Jr. and Our Community!**
Join us TOMORROW, **January 19th from 11AM - 3PM**,for an inspirational day of music, leadership, and community as we honor the legacy of Martin Luther King, Jr. and the continued fight for dignity, justice, and equality. [Voices of the Dream](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171283.172319.2&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16428) will be a great opportunity to engage with neighbors and re-energize your hope for the world Martin Luther King, Jr. had dreams about. Enjoy music, concessions, great speakers, and a time to reflect, reset, and power-up for the year ahead. It's free to attend, just **[register online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171283.172319.2&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16428)**! [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171283.172319.2&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16428)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: We deserve better
body:
They’re harming this country.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)
**Peter, public servants should act in the best interests of the people they serve.** It doesn’t seem like something we should have to say, but I want to be very clear about where I stand on this. Far too many elected officials serve their own interests — their political party or their personal power — first. If it weren’t clear enough that too many GOP legislators aren’t in politics to serve the people, we only have to look at their “Big, Beautiful Bill.” _Just who is helped by making massive cuts to Medicaid or forcing families in need off of SNAP?_ Republican lawmakers are trading food for hungry children and health insurance for working families in exchange for tax breaks for the wealthiest among us. This feathers their own nest, and it doesn’t make America stronger. **What Washington Republicans are doing is unconscionable. Cruel. A dereliction of their duty to the people of this nation.**_And Peter, most GOP lawmakers know all this — but they’re going to keep trying to enact their ruthless agenda because that is what their party leaders demand, and because they’re worried they could lose the support of their billionaire donor base if they don’t fall in line._ I’m no stranger to standing up to the GOP and fighting to deliver for the people. I’m ready to do so again in the U.S. Senate. But my MAGA opponent is calling upon every powerful politician and dark-money group he can in an attempt to defeat me, so I need your help. **[I’m asking you to contribute today to our campaign for the U.S. Senate so we can get back to work delivering for all Americans.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4411?t=7&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4411?t=8&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)**
---
Our people deserve better. Let’s make sure they get it.
Thanks,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4411?t=9&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=373%2E124072%2ESGErMW)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
