name: Robert Garcia
subject: I am calling for a War Powers vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Trump is leading us into a war with Venezuela
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579033/595907585/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2NhYWRhYy1iNWY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cASphedVNdC5Zx0rDsXuHIzAf8WuO53n-byLsp9Qb3k=)
This is Congressman Robert Garcia, the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
President Trump is leading us toward war with Venezuela — without Congress, without accountability, and without the Constitution.
**Let me be clear: this is dangerous, unconstitutional, and unacceptable.**
The Trump administration has all but admitted the truth — this is about oil and control, not democracy. While Nicolás Maduro is a brutal dictator, that does not give any president the authority to launch a war or pursue regime change on their own. The Constitution is clear: only Congress can authorize war.
Instead of lowering costs, fixing health care, or helping families here at home, Donald Trump is once again steering the country toward another foreign conflict. We’ve seen where this road leads. Endless war. Lost lives. Trillions of taxpayer dollars wasted.
**_Congress must act immediately._**
**I am calling for a War Powers vote to block any unauthorized military action against Venezuela. And we need Republicans to step up and put the Constitution over party — before it’s too late.**
_If you believe no president should be able to start a war alone...
If you believe Congress must do its job...
If you believe America cannot afford another reckless conflict..._
[**Add your name now and demand Congress join me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579034/595907586/1288622638?refcode=260118_RG_warpower-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2NhYWRhYy1iNWY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cASphedVNdC5Zx0rDsXuHIzAf8WuO53n-byLsp9Qb3k=&emci=5d952c82-9cf4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=87caadac-b5f4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=16877361)

Thank you,
Robert Garcia

name: Matt Maasdam
subject: It’s all about service:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MATT MAASDAM FOR CONGRESS
body:
I believe in America. I love America. | | Matt Maasdam is a husband, a father, and a Navy SEAL. He carried the nuclear football for President Obama — now he's running as a Democrat to flip Michigan's 7th congressional district. Friend, Former Department of Justice lawyers just confirmed what we feared: the Trump administration is quietly assembling a national voter roll without any guardrails, transparency, or oversight. And the risks? Catastrophic. This kind of database – built behind closed doors – is a recipe for mass voter purges, discriminatory crackdowns, and widespread chaos heading into 2026 and 2028. It’s the GOP’s dream tool for election subversion. The good news? Democratic Secretaries of State are fighting back. With Trump allies pushing these efforts in courts, Congress, and state legislatures, we urgently need your support to defend the front lines. subject: Quick poll: Trump's voting access executive order
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Team: On his first day in office, President Donald Trump rescinded former President Joe Biden’s 2021 executive order promoting voting access and expanding voter registration.
Biden’s order expanded access to voting and accurate election information in many ways, such as allowing federal agencies to share data with states that seek to establish automatic voter registration efforts and making federal workers and resources available to assist at polling locations. Now, Trump has taken that away, among his other orders attacking voting rights.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about this order. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you agree with Trump rescinding this order that helped promote voter access and expand registration?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=011826_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=011826_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011826_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011826_2&amount=20]

Patriot, The assassin's bullet that nearly took my father's life... the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk... Those moments changed me _forever._ **Because the opposition showed us exactly who they are.** They don't want to debate. They want to destroy. They don't want to talk. They want us gone. **That 's why I wrote my new book -- _Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation_ -- to tell the story of what it takes to stare evil in the face... and WIN.**

Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. This isn't a campaign memoir. It's about what happens when your family is hunted -- and how FAITH, COURAGE, and PATRIOTISM keep you standing. When I watched that rally in Butler, Pennsylvania -- my son and daughter on my lap -- and saw my dad drop behind the podium, I thought _ _ he was gone. **When he stood up -- ****_blood on his face, fist in the air_**** -- something changed in America.** We saw courage. We saw real leadership. And millions of people realized: _Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation._ **Patriot, that moment -- and Charlie's sacrifice -- have ignited a true "turning point" for America:** 🇺🇸 Millions of Americans are rejecting Leftist lies
🇺🇸 Young people are choosing FAITH and FREEDOM over fear
🇺🇸 Students are rising up and loving their country again But we can't slow down now. Not when the Left is still trying to silence every one of us. **[That’s why I’m asking you to stand with Turning Point Action — and I’ll send you a hardback copy of Under Siege as my personal thanks for your gift of $50 or more today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a6a323a32b244216b6ca0be33f2d3792&_e=Ajx9i6tqI6838IviqUYJ7cKZYUoN7CjefdubhL8UtqN_6_MrXCfjRJkPi8OqmRMFj1ut9WWV1Z3QGeTH9AZhSwGRsG5MEOlPI8BgXa1N9MvlC8mA646hb2vDyEvq7dFfu60Lt6r4iG_Ooadk8zDJTRVHd4jHWJWQykrcYKwZyMr-_EzFG4sr28XhY-JuQhQgUDEuTL1H67KrH8-IQtpS6BMktnpwiwgxMjZtVXbBAohyZEH7nRr-q6Fdyc1GPF7JvXQXuxN209TUNPOS55UcRqjNHo4PjHRkoHfOVMHdgyA1JibEQ00hGMAGRDkoRDxETPD59G2yhDN16wfyzDJC-r6qUPno7mnLlVs2ILF7XozM4dzsTmUnIWFHvZ0LAm-kQw3f5iEQfNqR6p8A0ixqimPcawtnZhLbXshBcuwGgZKDkU_vOwRAFBeBqMoAxipz84QPLsOU59GRX9qKxUwBnHxl_W0fp1RZa7PjE3iN9s61phfffcVjW-xhvnb_QT-5MrlADvZG_Q8CsrfqPX1EwK-SpAhCovFKwWb2kjivPNSWjhDXzKDUxwQQOIKsDq3yynQEYzDvBQGQqZik_tHqC2It2B2HBTHlrWR_4H2-no5jTS3q5hzyuMd9yFZH_gyD0emvl_XZnABJvkcVhMgmO9C1eD9qJg187coa23kY_AES7e7MpNu_qK0FuLTT43eJEPhGN5rs3JyImXxaxKs4kEkeDB1g_skcbG-KNEr9g88%3D)**

---
**For Charlie & America,****Eric Trump**

clean_body: A bullet won’t stop this movement| | | Patriot, The assassin's bullet that nearly took my father's life... the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk... Those moments changed me forever. Because the opposition showed us exactly who they are. They don't want to debate. They want to destroy. They don't want to talk. They want us gone. That 's why I wrote my new book -- Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation -- to tell the story of what it takes to stare evil in the face... and WIN. Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. This isn't a campaign memoir. It's about what happens when your family is hunted -- and how FAITH, COURAGE, and PATRIOTISM keep you standing. When I watched that rally in Butler, Pennsylvania -- my son and daughter on my lap -- and saw my dad drop behind the podium, I thought he was gone. When he stood up -- blood on his face, fist in the air -- something changed in America. We saw courage. We saw real leadership. And millions of people realized: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. Patriot, that moment -- and Charlie's sacrifice -- have ignited a true "turning point" for America: 🇺🇸 Millions of Americans are rejecting Leftist lies 🇺🇸 Young people are choosing FAITH and FREEDOM over fear 🇺🇸 Students are rising up and loving their country again But we can't slow down now. Not when the Left is still trying to silence every one of us. Charlie Kirk's courage is an example to us all. So was his patriotism. His voice will become millions of voices. And I'm proud to be one of them. With your help -- this movement will never be silenced. For Charlie & America,Eric Trump On behalf of Turning Point Action P.S. We're all under siege, Patriot. But evil doesn't win when patriots stand together. | | TURNING POINT ACTION, INC. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Under investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
As a former CIA officer, I’ve seen democracies flicker out.
| Team,

Several weeks ago, myself and five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds made a video directly quoting the Uniform Code of Military Justice about the military’s responsibility to reject illegal orders.

In response, President Trump called for my arrest, trial and death by hanging.

**Last week I learned that former Fox News host Jeanine Pirro, U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia, asked to interview me.**

This is on top of the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division’s inquiry at the end of last year.

As a former CIA officer, I've seen democracies flicker out. I’ve seen what life is like when a government is rigged. I’ve studied this kind of political authoritarianism in other countries where you can't criticize the guys in charge without getting a knock at the door in the middle of the night.

It’s hard to believe I am talking about it in my own country, and the knock is happening on my door.

I've always tried to be straight with you in these emails. When these threats happen, it requires a strategy -- because no American wants to live in a country where the president can weaponize the government against his perceived enemies.

[So please: split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign today that will help defend me from these attacks and allow me to keep fighting to defend our democracy.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101451?t=6&akid=22650%2E878179%2ESdcqOf) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101452?t=7&akid=22650%2E878179%2ESdcqOf)

More soon,

Elissa
878179

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22650%2E878179%2ESdcqOf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22650%2E878179%2ESdcqOf).**

name: Tobias Read
subject: “Like living in hell”: President Trump says Portland will be next city to see National Guard on streets
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260118em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260118em-portland-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs]
In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260118em-portland-pet-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=pjiawy7fwt88M74mp1FVzDcnGEH8POhR8jnOw%2Fi79KF5bxgrlBQfwpWb8YuYtqgAlyXX0wnglari5S9eNQFGnwE0RjJAVTHOU0G3Dyh7lA%2BKvX7RwNPPSfDmB2QFBriRlhkLDddD3Fc73ix5NCpz68iksAmkq5K%2Fj8fRT8BbAVZdq2d47oFt4t%2BlNbQuSu0DareAE4aETIR3Vv7LVNoDTpbs8jISiI9wVN4kjsbI23ZWHr8Cm8Uc43TezHllW60qC%2FA6bYTAt3lpjVisrhS2S6su%2Br9PnKEuO%2BPaAw%2BB%2FcFv7wq9RU2C6B%2F7LsoHCRSDOLU%2BwSqrMjCsHsNIBBOkr8HT114Ft9oKV1cup0c6E8eb3ixN1mkbJDYH6btZnaGpBFvmam%2Bu1dc20QHgjCs7gdzI%2FsG1Cok4XbB8NFrPa5gn%2FbhS91nC0xE7oNCbAcUv .

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579775/595910265/-1529437191?refcode=260118_E2A3_JC_RRPollRS&refcode2=3d64bd63-bbf4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&contactdata=e+oj/zt+4g3PyZsvr0D7ffe8OYC1V/zRe9BOfiNXsN1nhZ50VStqP4S5/icUH7Wm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDY0YmQ2My1iYmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uu1_7k_wf3YvmqgMa-5KSJBqX2dOPHyL1pMoCF6L47s=) | | Listen y’all, I’m going to be very direct. A new poll shows me down 9 points. That’s not because Texans suddenly stopped believing in what we’re fighting for. It’s because the attacks against me are relentless — and they’re starting to work. Outside groups and MAGA provocateurs are working overtime to smear my record, twist my words, and define me before I can reach voters myself. They’re counting on one thing: that I won’t have the resources to fight back. If I’m being real with you, that’s the danger we’re facing right now. This race was never going to be easy or cheap. But with time running out and the attacks escalating every single day, we’re at a moment where we either respond forcefully and immediately or we let the lies win. Fighting back means peppering the airwaves with ads explaining the importance of this Senate race and defining who I am and what I’m fighting for. It means pushing the truth out faster than the misinformation. And it means making sure voters hear directly from me instead of attack ads funded by people who don’t care about Texas or our future. That takes resources. Right now. So I’m asking you directly: [**Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can give today to help me fight back and turn this race around?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579776/595910266/-1529437191?amount=25&refcode=260118_E2A3_JC_RRPollRS&refcode2=3d64bd63-bbf4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&contactdata=e+oj/zt+4g3PyZsvr0D7ffe8OYC1V/zRe9BOfiNXsN1nhZ50VStqP4S5/icUH7Wm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDY0YmQ2My1iYmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uu1_7k_wf3YvmqgMa-5KSJBqX2dOPHyL1pMoCF6L47s=) | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579777/595910267/-879695014?amount=5&refcode=260118_E2A3_JC_RRPollRS&refcode2=3d64bd63-bbf4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&contactdata=e+oj/zt+4g3PyZsvr0D7ffe8OYC1V/zRe9BOfiNXsN1nhZ50VStqP4S5/icUH7Wm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDY0YmQ2My1iYmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uu1_7k_wf3YvmqgMa-5KSJBqX2dOPHyL1pMoCF6L47s=) | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579778/595910268/-879695014?amount=10&refcode=260118_E2A3_JC_RRPollRS&refcode2=3d64bd63-bbf4-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&contactdata=e+oj/zt+4g3PyZsvr0D7ffe8OYC1V/zRe9BOfiNXsN1nhZ50VStqP4S5/icUH7Wm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDY0YmQ2My1iYmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uu1_7k_wf3YvmqgMa-5KSJBqX2dOPHyL1pMoCF6L47s=)

and further out of reach.

clean_body: = | | Listen y’all, I’m going to be very direct. A new poll shows me down 9 points. That’s not because Texans suddenly stopped believing in what we’re fighting for. It’s because the attacks against me are relentless — and they’re starting to work. Outside groups and MAGA provocateurs are working overtime to smear my record, twist my words, and define me before I can reach voters myself. They’re counting on one thing: that I won’t have the resources to fight back. If I’m being real with you, that’s the danger we’re facing right now. This race was never going to be easy or cheap. But with time running out and the attacks escalating every single day, we’re at a moment where we either respond forcefully and immediately or we let the lies win. Fighting back means peppering the airwaves with ads explaining the importance of this Senate race and defining who I am and what I’m fighting for. It means pushing the truth out faster than the misinformation. And it means making sure voters hear directly from me instead of attack ads funded by people who don’t care about Texas or our future. That takes resources. Right now. So I’m asking you directly: = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t urgent. We are running out of time – and every dollar right now goes straight toward countering those attacks and closing the gap. I’ve never backed down from a tough fight. I didn’t do it before Congress, and I won’t do it now. But I need you with me in this moment. Jasmine = = | | | = | For too long, Texas has elected Senators who have defended politics as usual and protected the status quo, while Texans pay the price. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Small actions add up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I’ve learned something as Governor

I’ve learned something over the last three years as your Governor: **Power isn’t just wielded in large acts or on big stages.** _You_ have enormous power, Derek. And throughout this campaign, I’m asking you to use that power. I’ll tell you what I mean by that in a moment, but before I go any further, I need you to know: [_**Far-right politicians, national GOP groups, you name it — they’re already hard at work, spreading lie after lie about the movement we’ve built together. I knew these attacks were coming. But now, it’s on _all of us_ to make sure they don’t spread unchecked. Can you chip in whatever you can to help me and my team push back?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579790/595910282/1156619579?refcode=email_011826_small&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmQ1YjQ4ZC1iYmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNZQYuuXZk320rCZyk3uZLqkC1qxiD2CzrxqcoceIfI=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579791/595910283/1156619579?refcode=email_011826_small&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmQ1YjQ4ZC1iYmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNZQYuuXZk320rCZyk3uZLqkC1qxiD2CzrxqcoceIfI=)
---
In times like these, I know it can feel like small, individual actions can’t make a difference. That the politicians running the show in DC are too powerful, too isolated for any single person to make a difference. But that’s not true at all, Derek.
**And Pennsylvania would know.**
250 years ago, a group of Americans gathered in Philadelphia to declare its independence from the most powerful empire in the world. Just a small handful of people had the courage to tell the entire world that _we_ had the power to determine America’s future.
**Not a king. Not a tyrant.**
I think about that story a lot, Derek. Because I see so many parallels between then and now.
I see how small, individual actions — the decision to join a campaign, the courage to protest peacefully, the bravery to speak out against injustice — have added up and changed Pennsylvania for the better.
[_**That’s what this campaign is all about. Small, but significant actions all coming together into something bigger. Something unstoppable. Now, I’m asking you to join me — to take that small step and help us build a brighter future for Pennsylvania. If that’s a movement you can get behind, I hope you’ll chip in just a few dollars to support our team.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123579792/595910284/1156619579?refcode=email_011826_small&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmQ1YjQ4ZC1iYmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNZQYuuXZk320rCZyk3uZLqkC1qxiD2CzrxqcoceIfI=)

body:
I care that your life is defined by dignity and comfort | | | I don’t care who you voted for I care that your life is defined by dignity and comfort Peter, I don’t care who you voted for in the last election. I care that your life is defined by dignity and comfort, not endless toil. That’s how politics should be. When we talk honestly about the problems working-class families face and offer real solutions, people respond across party lines. We saw this in New York, with 10% of Trump voters supporting Zohran Mamdani. That matters, especially in a moment as volatile as this one. We do not turn the page on a dark era in American politics by lecturing people about moderation. **We do it by speaking directly to their lived experience, offering real solutions, and following through on them.** [ Donate ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvbKBRjijH4M6kFuhYdbd5oBt82e7oONi6Skce6kKgKdq8nvEi1ScTQklCY1mHCf8ZLrPCufNP-HVw6jqwyqf6PFBrI8NeaGWXgLAYyjfdz44IirKnRuGz5nHG0MUz6_jckzX3e0e91OFKqkno4RhYyPuVmnHUdW3jNyfOiMipBe0gqRvVYKvOmCpo2tu1wKeSxDU4famudIeTwnNCokeLwSrxwgEDc9199wxeBNL9UlnJLYYKCxZ_ukNMScaq_TZGTxDQW_1iXiIycL38p-Pm_Xzb56wIctt4DGigwAsYKpcqbnGIRWdZ_wZlGMpkptYs8ginNiFqPlDRSktsa8ehdRb2B0jP_MSTjH-5sreNTcw/4ne/lGyarQE5QBat_x8Lro5g5A/h0/h001.rc_J-HMRHqkB4SJH9e0j3T8WjnByJr0L5gq_cYxXUpk) The truth is, we are living in a second Gilded Age. Just like the first one in the late 1800s, extreme wealth concentration and rapid technological change are reshaping people’s lives. It is harder to provide for a family. Harder to plan for the future. Harder to feel secure no matter how hard you work. I know this firsthand. My wife Megan and I graduated from Architecture school in the aftermath of the 2008 housing market collapse. Jobs were scarce. Our future felt uncertain. We returned to my hometown of Iron Mountain to join an architectural practice that had once employed around twenty people. By the time we arrived, the economic collapse had reduced it to just one man: my father, working alone in a large, empty office. The first several years of our careers were filled with uncertainty, sparse projects, low pay, crushing student loans, and collective sacrifice as the three of us worked to resuscitate the business created by my grandfather 60 years prior. Eventually, we found our footing. In 2019, Megan and I bought the firm, which we still run today with a small team. We were fortunate. Too many families were not. Today, massive corporations like Amazon wipe out small businesses while paying off politicians to consolidate power, crush competition, suppress wages, and raise prices on everyone else. These are the conditions that fuel movements for change. That energy can be channeled into reforms that improve people’s lives, much like Teddy Roosevelt’s progressive movement did in the 1900s. Or it can be exploited by demagogues like Donald Trump and opportunists like J.D. Vance to keep us divided, fearful, and distracted while they gain power and enrich their billionaire allies. **Peter, there is still hope.** We can end this era of billionaire greed and political corruption by fighting for a second Progressive Era. A future where no one lives in fear of economic ruin from a medical diagnosis. Where our government works to protect the interests of the working class. Where everyone is guaranteed a retirement with dignity. That future is within reach. It starts in 2026 with people-powered campaigns like this one. Will you make a contribution today and help us build it together? – Kyle If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [Express Donate None of it helped working families

| **MAGA Republicans in Congress have turned their backs on everyday Americans.**

_In 2025 alone, they voted to:_
❌Cut Medicaid
❌Slash food assistance
❌Spike Health Insurance Premiums
❌Gut federal funding for emergency preparedness

**Meanwhile, New Dems are fighting for working families.** Just last week, they voted to extend ACA tax credits, and they continue to defend Social Security and Medicare while pushing to lower costs across the board.

But to advance our agenda further, we need to secure a Democratic House Majority this fall.

body:
We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our grassroots donor wall.
This is Deb Haaland with exciting news, Peter: Right at the center of our campaign headquarters in Albuquerque **is our Grassroots Donor Wall, a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, not billionaires and insiders.**
I want your name on that wall, Peter. We’re adding the names of everyone who pitches in, no matter the size of the donation. **[Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today so we can add yours?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99672?refcode=em20260118-9949&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9949%2E614464%2ES3c_Qh)**

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Abbott crossed a dangerous line
body:
Our privacy and voting rights shouldn’t be political bargaining chips.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
**Greg Abbott will sell out Texans, no matter the cost.**
Last week, Abbott handed over Texans’ voter registration data to the Department of Justice, including highly sensitive personal information like birthdates, driver’s license numbers, and Social Security numbers.
Texans never agreed to that. And Abbott didn’t bother asking.
Make no mistake: This isn’t about securing elections. Abbott is doing the bidding of Trump and his rich donors who want more control over who gets to vote and who doesn’t.
And the timing couldn’t be scarier. Texas is heading into a critical election year. Instead of focusing on how to guarantee safe, accessible elections in our state, Abbott is choosing to create chaos by opening the door to privacy violations and wrongful voter removals.
Texans are tired of being ignored and sold out by politicians more interested in chasing power in Washington than protecting people back home.
I’m running because I believe in a Texas that works for working Texans. Our state deserves leaders who will defend democracy, not gamble with it, and put Texans first when powerful interests demand otherwise. But taking on Abbott’s $106 million warchest means we have to build strength quickly.
**[What we do now will set the tone for this campaign. If you’re able, will you chip in $5 today to help us hit our $100,000 goal before our January 22nd fundraising deadline?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260118_2_data.9iM0mR&refcode=em20260118-427&amount=5&t=1&akid=427%2E299639%2EDuD2l1)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260118_2_data.9iM0mR&amount=5&refcode=em20260118-427&t=20&akid=427%2E299639%2EDuD2l1)
Thank you,
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260118-2&t=21&refcode2=427_299639_DuD2l1&akid=427%2E299639%2EDuD2l1)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: Team Ossoff HQ
subject: Something powerful happened...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
This month, we’ve sent several messages about the stakes of this race. We’ve talked about the millions of dollars that Donald Trump’s MAGA allies have already spent — and will spend — to attack and defeat Jon Ossoff. We’ve talked about how important winning this race in Georgia is if we want any chance of taking back the Senate majority.
We’ll be honest: We weren’t sure how this grassroots team would respond.
But after we sent those messages, something powerful happened. Erin from North Carolina chipped in $15. A few minutes later, Nina from Texas donated $15. Then, Megan from Georgia contributed $15. And suddenly, we had a whole movement of people committed to reelecting Jon.
**Peter, each of these donations came from a grassroots supporter just like you — people with families and responsibilities giving what they could because this Senate race and the future of our democracy matters to them.**
**[So, will you match Erin, Nina, and Megan’s $15 donations with one of your own today? Every single donation to Jon’s reelection campaign matters in a race this important.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260117-1-full-b&t=1&akid=1464%2E5691347%2ECppzZo)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Thank you,
Team Ossoff

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: This can’t be right.
body:
This is a load of BS, Peter.**
**With what my father has been through and what Republicans face daily, it 's a damn miracle we're still standing. The Radical Left is pulling out all the stops to take us down, and I'm not just talking about the fake news media and their lies.**
**I 'm talking about the bought-out corrupt career politicians, the Deep State cronies, and the Radical Leftist lunatics who will stop at nothing to destroy everything we hold dear.**
**I can 't lie, they're coming for us, and they won't rest until they've taken away our freedom and our way of life. I'm sorry to be so blunt with you right now, but this needed your immediate attention.

clean_body: This is a load of BS, Peter. With what my father has been through and what Republicans face daily, it 's a damn miracle we're still standing. The Radical Left is pulling out all the stops to take us down, and I'm not just talking about the fake news media and their lies. I 'm talking about the bought-out corrupt career politicians, the Deep State cronies, and the Radical Leftist lunatics who will stop at nothing to destroy everything we hold dear. I can 't lie, they're coming for us, and they won't rest until they've taken away our freedom and our way of life. I'm sorry to be so blunt with you right now, but this needed your immediate attention. My name is Donald Trump Jr., and I have been fighting alongside my father and strong America First Conservatives for a decade now. It's because of you that we are where we are today, but the radical left is out to destroy us. time to act is now or never, because let's be honest... If you don't do something now, our country will never be able to recover. Our children, our grandchildren, and every generation after that will have to fix what we let the Liberal mob break. Peter, I appreciate your continued support. Our MAGA movement would be nowhere without you. I mean it. For America, Donald Trump Jr. | | | | Paid for by Team Emmer, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Emmer for Congress and Electing Majority Making Effective Republicans (Emmer PAC) 824 S Milledge Avenue Suite 101 Athens, GA 30605 |

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.
